samples.en: So now we're just going to use all the momentum we have.

samples.zh: -好 能看看吗？ -可以啊

samples.en: Oh, looking good.
samples.zh: 看着不错

samples.en: You just got to find the right place for everything.
samples.zh: 所以... 凡事都得找个合适的平衡点

samples.en: So yeah, they forgot maybe their lunch or something.
samples.zh: 估计谁把午餐之类的忘在那里了

samples.en: -Side skirts. -Yeah, over here.
samples.zh: -侧裙 -对，在这边

samples.en: And yeah, other than that, stock interior, also the seats are stock,
samples.zh: 然后除此之外，内饰是原厂的，座椅也是原厂

samples.en: on proper aero, massive front splitter, massive rear wing.
samples.zh: 配完整的空力套件，大前铲、大尾翼

samples.en: a 992 GT3 and putting a Manthey Performance Kit on it?
samples.zh: 来缓解一下得不到RS的痛苦呢？

samples.en: they were talking about that the car was like not having the power,
samples.zh: 他们提到GTD遇到了动力不足

samples.en: In the rear, the car didn't have a... rear sway bar before,
samples.zh: 在后面，后轴原来是没有防倾杆的

samples.en: It was very, very fast. I remember when we drove it.
samples.zh: 当时真的飞快 我还记得开它的感觉

samples.en: But I love it like this too, like stock and just give it.
samples.zh: 这样我也喜欢，原厂状态随便踩

samples.en: This one is just a little lift.
samples.zh: 这里只用轻抬油门

samples.en: Really, it's V12. V12.
samples.zh: 千真万确，V12啊

samples.en: Brembo pads.
samples.zh: 布雷博刹车皮

samples.en: Just a Golf.
samples.zh: 就是台高尔夫

samples.en: Oh, bit of sliding... at like 180.
samples.zh: 有点打滑... 时速180

samples.en: Have to drop down a lot.
samples.zh: 不得不猛降很多

samples.en: which makes me very happy, because from what I remember last year，
samples.zh: 这让我特别开心，因为我还记得去年的时候

samples.en: But it's really really like bad bad bad.
samples.zh: 但真的就是烂烂烂

samples.en: It felt like it.
samples.zh: 感觉像是

samples.en: All right, well, let's see what's gonna happen to it.
samples.zh: 好吧，行，我们看看它会表现如何

samples.en: How sad.
samples.zh: 真可惜

samples.en: where he wants to give opportunities to drivers
samples.zh: 这个车队就是Max想给他们机会

samples.en: Aside from the emotion that they cause under driving,
samples.zh: 除了它们在驾驶时带来的激情，

samples.en: maybe he had the car somewhere closer, so...
samples.zh: 也许他是在近一点的地方拿的车，所以...

points.en: So this is my EJ, with like you could say stage zero and a half
points.zh: 所以这是我的EJ，你可以说是0.5阶

points.en: or minus half or something for track.
points.zh: 或者对赛道来说负0.5阶

points.en: This is another one, slightly modified with a couple of mods here and there.
points.zh: 这是另一台，稍微改装过，各处都有些小改动

points.en: And this is pretty much what I want to build eventually.
points.zh: 而这差不多就是我最终想打造的样子

points.en: So let's go through the mods, what's on it.
points.zh: 我们来看看都有哪些改装件

points.en: First of all, thank you very much for the invite.
points.zh: 首先，非常感谢你的邀请

points.en: I'm super curious and excited at the same time, because like I said,
points.zh: 我既超级好奇又兴奋，因为就像我说的

points.en: it's pretty much the spec that I want to build. But this is K24, or?
points.zh: 这基本就是我想打造的规格，是K24对吧？

points.en: Yeah, K24, yeah. 24, yeah.
I will keep it K20 first to race in the two-litre class
points.zh: 我打算先保留K20参加两公升组别

points.en: and then later we will upgrade to a K24 probably.
points.zh: 之后可能再升级到K24

points.en: But what I'm the most excited about are the wheels.
points.zh: 但最让我兴奋的是轮毂

points.en: So those are 17-inch with a big brake kit from AP Racing 5000R.
points.zh: 17寸，搭配AP Racing 5000R大号刹车套件

points.en: And there's a lot of debate on Honda
points.zh: 关于本田现在有很多争论

points.en: going on right now from people that I ask.
points.zh: 我问的人也都各执一词

points.en: They say keep it 15 with the low rotational mass or go 17.
points.zh: 有人说15寸旋转质量低，有人说上17寸

points.en: We have also to take into account that we are on Nordschleife,
points.zh: 我们还必须考虑到这是在纽博格林北环

points.en: a bumpy track where we need to have more suspension travel
points.zh: 这条赛道很颠簸，需要更多的悬架行程

points.en: with the bumps. So need to see, but if this works,
points.zh: 来应对起伏 如果这个方案可行

points.en: then I'll be probably sold to convert mine to 17s.
points.zh: 我可能就会把自己的车改成17寸

points.en: Also this, is that what kind of... is this factory or?
points.zh: 还有，这是哪种...是原厂的吗？

points.en: -Yeah, factory, yeah. -Oh, nice.
points.zh: -对，原厂的 -不错啊

points.en: Without, yeah, without the sunroof. Super cool.
points.zh: 不带，对，不带天窗 超酷

points.en: We have plastic windows.
points.zh: 用的是塑料车窗

points.en: The doors are... also plastic or is it?
points.zh: 车门是...也是塑料的吗？

points.en: No, they're metal.
points.zh: 不，是金属的

points.en: Oh, they're metal. Completely stripped.
points.zh: 哦，是金属的 完全拆空了

points.en: Yeah, I will go for a carbon version.
points.zh: 我会直接上碳纤维的版本

points.en: You have a cage as well, looks very nice. What's the cage from?
points.zh: 还装了防滚架，看起来很不错 是哪家的？

points.en: I made it.
points.zh: 我自己做的

points.en: -You made it? -Yeah, I made it.
points.zh: -你做的？ -我自己做的

points.en: Very nice. Do you know the weight of it roughly?
points.zh: 真不错 你知道大概重量吗？

points.en: -9...70 kilos. -70 kilos. 970 kilos.
Yeah, yeah, yeah.
points.zh: 嗯，嗯，嗯

points.en: Okay, okay.
points.zh: 明白了

points.en: Nice.
points.zh: 不错

points.en: -Oh, you mean the whole car, 970? -Yeah, the whole car.
points.zh: -哦，你是说整车970？ -对，整车

points.en: Do you know the cage weight?
points.zh: 那防滚架重量呢？

points.en: Well, the cage weight is probably around probably 50 kilos.
points.zh: 防滚架重量大概在50公斤左右吧

points.en: -Yeah, yeah, yeah. -It's not T45, it's...
points.zh: -嗯嗯 -不是T45规格，是...

points.en: Oh, actually, you know, I think they're not going to let us on
points.zh: 哦对了，我觉得他们不会让我们上赛道的

points.en: because of the ears.
points.zh: 因为这个耳朵

points.en: The ear seats.
points.zh: 带护耳的座椅

points.en: That might be the biggest culprit.
points.zh: 这可能是最大的问题

points.en: -If you've got another bucket seat... -I do.
points.zh: -如果你有其他桶椅... -我有

points.en: We can put our Tillets in if it fits.
points.zh: 换上我们的Tillett座椅试试

points.en: Anyway, it has a wing, it has front aero, and it has
points.zh: 总之，它有尾翼，前面也做了空力

points.en: also bare brake conversion from Wilwood on the back.
points.zh: 后轮也改了Wilwood刹车

points.en: And yeah, we're going to try to swap the seats and yeah, go for a lap.
points.zh: 对，我们会试着换座椅，然后去跑一圈试试

points.en: ACUiTY shifter, the same one that I have that I still need to install.
points.zh: ACUiTY换挡杆，和我那个一样，我还没装上

points.en: So it's going to be nice. An AiM dash.
points.zh: 应该会很不错 还有AiM仪表

points.en: All right, let's try, let's try, let's go, let's go.
points.zh: 好了 试试看，出发出发

points.en: A while later, with 15 minutes to go until the closing,
points.zh: 过了一会儿，离赛道关闭还有15分钟

points.en: we managed to fit it in. Kind of works.
points.zh: 我们总算搞定了，勉强能用

points.en: Also the GoPro contraptions kind of work.
points.zh: GoPro支架也勉强能行

points.en: So you have to deal with that.
points.zh: 大家就将就看吧

points.en: And I'm going to be wearing earbuds
points.zh: 然后我还会戴上耳塞

points.en: because I've been advised to because apparently it's very loud.
points.zh: 因为有人建议我戴，据说这车声音特别大

points.en: Better for you, for the content. Let's go, let's go.
points.zh: 对大家和内容都更好 走吧走吧

points.en: The following day, before trying again, we decided to be sure
points.zh: 第二天，再次尝试之前，我们决定稳妥起见

points.en: and take off the front canards as well
points.zh: 把前面的风刀也拆了

points.en: because probably that might trigger...
points.zh: 不然大概率会被拦下

points.en: the no-no from a marshal.
points.zh: 马修见了直摇头

points.en: Sad.
points.zh: 可惜

points.en: Let's see if we're not banned and we can try to go again.
points.zh: 看看我们这次会不会被禁，能不能再跑一圈

points.en: Okay. Good.
points.zh: 好吧 好的

points.en: I guess this is the coolest reason to be banned for.
points.zh: 我猜这大概是最酷的被禁理由了

points.en: Not banned, I just need to put different headlights. Sick.
points.zh: 没被禁，只是需要换个大灯 太帅了

points.en: Try to do for lap two, they didn't allow because no headlights.
points.zh: 想跑第二圈，他们不让，因为没大灯

points.en: Oh, okay.
points.zh: 好吧

points.en: But there was big yellow, so it was, but still.
points.zh: 但有大段黄旗，但即便如此...

points.en: -It was good? -Good.
points.zh: -感觉不错？ -不错

points.en: Yeah, I needed a bit...
points.zh: 我需要一点...

points.en: -It's very narrow between three and five. -Yeah.
points.zh: -三挡和五挡之间太近了 -是啊

points.en: Sometimes like if I want to go like from four, it went to five
points.zh: 有时候在四挡我想降挡，结果直接进五挡了

points.en: instead of three. I needed to get used to it.
points.zh: 而不是三挡 我需要适应一下

points.en: Some of the biggest throws as well.
points.zh: 换挡行程也特别长

points.en: Let me take my earplugs off so I can hear you.
points.zh: 让我取下耳塞好听到你说话

points.en: Oh, your earplugs work a charm.
points.zh: 哦，你的耳塞效果真棒

points.en: Yeah, no, it was really good.
points.zh: 是的，真的很不错

points.en: Mission success.
points.zh: 任务成功

points.en: And the coolest reason to not be let on the track back again is
points.zh: 最酷的不让上赛道的理由居然是因为

points.en: because the car has no headlights.
points.zh: 这车没有头灯

points.en: And daytime running lights was not acceptable.
points.zh: 日间行车灯也不行

points.en: Wow.
points.zh: 哇

points.en: Quite the car you built.
points.zh: 你这车真是绝了

points.en: I was really, really impressed.
points.zh: 让我印象非常深刻

points.en: Probably so far the best one I've driven ever, so far.
points.zh: 可能是我迄今为止开过最好的了

points.en: So I guess that gives me lots of, yeah, inspiration to do it to mine.
points.zh: 所以这给了我很多，改装自己车子的灵感

points.en: So we have a lot of things to work on.
points.zh: 我们还有不少地方要改进

points.en: Yeah, feedback.
points.zh: 整体感受

points.en: Engine phenomenal, diff phenomenal, tyres great, brakes as well.
points.zh: 发动机绝了，差速器绝了，轮胎很棒，刹车也是

points.en: And for me the most important thing was of course to find out
points.zh: 对我来说，最重要的是搞清楚一个问题

points.en: whether 17 inch wheels would be okay on the Nürburgring.
points.zh: 用17寸轮毂在纽博格林跑会不会出问题

points.en: And I would say definitely more than just okay because they work.
points.zh: 我要说绝对不只是合适，因为它们很管用

points.en: The brakes, the best ones I have experienced on a Honda ever.
points.zh: 刹车，是我开过本田里最棒的了

points.en: So definitely gonna go for a set of APs for my car.
points.zh: 绝对要给我的车也上一套AP

points.en: And only thing missing, potentially race ABS,
points.zh: 唯一缺的可能就是赛道ABS

points.en: but we have something coming for that as well. And a bit more aero.
points.zh: 不过这个我们也有计划了 还有更多的空力

points.en: But phenomenal car.
points.zh: 但车子真的绝了

points.en: Optimum red line through the whole track, through the whole rev band.
points.zh: 整条赛道，整个转速区间，都有理想的红线性能

points.en: It's mwah. Yeah, I don't know.
points.zh: 太喜欢了 你懂的

points.en: You heard it yourself.
points.zh: 大家也听到了

points.en: The only thing I had difficulties with is to
points.zh: 我唯一遇到困难的是

points.en: putting it in the right gear. Luckily in too high than too low
points.zh: 挂对挡位 好在是挂高档了比挂低了强

points.en: because you really want to be careful.
points.zh: 因为真得小心点

points.en: Therefore instead of downshifting to third
points.zh: 所以我没有降档到三挡

points.en: sometimes I was going to fifth.
points.zh: 有时候挂到了五挡

points.en: But yeah, had only one lap to get used to
points.zh: 但就只有一圈的适应时间

points.en: and I wanted to really get everything out of it I possibly could.
points.zh: 而我想尽可能榨干它所有的潜力

points.en: I think we kind of managed, kind of succeeded.
points.zh: 我觉得勉强做到了，也算成功了吧

points.en: So yeah, super, super happy.
points.zh: 真的超级，超级开心

points.en: So maybe a quick look at the engine once again.
points.zh: 那不如再快速看一眼发动机

points.en: Look at this beautiful K20. Nom.
points.zh: 看这美丽的K20 真香

points.en: Fantastic. So clean, so nice.
points.zh: 太棒了 又干净又好

points.en: I'm definitely going to be harassing you for some tips
points.zh: 我肯定会缠着你，讨教一些改装的窍门

points.en: and tricks on how to do certain things.
points.zh: 这些东西是怎么弄的

points.en: Like the steering pump is relocated here, right?
points.zh: 比如转向泵，是挪到这儿的吧？

points.en: Inside or... what was that? The power steering.
points.zh: 转向助力系统是装在里头还是？

points.en: -We've got steering pump, swirl pot. -Yeah.
points.zh: -我们有转向泵，副油箱 -嗯

points.en: And then that's got a carbon door which goes on it
points.zh: 然后这个装了碳纤维门

points.en: -because it needs to be sealed for racing in the UK. -Yeah.
points.zh: -因为在英国参赛需要密封 -嗯

points.en: -And then obviously just the ECU. -Nice.
points.zh: -然后这里就是ECU -不错

points.en: Just neat, out of the way.
points.zh: 简洁，不碍事

points.en: Sick, sick. The sound, the emotion.
points.zh: 帅，太帅了 这声浪，这激情

points.en: And very good choice of mine to wear earplugs.
points.zh: 我戴耳塞的决定太明智了

points.en: That was very, very needed. Yeah, excited.
points.zh: 非常非常有必要 太激动了

points.en: You said it's 970 kilos right now.
points.zh: 你说现在车重970公斤

points.en: But a lot... while the car was at our workshop,
points.zh: 但是很多...车子在我们车间的时候

points.en: we took a bit more look at it.
points.zh: 我们又仔细看了看

points.en: We saw that like everything is cut out from the inside.
points.zh: 我们发现里面所有结构都彻底掏空了

points.en: So it's like a proper shell shell.
points.zh: 所以就像个纯粹的空壳

points.en: So it will be interesting to see how much
points.zh: 很期待我们能把自己的车子减到多轻

points.en: or how low we can bring ours.
points.zh: 还是挺有意思的

points.en: Because of course the intention is to use lots of carbon.
points.zh: 毕竟我们本来想用大量碳纤维

points.en: But seeing how light this everything already is,
points.zh: 但看到这个已经这么轻了

points.en: I don't think there's going to be much difference. But who knows?
points.zh: 我觉得不会有太大差别，但谁知道呢？

points.en: Who knows? We'll see.
points.zh: 让我们拭目以待

points.en: I definitely have very nice inspiration.
points.zh: 真的给我带来了很多灵感

points.en: So now we have something to work to.
points.zh: 现在我们有了努力的目标

points.en: Very much looking forward to it. So thanks again.
points.zh: 真的超期待 还是再感谢一下

points.en: And see you next time, hopefully.
points.zh: 希望下次再见

points.en: Welcome to probably one of the most requested videos over the last two days.
points.zh: 欢迎来到 可能是过去两天被催更最多的视频

points.en: Because Ford Mustang GTD has done 6 minutes 57 around the Nürburgring.
points.zh: 因为福特Mustang GTD在纽博格林跑出了6分57秒

points.en: And you have flooded me with DMs asking me for my lap time analysis.
points.zh: 你们已经用私信轰炸我 催更圈速分析了

points.en: But I was traveling and, as you can see in here, I'm actually still kind of on the way.
points.zh: 不过我在赶路，你们也看到我还在路上呢

points.en: So I'm going to tell you everything what I think about it
points.zh: 现在，我会跟大家说说我的想法

points.en: but first of all, it's almost Christmas
points.zh: 不过首先，圣诞节快到了

points.en: so we have still a couple of ugly Christmas jumpers left.
points.zh: 我们还有几件丑丑圣诞毛衣还有库存

points.en: Some sizes are sold out, so head over to the link in the video description.
points.zh: 有些尺码已经断货，赶紧点击简介里的链接

points.en: Use code MISCHA24 for 15% off, and
points.zh: 用折扣码MISCHA24可以打85折

points.en: be warm and look cool this upcoming Christmas and many years to come.
points.zh: 在这个圣诞节和未来几年都能又暖又酷

points.en: Anyway, 6 minutes 57.
points.zh: 好了，6分57秒

points.en: This is a great achievement by Ford team, by Multimatic team,
points.zh: 是福特团队、Multimatic团队、车手Dirk Müller

points.en: by Dirk Müller, the driver, and everyone else involved,
points.zh: 这是所有参与人员一起达成的巨大成就

points.en: because it's the very first US car to be able to do such a lap time
points.zh: 因为，这是第一台取得这个成就的美国车

points.en: on the Nürburgring Nordschleife for under 7 minutes, which is great.
points.zh: 在纽北跑进了7分钟，确实非常了不起

points.en: Viper ACR came close, I think, 7 years ago, in 2017.
points.zh: 7年前的2017年，Viper ACR曾接近这个成绩

points.en: They did 7:01 in a 20.6 kilometer track. This is 20.832.
points.zh: 20.6公里布局跑了7分01秒，这次是20.832

points.en: So, technically, Viper was like 7 seconds off or so,
points.zh: 所以严格来说，Viper慢了了7秒左右

points.en: It was, of course, manual etc. etc.
points.zh: 当然那还是手动挡车型等等的

points.en: Regardless, no one is ever going to take away the fact that
points.zh: 但无论如何，没人能够否认的事实就是

points.en: GTD is the very first US car to go sub 7, which is great.
points.zh: GTD就是首台跑进7分钟大关的美国车

points.en: But, where does it put in the car among all the other competitors?
points.zh: 不过，它在竞争对手中处于什么位置呢

points.en: So let's have a look.
points.zh: 一起来看看

points.en: The car is classified as a sports car
points.zh: 它被归类为跑车

points.en: according to the Nürburgring lap record specification.
points.zh: 这是纽博格林官方圈速榜的标准

points.en: So, 6 minutes 57 puts it just above Porsche 911 GT3,
points.zh: 6分57秒刚刚好超过了保时捷911 GT3

points.en: the 992 generation, that has done 6 minutes 59.
points.zh: 是992这一代的 成绩是6分59秒

points.en: And, actually, GT3 with the MR kit does it even faster in 6:55.
points.zh: 加装MR套件的GT3甚至能跑到6分55秒

points.en: The 992 GT3 RS is 6 minutes 49, so almost 10 seconds faster.
points.zh: 992 GT3 RS是6分49秒，比它快了将近10秒

points.en: And then you have the Black Series, 6:48.
points.zh: 还有6分48秒的Black Series

points.en: And, finally, you have also the GT2 RS with 6 minutes 43.
points.zh: 最后，还有跑到了6分43秒的GT2 RS

points.en: So, fast, but it's not crazy faster than those counterparts.
points.zh: GTD很快，但和对手们比起来并没有特别快

points.en: And especially when I watched the documentary that Ford has done...
points.zh: 特别是 我看到福特拍的官方纪录片...

points.en: By the way, great, thumbs up.
points.zh: 顺便说一句，片子很赞

points.en: I really loved it. Lots of effort put into it.
points.zh: 我很喜欢，花了很多心思

points.en: And lots of things were really good that were featured in that documentary.
points.zh: 纪录片里面不少内容都相当不错

points.en: But saying this:
points.zh: 但既然说了：

points.en: Our mission with GTD is pretty simple.
points.zh: 关于GTD，我们的使命很简单

points.en: Go beat the Europeans on their turf.
points.zh: 就是要在在欧洲人的主场上打败他们

points.en: I mean, if we look at some other lap times.
points.zh: 我是说，如果我们看看其他圈速

points.en: The Porsche GT3, sorry, GT2 RS MR has done 6:44 in 2018.
points.zh: 保时捷GT3，不对，GT2 RS MR在2018年就跑出6分44秒

points.en: So 6 years ago. And that's like, yeah, almost...
points.zh: 那可是六年前啊，几乎是快了...

points.en: Well, not 15 seconds, but 13 seconds faster, so... with technology back then.
points.zh: 不是15秒，而是快了13秒，用的还是当年的技术

points.en: And in comparison... I mean, we're car guys,
points.zh: 我们都是车迷嘛...免不了想要比较

points.en: so I would like to compare cars with other cars.
points.zh: 免不了把车子和其他车子做比较

points.en: 815 horsepower for the GTD compared to, well, 525 horsepower with the GT3 RS.
points.zh: GTD有815马力，对比之下，GT3 RS只有525马力

points.en: When we think of pricing, starting from 325 thousand dollars,
points.zh: 价格方面，GTD起售价是32.5万美元

points.en: and in Europe they're around 350 thousand euros.
points.zh: 在欧洲大概是35万欧元

points.en: And compared to GT3 RS, it's kind of similar pricing or maybe even below,
points.zh: 相比之下，GT3 RS的价格差不太多，甚至更低

points.en: depends on whether you look at any potential dealer markups or whatsoever.
points.zh: 具体要看经销商有没有加价 等等的情况

points.en: So... numbers-wise, price-wise, what you get in return...
points.zh: 考虑到账面数据，考虑到价格，最终结果...

points.en: It's hard to say that GTD has beaten Porsche or its counterparts.
points.zh: 很难说GTD打败了保时捷和其他的对手

points.en: So there is that. That's an honest opinion.
points.zh: 是啊，这是我的真实看法

points.en: However, benefit of the doubt, what we need to say
points.zh: 不过，还是比较公道地说

points.en: is that this was not optimal conditions lap.
points.zh: 这个圈速的条件不是最理想的

points.en: I know that the car went out for three laps.
points.zh: 据我所知，车子上去跑了三圈

points.en: Sorry, after industry pool of half a day
points.zh: 是在半天的行业测试之后

points.en: and it was raining, in the morning. The track was wet. It was drying out.
points.zh: 那天的早上还在下雨，赛道是湿的，之后逐渐变干

points.en: So it was not really optimal grip conditions, and it has done 6:57.
points.zh: 所以抓地力不是最理想的条件下 跑了6分57秒

points.en: I know that the team has come back three times after,
points.zh: 在这之后，团队又回来过三次

points.en: and they were constantly met by rain.
points.zh: 但是 每次都遇到下雨

points.en: One of those times that we have actually seen them,
points.zh: 其中一次，我还看到了他们

points.en: when I was driving the track day.
points.zh: 那天我正在跑赛道日

points.en: Hi, there, ahead of us.
points.zh: 就在我们前面

points.en: Yeah, they were supposed to do a lot record today.
points.zh: 他们今天本来打算刷圈速的

points.en: Yeah.
points.zh: 嗯

points.en: Hello. Hi, everyone.
points.zh: 哈喽，大家好啊

points.en: Anyway.
points.zh: 好吧

points.en: How much faster can GTD go? 5 seconds? 10 seconds?
points.zh: GTD还能快多少？是5秒还是10秒?

points.en: I think it's realistic to go GT3 RS lap time. Maybe even below.
points.zh: 现实一点的预期就是GT3 RS的圈速，或者更快

points.en: It's possible. It should be possible.
points.zh: 有可能 应该是可能的

points.en: I don't know what other issues were there,
points.zh: 不知道他们还遇到那其他哪些问题

points.en: because, at the beginning of the documentary,
points.zh: 因为在纪录片的一开头

points.en: they were talking about that the car was like not having the power,
points.zh: 他们提到GTD遇到了动力不足

points.en: it was not shifting correctly.
points.zh: 换挡也出现了问题

points.en: He felt that the car was down on power that it was shifting rough
points.zh: 他感觉车的动力有衰减、换挡不顺畅

points.en: and a little bit concerned
points.zh: 不禁有些担心

points.en: is everything working okay?
points.zh: 一切都运转正常吗？

points.en: That was, of course, more of a drama element to what was happening beforehand.
points.zh: 当然，这更多是片子铺垫的一点戏剧效果

points.en: One more thing, I want to say about not optimal conditions.
points.zh: 关于欠佳的赛道条件，我还想说一点

points.en: It was not fully grippy track, but it was still dry
points.zh: 赛道抓地力不完美，但基本是干地

points.en: with maybe some light drizzle here and there, but not wet.
points.zh: 可能有零星小雨，但不能算湿地

points.en: A lot of people were saying it was fully wet because on the documentary shots,
points.zh: 不少人看到了纪录片里面 车子在湿地行驶的空镜

points.en: you see the car driving on the wet track from the B-roll shots.
points.zh: 认为那就是GTD在做圈速时候的赛道条件

points.en: Those media shots were taken way before the actual lap record attempt.
points.zh: 其实这些媒体素材 是在实际刷圈前很久拍的

points.en: It's not that you're doing car-to-car during lap record attempt.
points.zh: 刷圈的时候 不可能去做车对车的跟拍

points.en: It's something that we need to say towards certain kind of public
points.zh: 还是有必要对部分观众说明这一点的

points.en: that is just believing everything that they see on the screen.
points.zh: 一些观众看到画面里有什么，就完全信以为真

points.en: So yeah. I guess that's all there is to it.
points.zh: 好了，基本情况就是这样

points.en: And now let's talk about, let's go through the actual lap time analysis
points.zh: 现在进入实际圈速分析的环节

points.en: with some of my comments. So start it.
points.zh: 我会加上一些评论，开始吧

points.en: Mustang GTD approaching the T13, going towards Sabine Schmidt Curve.
points.zh: Mustang GTD接近T13弯，驶向纽北女王弯

points.en: And here's actually interesting small print:
points.zh: 这里有个有趣的小字注释

points.en: Professional driver with special safety equipment. Do not attempt.
points.zh: 专业车手并装备有特殊安全设备，请勿模仿

points.en: The warranty will be voided if the vehicle is used in driven competitive event
points.zh: 若将车辆用于有多车竞速的赛事，将导致保修失效

points.en: with a multi vehicle something something racing.
points.zh: 比赛啥的啥的 大概是这个意思

points.en: So, if you go professionally racing, the warranty will be voided.
points.zh: 所以，如果你参加专业比赛，会失去车辆的保修

points.en: But can you do track days? I guess so,
points.zh: 但赛道日应该可以吧？我猜没问题

points.en: unless you're going for actual lap times in a competition base with other cars.
points.zh: 除非要在赛道上和其他车比拼真正的单圈成绩

points.en: But that's of course to be subjected with other...
points.zh: 当然具体要看...

points.en: Yeah, I don't know what actually is going to happen.
points.zh: 总之，我也不清楚具体会发生什么

points.en: Anyway. Let's talk more about this.
points.zh: 不管怎样，继续分析这个

points.en: So here, the car accelerates. We have a long straight.
points.zh: 这里车子加速，进入长直道

points.en: through Quiddelbacher Höhe towards Flugplatz.
points.zh: 穿过柯德巴赫高地 驶向飞机场

points.en: And it achieves speeds of 240 kilometers per hour.
points.zh: 它的时速达到了240公里

points.en: Going on the brakes, turning in around 200.
points.zh: 刹车入弯，速度降到了200左右

points.en: No, actually 190 kilometers per hour is the V-minimum GPS speed.
points.zh: GPS显示的实际最低弯心速度 是190公里每小时

points.en: And now it goes flat on the gas.
points.zh: 现在全油门加速

points.en: And this is where I was kind of underwhelmed with 800 horsepower,
points.zh: 在这里我对800马力的表现有点失望

points.en: because it hits like 280, 85 it shows kilometers per hour,
points.zh: 因为才达到最高280、285公里每小时

points.en: whereas the GT2 RS, with 700 horsepower, could do close to 300.
points.zh: 而700马力的GT2 RS在这里能接近300

points.en: And actually, the sector, by the GT3 RS, with 525 horsepower,
points.zh: 实际上，525马力的GT3 RS在这个路段

points.en: was actually done even faster from Quiddelbacher Höhe,
points.zh: 就是从柯德巴赫高地开始这段

points.en: oh sorry, from Hocheichen up until Schwedenkreuz.
points.zh: 更正，是从大橡树到瑞典十字

points.en: Going downhill. Here what we need to mention
points.zh: 冲向坡底，这里需要提到

points.en: is actually we have the new kerb situation.
points.zh: 新路肩是有一些影响的

points.en: And all the previous relevant, or less relevant cars,
points.zh: 以前狐狸洞的路肩是能压的

points.en: they were able to go over the Foxhole kerb,
points.zh: 各种车子都能跨过这个路肩

points.en: where, in this case, it's not the case.
points.zh: 而现在没有办法这么做了

points.en: So, probably also already plus second over there.
points.zh: 可能这里就慢了得有一秒钟

points.en: Alright, going towards Metzgesfeld. 180 kilometers per hour. Not that bad.
points.zh: 继续前往屠宰场，180公里的时速还不错

points.en: On the brakes towards Jame's Left.
points.zh: 刹车进入“都怪詹姆斯弯”

points.en: And then to Kallenhard.
points.zh: 然后是卡伦哈德

points.en: Actually what I also, what I want to say, what I really like...
points.zh: 其实我有一点特别想说的是，特别喜欢的点

points.en: is that you can see the DRS wing through the rear view camera,
points.zh: 通过后视摄像头能看到DRS尾翼的状态

points.en: so to say, being activated and deactivated.
points.zh: 现在是开启 还是关闭

points.en: But it would be nice to see how it is activated, why it is activated,
points.zh: 如果展示它怎么激活的，激活的逻辑就更好了

points.en: like we saw on the onboard of Porsche, for example.
points.zh: 就像我们在保时捷的车载里看到的那样

points.en: Also, for such a great achievement, sub-7 for a first US car,
points.zh: 还有就是，作为第一台跑进7分钟的美国车

points.en: the video quality is kind of potato, I would say. It's of course...
points.zh: 这个视频画质有点渣了，当然...

points.en: But again, not manipulated.
points.zh: 但说回来，没有捏造

points.en: It's actual, legit footage of Race Navigator.
points.zh: 货真价实的Race Navigator数据

points.en: So, that's kind of okay.
points.zh: 就是可以接受的

points.en: But we do see throttle positioning sensor. We do not see the braking sensor.
points.zh: 只是我们可以看到油门开度，却看不到刹车的数据

points.en: Okay, going to Lauda Links. Still flat on the gas. Flat, flat, flat.
points.zh: 现在进入劳达左弯，继续保持全油门

points.en: And here, now, on the brakes, into Bergwerk,
points.zh: 这里开始刹车进入矿山弯

points.en: which is kind of, I would say, very gentle.
points.zh: 这里动作非常轻柔

points.en: Again, probably has to do with sub optimal grip levels.
points.zh: 可能还是因为抓地力条件不好有关系

points.en: And here, the car goes flat, and the fourth left hander,
points.zh: 这里全油门，在第四个左弯这里

points.en: I think it reaches 240 kilometers per hour.
points.zh: 记得达到了240公里每小时

points.en: Actually, even above, even 250. That is actually quite impressive.
points.zh: 好吧，甚至超过250了，这还是挺厉害的

points.en: Climbing, climbing, climbing.
points.zh: 爬升，爬升，爬升

points.en: Now, it's going to be quite interesting.
points.zh: 接下来会很有趣

points.en: Just a quick comment on the Mutkurve speed,
points.zh: 快速说一下 勇气之弯的时速

points.en: which is 180 kilometer per hour, the V-minimum,
points.zh: 弯心速度180公里每小时

points.en: which is, again, lower than the GT3 RS.
points.zh: 还是比GT3 RS还是低一些

points.en: It will be interesting to see how production cars will perform
points.zh: 很想看看 量产车连续刷圈的表现

points.en: on multiple laps after each other because it can suffer from a heat soak;
points.zh: 因为量产车可能会受到热衰减的影响

points.en: it can be overheating, something that production spec cars actually tend to do.
points.zh: 量产版的车子通常都会有过热的问题

points.en: Right, going into the Carousel—
points.zh: 现在进入旋转木马弯

points.en: What according to Dirk Müller is a very important color—
points.zh: Dirk Müller说这是个非常重要的“颜色”

points.en: color—corner.
points.zh: 是弯道，corner

points.en: Cannot disagree, but it's not the most important corner
points.zh: 我不反对这个说法，但要我来说

points.en: from what I would tell you;
points.zh: 至少它不是最关键的弯角

points.en: definitely not for lap times.
points.zh: 对圈速影响不是那么大

points.en: Which one is this? I would tell you at the end of this lap time view.
points.zh: 哪个弯最关键？圈速分析完我再告诉你

points.en: Now, from here on,
points.zh: 从这里开始

points.en: it seems that Dirk, the driver,
points.zh: 看起来，车手Dirk

points.en: is becoming extra cautious than it was the case before.
points.zh: 好像变得比之前更加谨慎了

points.en: A lots of coasting is happening. Really, really, lots of gentle coasting.
points.zh: 有很多松油，比较保守的松油滑行

points.en: So, it could be that this part of the track was not as grippy as before,
points.zh: 可能是这段抓地力不如之前那么好了

points.en: whether it is due to a drizzle or,
points.zh: 无论是因为小雨，还是...

points.en: or maybe that the tyres were getting actually hot-
points.zh: 还是因为轮胎这个时候温度太高了

points.en: but I don't think so. I think it has to do more with the latter.
points.zh: 不过我觉得更可能是因为抓地力下降了

points.en: So, going on the brakes, on the gas, to Brünnchen,
points.zh: 现在刹车，给油，进入小水井

points.en: and then going towards Eiskurve.
points.zh: 然后前往冰弯

points.en: Braking, braking smoothly, relatively late on the gas.
points.zh: 平顺地刹车，给油的时机相对较晚

points.en: There was a lot of coasting happening in between, as mentioned previously.
points.zh: 正如之前提到的，中间有很多滑行

points.en: No crazy air time.
points.zh: 没有夸张的腾空

points.en: Through Pflanzgarten.
points.zh: 穿过植物园

points.en: Also here, relatively gently,
points.zh: 这里也是比较柔和地

points.en: letting the car steer with the throttle.
points.zh: 用油门来引导车子转向

points.en: And then on the gas again. And then flat, flat, flat.
points.zh: 然后再给油，全油门

points.en: Towards Schwalbenschwanz. 250 kilometer per hour.
points.zh: 前往燕尾，速度250公里每小时

points.en: On the brakes, and then, again, slowing down
points.zh: 刹车，再次减速

points.en: and going towards the Mini Carousel.
points.zh: 进入小旋转木马弯

points.en: Turn, turn, turn, turn, turn.
points.zh: 转，转，转，转，转

points.en: Coast, gas, and off we go.
points.zh: 滑行，给油，然后走起

points.en: And now comes the most interesting part,
points.zh: 接下来的一段 最有看点

points.en: but to a certain extent, comparison-wise to other cars, also
points.zh: 但一定程度上，怎么说呢，和其他车做比较

points.en: a bit disappointing, and that is the main straight.
points.zh: 大直道上的表现让人有一点点小失望

points.en: Now, what I've seen on the comments,
points.zh: 我看了一下评论区

points.en: people were impressed that the car has hit 301,
points.zh: 一些观众觉得车子冲到301挺厉害的

points.en: briefly at the very end at the bottom of compression. I think it has hit 301 kilometers per hour.
points.zh: 短暂冲到了301公里每小时，就最后在压缩区间到底的时候

points.en: Now it's slowly climbing towards... It's actually stuck at 290-ish
points.zh: 现在慢慢往上爬升...其实就卡在了290左右了

points.en: and only when it starts going downhill it will briefly tap 300 and 301.
points.zh: 也就是在下坡的时候才能短暂蹭到300、301

points.en: GT2 RS MR with less horsepower, just 700,
points.zh: 马力更小的GT2 RS MR只有700匹

points.en: was cruising at 310 on the main straight already, so...
points.zh: 大直道能以310公里的时速巡航，所以...

points.en: maybe GTD has more downforce, more drag,
points.zh: 可能GTD下压力更大、风阻更高吧

points.en: but with the DRS system, it shouldn't be an issue.
points.zh: 但它有DRS系统，应该不成问题的

points.en: So, yeah.
points.zh: 就这样

points.en: in short, I'm super happy for Ford.
points.zh: 总之，真心为福特高兴

points.en: I'm really impressed because, again, the first US manufacturer to go sub 7.
points.zh: 第一家跑进7分钟的美国制造商，还是让人印象蛮深刻的

points.en: It's impressive because there were many other cars before that
points.zh: 真的很厉害，因为之前有这么多美国车

points.en: could have, should have, would have done it, but they haven't done it.
points.zh: 可能、或许、本应该跑进7分的，但都没有做到

points.en: So it is the first time that US manufacturer does a sub 7.
points.zh: 所以这是美国制造商第一次跑进7分钟

points.en: But at the same time, considering the specs
points.zh: 但是，考虑到GTD的配置

points.en: the car is running with the modern technology,
points.zh: 有这么多现代科技的加持

points.en: it's... it hasn't beaten Europeans on their own turf,
points.zh: 它没有...在欧洲人地盘上打败他们

points.en: if we have to speak with the language
points.zh: 如果要按照他们自己的说法

points.en: that was used in the promotional video. So, it hasn't happened.
points.zh: 宣传片里的目标 还没有真正实现

points.en: But, benefit of the doubt, the car could be faster.
points.zh: 不过公平地说，这车还能更快

points.en: How much faster? We didn't know.
points.zh: 快多少？我们不知道

points.en: Hopefully, they are going to come back and we will see.
points.zh: 希望他们能回来，到时候就知道了

points.en: Regardless, this is great. This is awesome.
points.zh: 无论如何，很棒了，非常了不起

points.en: I hope this will inspire also other US manufacturers
points.zh: 希望这也能激励其他的美国制造商

points.en: to put a bit of more effort by coming here to the 'Ring and trying it,
points.zh: 为纽北投入更多的精力，有更多的尝试

points.en: because Mustang team done sub 7-not happy.
points.zh: Mustang团队跑进7分 并不满足

points.en: were coming multiple times to actually do something that they would be happy with.
points.zh: 他们回来了好多次，不断尝试去达成满意的结果

points.en: Knowing from Corvette Z06, there was an attempt,
points.zh: 像科尔维特Z06之前尝试过

points.en: they couldn't get on the track. They never came back.
points.zh: 但没能做出圈速，之后也没再回来

points.en: I don't know if ZR1 is gonna do anything again. No idea.
points.zh: 我不知道ZR1会不会再来一次

points.en: So that's all there is to it.
points.zh: 情况大概就是这样

points.en: I guess the time will tell how the car will perform
points.zh: 最终的表现，只有时间会给我们答案

points.en: in hands of not-so-professional drivers in the future.
points.zh: 将来，由不那么专业车手驾驶的表现

points.en: Most importantly, how it will perform on shorter tracks compared to other cars,
points.zh: 更重要的是，在更短的赛道对比其他车型的表现

points.en: because we've seen that Z06 was actually better than GT3 on shorter tracks.
points.zh: 就像Z06在短赛道其实是比GT3强的

points.en: And then it came to the Nürburgring
points.zh: 但来到纽博格林

points.en: and was not that great due to the gearing. And I don't know,
points.zh: 因为齿比问题表现平平，谁知道呢

points.en: well obviously, if the car will be faster in the future.

points.zh: 像疯子一样才能摸到它的极限

points.en: to put it mildly.
points.zh: 客气点讲就是这样

points.en: And if you are over the limits then that's it.
points.zh: 一旦真的过了极限，那就完了

points.en: Like I mean you're not gonna die hopefully.
points.zh: 倒不至于死吧...希望不至于

points.en: Because we've seen the recent lots of accidents

points.en: but the car is gonna be right off
points.zh: 车子肯定是全损了

points.en: and you might spend a few nights in the hospital.
points.zh: 人可能会在医院住上几晚

points.en: -Okay. Thanks for telling me afterwards. -So...
points.zh: -行吧 多谢你现在才说 -那...

points.en: Yeah but I'm not driving this car right now.
points.zh: 但我现在也没有开得很极限嘛

points.en: Yeah so the problem is... It's that.
points.zh: 问题在于...就是这

points.en: It's very good, it's very cool,
points.zh: 它确实很棒，也很酷

points.en: but I still like a bit of playfulness in the car, you know?
points.zh: 但我还是希望车子能有点可玩性，你懂吧？

points.en: So this one has less aero.
points.zh: 这台车空力少一点

points.en: For me, my favorite car is probably even the 992, with the manual GT3.
points.zh: 我最爱的，可能还是手动档的992 GT3

points.en: Because then it's still like you driving.
points.zh: 因为这样才像你在开车

points.en: Yeah I think the front is really like... gone gone by now.
points.zh: 我觉得前轮完全... 彻底不行了

points.en: I think we hit another puncture.
points.zh: 估计又爆胎了

points.en: -Something is off today. -Yes.
points.zh: -今天有点不对劲 -是啊

points.en: I think that the curb running
points.zh: 我觉得压路肩

points.en: is going to increase the puncture rate for sure, isn't it?
points.zh: 应该会让爆胎率上升，对吧？

points.en: Not necessarily.
points.zh: 不一定

points.en: The thing is, there could be also lots of debris on track.
points.zh: 可能是赛道上可能还有不少碎片

points.en: The problem is like, we had this multi-car pileup yesterday.
points.zh: 问题在于昨天刚发生了多车连环事故

points.en: Maybe there's some stuff.
points.zh: 可能有残留

points.en: There's definitely some stuff.
points.zh: 肯定还有残留

points.en: I think we're still okay-ish.
points.zh: 我觉得目前还凑合

points.en: I just hope we're gonna make it safe back home.
points.zh: 我只希望我们能安全回去

points.en: Because I don't wanna have like a ride to the...
points.zh: 我可不想被拖车回去...

points.en: on the truck of shame.
points.zh: 耻辱拖车之旅

points.en: It doesn't seem too bad. I got back on a complete flat tire earlier.
points.zh: 看起来不太糟 之前我完全没气也开回去了

points.en: -Oh, you were running run-flats? -Yeah.
points.zh: -你用的是防爆胎？ -对

points.en: -Here's our friend Lotus. -Yes.
points.zh: -我们的老朋友莲花来了 -没错

points.en: He gave me the finger.
points.zh: 他朝我竖中指

points.en: Oh well.
points.zh: 行吧

points.en: How many laps have you done today?

points.en: -My total now, I think it must be 16. -Today?
points.zh: -我总共跑了大概16圈 -今天吗？

points.en: -Today I've done, yeah, about 8 or 9. -Nice.
points.zh: -今天我跑了大概8、9圈 -不错

points.en: Including the ones with you.
points.zh: 包括和你一起跑的

points.en: So do you start like loving this place, or hating, or...
points.zh: 那你开始喜欢这里，还是讨厌，还是...

points.en: -I'm loving, I'm starting to love it. -Okay.
points.zh: -喜欢，我开始喜欢上了 -好的

points.en: But... it's... I just, I'm waiting for all of it to lock in.
points.zh: 但... 我在等所有路线在脑中定型

points.en: And it's the last, the last third,
points.zh: 特别是最后的三分之一

points.en: there's some of the really fast stuff.
points.zh: 全是超高速的路段

points.en: And this section from about here to the end.
points.zh: 从这里到终点这一段

points.en: -Should I tell you... -Yeah, talk me through these few corners.
points.zh: -要我说说吗... -好，把这几个弯给我讲讲

points.en: Okay, so you stay left.
points.zh: 好，保持在左边

points.en: In the compression, you go on the brakes.
points.zh: 压缩阶段就踩刹车

points.en: Let go, turn in, close to the curb.
points.zh: 松开，入弯，紧贴路肩

points.en: Here you can go flat to the outside.
points.zh: 这里能全油门向外走

points.en: You need to know the track because you can then run wide.
points.zh: 得熟赛道才行，因为路线可以走得很宽

points.en: Go here. Brakes. Turn in.
points.zh: 到这里 刹车 入弯

points.en: To the curb. And look downhill left already.
points.zh: 贴路肩 提前看向下坡左方

points.en: Because you're going in one steering movement left.
points.zh: 因为你要一气呵成地往左打方向

points.en: On the brakes. Let go. Turn in. Close to the curb.
points.zh: 踩刹车 松开 然后入弯 贴近路肩

points.en: You can run very wide. Transition back.
points.zh: 可以走很宽 再过渡回来

points.en: On the brakes and I like to look into the barrier
points.zh: 刹车时我喜欢盯着护栏看

points.en: because once it opens up, you go...
points.zh: 因为一旦视野开阔了，就能...

points.en: -You got more space here. -Yes.
points.zh: -这里空间更多了 -对

points.en: Back to the right side, staying right before the compression
points.zh: 回到右侧 在压缩区前保持在右边

points.en: on the brake and shortly after turning in.
points.zh: 刹车，紧接着入弯

points.en: Close to the curb and you can run very wide over the curb.
points.zh: 贴着路肩，还能轻松越过路肩跑得很宽

points.en: But I want to save our potentially flat tire
points.zh: 但我得省着点，胎万一已经瘪了

points.en: from any damage, any more damage.
points.zh: 可不能再添新伤了

points.en: Straight to 169, flat, flat, flat.
points.zh: 对准169牌子，油门到底

points.en: Left curb, right curb, left curb in a straight line.
points.zh: 左路肩，右路肩，左路肩，走一条直线

points.en: So we're going straight.
points.zh: 现在我们直行

points.en: And then tap the brake, let go, brake again, let go, turn in.
points.zh: 然后点刹，松开，再刹，松开，转向

points.en: -So you tap it before the brow? -Yes. Yeah.
points.zh: -是在坡顶前点一下？ -对 没错

points.en: Right curb, middle.
points.zh: 右路肩，中间

points.en: Here you transition to the left curb stone
points.zh: 这里过渡到左侧路缘石

points.en: and you aim for the outside right and you look already left.
points.zh: 瞄准外侧右方，提前看向左侧

points.en: Then to the left curb stone and stay left.
points.zh: 然后到左侧路缘石，一直保持靠左

points.en: Here's a flag, 176, turn in to the right curb.
points.zh: 在176旗子这里，转向右路肩

points.en: -You hold it still? -Yeah.
points.zh: -保持住油门？ -对

points.en: -Yeah, you can lift a bit just to stabilize the front. -Yeah.
points.zh: -对，稍微松点油门稳定一下前轴 -嗯

points.en: But from here it's usually all flat, flat, flat.
points.zh: 但从这里开始基本一直全油门

points.en: So, you keep it flat, flat, flat.
points.zh: 所以你就一直全油门到底

points.en: Fast car behind us, so we'll let it pass. Fly little fella.
points.zh: 后面有快车，我们让让路 飞去吧小家伙

points.en: Orange barrier, brakes in a straight line.
points.zh: 橙色护栏这里刹车，走直线

points.en: Let go, turn in, flat. Right curb stone. Staying right.
points.zh: 松油，入弯，全油 右侧路缘石 靠右走

points.en: Brake, let go late, turn in close to the curb,
points.zh: 刹车 晚点松，靠近路肩入弯

points.en: running wide to the right.
points.zh: 向右边走宽点

points.en: And you see black marks on the curb stone? Kind of here?
points.zh: 看到路缘石上的黑印了吗？大概这儿

points.en: That's brake. And end of the mark, turn.
points.zh: 那就是刹车点 痕迹尽头开始转向

points.en: Close to the curb, close to the curb.
points.zh: 贴紧路肩，贴紧路肩

points.en: -Quite late turn actually, to make it smooth, isn't it? -The what?
points.zh: -其实进弯挺晚的，这样才顺滑？ -什么？

points.en: It's a late turn in there, I see. Later than you would think.
points.zh: 那里进弯挺晚的 比预想中还晚

points.en: Yes. Yeah. Left side.
points.zh: 对啊 左边

points.en: So at the graffiti, tap on the brake,
points.zh: 在涂鸦这里，轻点刹车

points.en: let go before the end of the curb, turn.
points.zh: 在路肩尽头前松开，转向

points.en: Aim for the 186, the fence, where the toilet is.
points.zh: 瞄准186，那片护栏，就是厕所位置

points.en: Sometimes lift, smoothly on the gas,
points.zh: 有时候轻抬，平顺给油

points.en: to the curb, flat on the gas to the outside.
points.zh: 到路肩处，全油门冲向外侧

points.en: So flat, flat, flat.
points.zh: 全油门到底

points.en: And that's it. Kind of. Plus minus.
points.zh: 基本就这样了 差不多

points.en: Solid bits. Solid. Thank you.

points.en: You're welcome.
points.zh: 不客气

points.en: Oh, we've gotten more range.
points.zh: 哦，剩余里程增加了

points.en: Because when we were going through the straight,
points.zh: 因为之前过大直道的时候

points.en: we only had 30 kilometers of range,

points.en: but because we started driving not that fast, we are good.

points.en: Okay.

points.en: -It's pretty good. -But... Are the brakes stock?

points.en: It's got... No, so it's got upgraded brakes, which works well,

points.en: because that's the first thing you think of.

points.en: And the suspension's been... been tinkered with as well.

points.en: It works pretty well. It's got interesting...

points.en: -it's got quite a sharp turn-in in the lower speed corners. -Nice.
points.zh: -它在低速弯转向特别锐利 -不错

points.en: I'd be interested to see what you think, if we get time.

points.en: Yeah, we can try.
points.zh: 行，可以试试

points.en: Yeah, let's see where we can find ourselves a space.

points.en: That was great.

points.en: These are murder with the noise cancelling.

points.en: -You're joking? -Yeah.
points.zh: -开玩笑吧 -真的

points.en: -Alright. I'll put this on you real quick. -Yeah, sure thing.
points.zh: -好吧 帮我拿一下这个 -行，没问题

points.en: Yeah, it felt really like...
points.zh: 感觉真的像是...

points.en: Yes, I thought it went gooey.

points.en: Yeah, maybe it's like, it's just like very old. How does it look like?

points.en: -How does it look like? Is it like... -Dead.

points.en: -Dead? -Yeah.
points.zh: -没了 -对

points.en: Okay, that's it.

points.en: Done and dead.

points.en: Yeah. Okay. No, that's fine. Then I'm not that stupid.

points.en: This is possible flat, but...

points.en: No, please no.

points.en: Bye.
points.zh: 拜拜

points.en: And hello.

points.en: So, this car was parked at TF car park,

points.en: and I said this was, for me, probably the best car
points.zh: 我当时就说，这可能是整个开幕周末

points.en: at the opening weekend of the Nürburgring,
points.zh: 纽博格林最棒的一台车了

points.en: because it's something different than another BMW,
points.zh: 因为它跟千篇一律的宝马不一样

points.en: that we, I think 40% of my videos are BMWs,

points.en: which means that BMW just works on track.

points.en: You shouldn't change the winning formula,

points.en: but for you, audience, it might get boring.
points.zh: 但对你们观众来说，可能就腻了

points.en: And this is something we definitely have not had before.
points.zh: 而这台车子，我们绝对是头一回拍

points.en: So, what is that?

points.en: -So, there was the GT5 Turbo. -Yeah.
points.zh: -之前有过GT5 Turbo -嗯

points.en: And for 2 years, because of emissions regulations and what not,

points.en: or the GT Turbo was mostly just made for the Cup,

points.en: the Renault 5 Cup. I don't know if you've heard.
points.zh: 雷诺5统规赛 不知道你听说过没有

points.en: Yeah, yeah, yeah. Like the predecessor of Renault Clio Cup, basically.
points.zh: 嗯嗯 差不多就是雷诺Clio杯的前身

points.en: Yeah, like the first ever worldwide closed-car cup series.

points.en: And, well, they made the GTE for two, two and a half years,

points.en: stuck some engine they had left lying around.

points.en: And it's a bit heavier, it's a bit less powerful,

points.en: but it did something.

points.en: Yeah.

points.en: It works.

points.en: Power-wise, I actually don't know.

points.en: Okay, that's good.
points.zh: 行吧，挺好的

points.en: Yeah.

points.en: But the engine is shit and it's starting to die.

points.en: Okay, good to know.

points.en: Oh, no, it won't go.

points.en: It's like derived from a diesel blocks,

points.en: so heavy iron lump of...

points.en: It has cams, it has a different throttle body.

points.en: It has a chip.
points.zh: 刷了程序

points.en: -Nice. Can we look at it? -Yeah.
points.zh: -好 能看看吗？ -可以啊

points.en: It's chippable because now it has EEPROM.
points.zh: 能刷程序因为有了EEPROM芯片

points.en: Oh, nice.

points.en: Modern.
points.zh: 很现代

points.en: It looks...
points.zh: 它看起来

points.en: So, it's supposed to make 110 to 120.
points.zh: 理论上应该有110到120匹

points.en: Okay.
points.zh: 好的

points.en: But it's not.
points.zh: 实际没到

points.en: I would guess it's at around 100.

points.en: Yeah.

points.en: And it has some cylinder head valve, maybe injectors,

points.en: like above 6,000, the power really dies off.

points.en: Okay.

points.en: I mean, it still goes, but...

points.en: So, shift at 6,000-ish or before.

points.en: Sort of.

points.en: Bottle of oil to be always safe. Very nice.

points.en: It has different cooling.

points.en: The oil cooler goes from...

points.en: Yeah, I can see that. That's a big one. Yeah.
points.zh: 嗯，我看到了 那个挺大的吧

points.en: And like goes from fog light to fog light.
points.zh: 从一边雾灯贯穿到另一边雾灯

points.en: Very good.

points.en: But to be honest, this car is not about power.
points.zh: 说实话，这车拼的也不是不是动力

points.en: Yeah.

points.en: It's about having fun.
points.zh: 主打的就是乐趣

points.en: Of course. Of course. What's the weight, roughly?
points.zh: 当然了 当然了 车重大概多少？
850公斤

points.en: Wow. That should be good fun.
points.zh: 哇，那肯定很好玩

points.en: Definitely. Definitely.
points.zh: 必须的 必须的

points.en: It looks nice and clean.
points.zh: 挺干净利落的

points.en: It looks very, very nice.
points.zh: 看起来非常不错

points.en: Sort of.

points.zh: 我给你看过了，几天前我刚把它拆过

points.en: So...

points.en: Nice.

points.en: Usually I'm really like skeptical about big horsepower kits,

points.en: but here the modularity is good, even though I have everything

points.en: on maximum for all the 15-year-olds that otherwise gonna complain

points.en: that, "Oh, your gearbox is not set in maximum setting,"

points.en: because then you're not in control, but in this case it works.

points.en: So the engine setup, the modularity is there.

points.en: I would probably still prefer to drive it maybe
points.zh: 我个人还是更倾向于

points.en: in Sport, maybe even in Comfort, depends.

points.en: But this works.
points.zh: 但这套设置确实可行

points.en: What I am unhappy about: the lowering springs

points.en: on the stock suspension, they don't really work,

points.en: but the honest...

points.en: It's annoying rubbing noise,

points.en: but it was there before we started already.

points.en: The honest take: it works better

points.en: than I usually experience on a fully stock car

points.en: with the lowering springs. So either with the extra wing,

points.en: it really helps to settle the whole thing a bit.

points.en: Max Verstappen finally had his GT3 debut on the Nürburgring
points.zh: Max Verstappen终于完成了纽博格林GT3首秀

points.en: by completely dominating the race and also winning.
points.zh: 他完全主宰了比赛，拿下了冠军

points.en: To be honest, at this point, the majority of motorsport world
points.zh: 说实话，到现在为止，大半个赛车圈

points.en: and car world and everyone have written about it,
points.zh: 乃至车圈，几乎所有人都在讨论

points.en: shown some pictures and videos,
points.zh: 图片视频满天飞

points.en: and it's making absolute buzz around the car world.
points.zh: 真的在整个车圈都掀起了轩然大波

points.en: So today, I would like to actually look at the bigger picture.
points.zh: 所以，我想从一个更宏观的视角来聊聊

points.en: Because, in my opinion, what has happened so far,
points.zh: 因为在我看来，目前发生的一切

points.en: and if this continues to happen,
points.zh: 如果继续发展下去

points.en: we will probably classify the pre-Verstappen Nürburgring era
points.zh: 未来会把纽博格林划分为前维斯塔潘时代

points.en: and the post-Verstappen Nürburgring era.
points.zh: 和后维斯塔潘时代了

points.en: And in my opinion, we had already these key moments in the past,
points.zh: 在我看来，过去也出现过几个这样的关键节点

points.en: such as, for example, Sabine Schmitz doing a lap in a Transit van
points.zh: 比如Sabine Schmitz开着台全顺货车跑了一圈

points.en: in Top Gear, because before that episode aired,
points.zh: 因为，在那期Top Gear播出之前

points.en: you could actually stop on the Nürburgring while doing a lap,
points.zh: 你甚至可以在纽博格林跑圈中途停下来

points.en: take some pictures, selfies were not really a thing
points.zh: 拍拍照片，那个年代自拍还不太流行

points.en: back then in the '90s, and continue with your lap.
points.zh: 毕竟是90年代，拍完然后继续跑圈

points.en: Then, the popularity exploded.
points.zh: 在那之后人气就爆棚了

points.en: Then about a decade or so ago, social media contributed again
points.zh: 大约在十年前，社交媒体的兴起又推动了一波

points.en: to a massive rise in popularity of the Nürburgring.
points.zh: 纽博格林的人气再一次地飙升

points.en: From crash videos, to vlogs,
points.zh: 从撞车视频到vlog

points.en: and to also onboard videos between different channels,
points.zh: 再到各个频道发布的各种车载视频

points.en: it sparked the excitement for the Nürburgring
points.zh: 这些都激发了年轻一代观众

points.en: among more of the younger audience.
points.zh: 他们对于纽博格林的热情

points.en: And now we have Formula 1, four time Formula 1 champion
points.zh: 而现在，有了一位F1，是F1四冠王

points.en: that is deciding to kind of on his free time,
points.zh: 选择在他的闲暇之余

points.en: while recently becoming a dad,
points.zh: 他刚当上爸爸不久

points.en: step out of Formula 1 craziness and pursue his dream of racing
points.zh: 暂时从F1的疯狂抽身出来，来到德国森林深处

points.en: somewhere in the woods in Germany.
points.zh: 追逐他的赛车梦想

points.en: And this is going to have massive effect to the Nürburgring,
points.zh: 这件事对纽博格林的影响将是巨大的

points.en: which is my channel mostly is about, but also a lot of
points.zh: 我的频道主要就是纽博格林，除此之外

points.en: other interesting things have happened during the race weekend.
points.zh: 在比赛周末也发生了很多其他有趣的事情

points.en: So, first, a quick flashback.
points.zh: 首先，快速回顾一下

points.en: Earlier this year, Franz Hermann, basically Max under his secret name,
points.zh: 今年早些时候，化名Franz Hermann的Max

points.en: decided to enter one of the NLS Nürburgring Endurance Series tests
points.zh: 决定来参加一场NLS纽博格林耐力系列赛的测试

points.en: with his Ferrari GT3.
points.zh: 开着他的法拉利GT3

points.en: And, he actually unofficially broke the lap record back then.
points.zh: 而且，他当时非正式地打破了圈速记录

points.en: Why unofficially?
points.zh: 为什么说非正式？

points.en: Because it was simply tests, there were no official timing.
points.zh: 因为那只是测试，并没有官方计时

points.en: So, we could only say from what we have seen,
points.zh: 所以我们只能根据看到的情况来说

points.en: either by clocking him, or him internally, externally
points.zh: 给他掐表，或者他自己私下或公开地

points.en: sharing his lap times with other people,
points.zh: 和别人分享了他的圈速

points.en: something that he has made public much more later after the test.
points.zh: 这是他在测试结束很久之后才公开的

points.en: Then more importantly, two weeks ago,
points.zh: 更重要的是，两周前

points.en: it was finally time for him to officially race at the Nürburgring.
points.zh: 他终于迎来了在纽博格林的正式比赛

points.en: Now, to race the Nürburgring Endurance Series,
points.zh: 要知道，参加纽博格林耐力系列赛

points.en: you need to get so-called Nordschleife permit.
points.zh: 你必须先拿到所谓的纽北执照

points.en: And for that you need to qualify, you need to fulfil
points.zh: 为了这个执照，你需要通过资格认证

points.en: a certain amount of laps, finish within a certain percentage
points.zh: 完成一定的圈数，完赛成绩达到所在组别

points.en: of your racing class before they will allow you to race the GT3 races.
points.zh: 一个规定的百分比，才能获准参加GT3的比赛

points.en: The coolest thing about it is that Max was absolutely humble
points.zh: 最酷的是，Max真的非常谦逊

points.en: and he said, "Rules are rules.
points.zh: 他说“规矩就是规矩”

points.en: Doesn't matter if I'm a F1 world champion.
points.zh: “不管我是不是F1世界冠军”

points.en: I'm still going to do that."
points.zh: “我照样会遵守”

points.en: And this is great.
points.zh: 这真的很棒

points.en: And this humbleness showed also throughout
points.zh: 而且这种谦逊的态度也贯穿了

points.en: this last race weekend of him,
points.zh: 他上个比赛周末的始终

points.en: for which I really want to commend him and also his whole race team.
points.zh: 我真心想给他，还有他的整个车队点赞

points.en: I find it, however, also very important for Max
points.zh: 不过，这对Max自己也很重要

points.en: to compete these laps in a slower car.
points.zh: 先用慢车来完成这些圈数

points.en: The reason for that, because he gets to drive later in a GT3 race car.
points.zh: 原因在于，他之后要开的是GT3赛车

points.en: Keep racing to the track's speed, people, not on public roads.
points.zh: 要拼速度请上赛道，公共道路可别这么干

points.en: This is douchey.
points.zh: 太讨厌了

points.en: As of now, he has gotten to drive already in a very fast car,
points.zh: 哪怕到现在，他已经开上了非常快的车了

points.en: but the beauty of the Nürburgring Endurance series
points.zh: 但纽博格林耐力系列赛的魅力在于

points.en: is that it's a multi-class racing.
points.zh: 它是个多组别混跑的比赛

points.en: You have GT3 cars, and you have also slower cars,
points.zh: 既有GT3赛车，也有慢得多的车子

points.en: like Dacia or Twingo, maybe in the future,
points.zh: 像达契亚、Twingo，还有思域

points.en: maybe Civic in the future, and everything in between,
points.zh: 未来可能吧，这个区间里面的各种车型

points.en: such as like BMWs M2s, Caymans, classic cars sometimes as well.
points.zh: 比如宝马M2、Cayman，偶尔还有经典老车

points.en: And to show the people, the pro drivers,
points.zh: 让车手，让职业车手去感受

points.en: what the speed difference is, it's good for them
points.zh: 速度差异有多大，就很有必要

points.en: to do a couple of laps in a slow car
points.zh: 让他们开着慢车跑几圈

points.en: while they getting passed by a GT3 car
points.zh: 当他们被GT3赛车超车时

points.en: so they know how it feels later for other participants
points.zh: 就能体会到，他们自己驾驶快车里时

points.en: when they're sitting in a fast car.
points.zh: 其他参赛者的感受了

points.en: Anyway, after passing his Nürburgring exam,
points.zh: 总之，通过了纽博格林考核之后

points.en: together with Christopher Lulham, his teammate
points.zh: 他和队友Christopher Lulham

points.en: from Verstappen.com Racing for Emil Frey Racing,
points.zh: Verstappen.com Racing的队友，代表Emil Frey Racing

points.en: they were able to participate, compete,
points.zh: 他们得以参赛、竞技

points.en: and dominate last weekend's race in a GT3 in a Ferrari 296 GT3.
points.zh: 并在上周末驾驶法拉利296 GT3统治了比赛

points.en: Now, a short recap what has happened.
points.zh: 现在简单回顾下赛况

points.en: Qualifying went already, or let's say started already
points.zh: 从排位赛，排位赛的一开始

points.en: quite mind-blowingly impressive
points.zh: 就相当让人惊艳了

points.en: when he put everywhere purple sectors. He was dominating.
points.zh: 他所有计时段都刷紫了 统治级的表现

points.en: But it was wet. Later when the track dried out,
points.zh: 但当时是湿地 后来赛道变干了

points.en: other people managed to set more faster lap time that he had done.
points.zh: 其他人做出了比他更快的圈速

points.en: And he couldn't do it because he had bad traffic.
points.zh: 而他遇上了慢车，没能再刷新圈速

points.en: And, otherwise it would have been quite interesting.
points.zh: 不然的话，结果会相当有意思

points.en: So, maybe not... What's it called, hat-trick?
points.zh: 错失了... 是不是叫帽子戏法？

points.en: If you would have the fastest lap, pole,
points.zh: 如果能包揽最快圈、杆位

points.en: and leading the whole of the race,
points.zh: 并且还全程领跑

points.en: what they had done and also winning.
points.zh: 确实全程领跑了，赢下比赛

points.en: This didn't happen,
points.zh: 虽然没达成

points.en: but I guess it gives them a taste to come back for more.
points.zh: 但我猜这给了他们一个回来挑战的理由

points.en: Regardless, once the race had started,
points.zh: 无论如何，比赛一开始

points.en: immediately after the first corner,
points.zh: 刚刚过了第一个弯

points.en: Max overtook P2 and P1 and became P1 himself.
points.zh: Max就超越了P2和P1，开始领跑

points.en: And, by the end of his double stint,
points.zh: 在他连续跑了两个stint

points.en: after two hours of the four hour race,
points.zh: 四小时比赛中的两个小时

points.en: You could be unlucky with conditions, with fluid spills,
points.zh: 你可能遇上天气不佳、油液泄漏

points.en: with slower cars blocking you, crashing into you.

points.en: There is so much more that can happen during N24.

points.en: So, yeah, pace wise, he can definitely win it,

points.en: but there's a lot of luck and gamble on N24.
points.zh: 不过N24挺看运气的，有赌博的成分

points.zh: 我们拭目以待明年他会不会参赛

points.en: where also Jimmy and Steve, Manuel and myself

points.zh: 代表Black Falcon的Bilstein车队 驾驶M4 GT4参赛

points.zh: 我们就决定好了，不会参加那两场比赛

points.en: and making this video for you, enjoying.
points.zh: 给大家录制视频，享受生活

points.zh: 我们会去 不确定Max还会不会来

points.zh: 我觉得不会，因为有时间冲突

points.en: He will definitely not be there because, as far as I know,

points.en: and who knows, maybe even N24. So looking forward to that.

points.zh: 好了，感谢观看 下次见，拜拜

points.zh: 我们在2018年做过一次

points.en: first time with Kévin, handheld GoPro for a passenger lap.

points.en: Good vibes.

points.en: But you were too late on bookings all the time.
points.zh: 但你总是预订得太晚了

points.en: Yeah, well...

points.zh: 这次你应该是P4

points.en: P4, yeah, just missed the podium.
points.zh: P4，就差一点上领奖台

points.en: Once a year or so, Kévin does a fantastic thing,
points.zh: 每年Kévin会做一件了不起的事

points.en: Yeah, that's my French so far.

points.en: Good French accent.

points.en: Where you raises money for children by doing taxi laps,
points.zh: 你通过载客跑圈为小孩子们筹款

points.en: which is a fantastic thing.
points.zh: 真的非常了不起

points.en: And additionally, also selling some merchandise.
points.zh: 另外，这里还贩售一些周边

points.zh: 我买了这个小头盔，太酷了

points.en: And the key thing is, is that you post them on Instagram
points.zh: 关键是， 你在Instagram上发布后

points.en: and then, within 10 minutes or so, the laps get sold out.
points.zh: 10分钟左右  跑圈名额就卖光了

points.en: So, I was happy that, now, finally, I managed within 7 minutes
points.zh: 很高兴这次我终于能在7分钟之内回复说

points.en: to reply, to say like, I want one and here we are.
points.zh: 我想要一个，现在我们来了

points.en: GT3 RS, not MR, it's not out yet.
points.zh: GT3 RS，MR还没出

points.en: So maybe for next year, we'll try to get one more lap as well.
points.zh: 所以明年我们也许会试着再来一圈

points.en: 525 horsepower, very fast, very fast, lots of downforce, etc, etc.
points.zh: 525马力，非常非常快，超大下压力等等

points.en: It was very nice to have a lap with you. So it was amazing.
points.zh: 和你跑圈真的太棒了 真的很神奇

points.en: I was extra happy to hear that you are also hating the new  Foxhole exit. So...
points.zh: 我特别高兴听到 你也讨厌狐狸洞的新出口

points.en: Had a moment there, actually. It was the only moment from the day.
points.zh: 是有一点小状况 也算是今天唯一的小插曲了

points.en: Yeah.
points.zh: 好吧

points.en: to make sure you don't clip the kerb and then very easy to lose the car.
points.zh: 要确保不会蹭到路肩，不然车子容易失控

points.en: You want to stay to the left to prepare the next right.
points.zh: 要保持在左边为下个右弯做准备

points.en: So, it's really not an easy corner,
points.zh: 这个弯真挺不容易的

points.en: and it changed a bit the flow, and especially this year,
points.zh: 而且稍微打乱了节奏，尤其是今年

points.en: as it's the first year, you really have to think when you come in,
points.zh: 因为是第一年，进来的时候必须要多想一想

points.en: "OK, don't turn in, wait a little bit."
points.zh: “先不要转，等一小会儿”

points.en: So yeah, not an easy corner.
points.zh: 所以确实挺不容易

points.en: Yeah, it was not a close call. It was just Kévin Estre things, right?
points.zh: 没啥惊险的 只是Kévin Estre日常操作吧

points.en: Not a close call, but a bit of oversteer on entry.
points.zh: 不算惊险 就进弯时一点转向过度

points.en: A bit of, yeah... A bit of fun. A bit of fun.
points.zh: 嗯，一点点刺激 一点点乐趣

points.en: Does this feel slow compared to an LMDH car?
points.zh: 这车和LMDH比，你觉得慢吗？

points.en: I mean, it's very fast for a street car,
points.zh: 对于街车来说非常快了

points.en: but compared to an LMDH, which was the car I was in for the last 3 days,
points.zh: 但是和我过去三天都在开的LMDH相比

points.en: was... is definitely quite a bit slower.
points.zh: 肯定还是要慢不少的

points.en: But for a street car,
points.zh: 但对街车来说

points.en: the amount of mechanical grip and downforce this car has is amazing.
points.zh: 这辆车的机械抓地力和下压力都是惊人的

points.en: And it's nice how you can actually still make it rotate and dance.
points.zh: 它还能那样旋转，舞动，真的很棒

points.en: It rotates. I mean, I don't know.
points.zh: 旋转很棒 谁知道呢

points.en: I mean, Manthey just measured the car yesterday,
points.zh: Manthey昨天刚刚测量了车子

points.en: got the car yesterday, measured the car.
points.zh: 昨天才拿到车，做了测量

points.en: We put new tyres and here we go.
points.zh: 换了新胎就直接出发了

points.en: And the car was really enjoyable to drive.
points.zh: 然后车子开起来真的很享受

points.en: You could really place it on the trail brake,
points.zh: 真可以在循迹刹车时控制它

points.en: come off the brake, the car would continue to rotate and floor it.
points.zh: 松开刹车，车会继续旋转，然后全油

points.en: So I really enjoy the balance.
points.zh: 我很享受这种平衡

points.en: It was a lot of fun.
points.zh: 非常有乐趣

points.en: Yeah, it was very good,
points.zh: 是的，非常好

points.en: because it was a nice combination of downforce and playfulness in low speed corners.
points.zh: 因为它既有下压力，又兼顾了低速弯里的灵活性

points.en: It was very nice.
points.zh: 真的很棒

points.en: What's your favorite part about the GT3 RS?
points.zh: 你最喜欢GT3 RS的哪一点？

points.en: The downforce.
points.zh: 下压力

points.en: For a street car, the downforce is just amazing.
points.zh: 对街车而言，它的下压力太美妙了

points.en: To drive over 230...
points.zh: 开到230以上...

points.en: I think 235 in Schwedenkreuz with a passenger
points.zh: 在瑞典十字带着乘客开到235

points.en: with a street car is quite something.
points.zh: 对于街车相当了不起

points.en: And the car doesn't move and you feel actually very confident in it.
points.zh: 车子非常稳定，你会对它非常有信心

points.en: So I have to say this is very strong,
points.zh: 不得不说这非常厉害

points.en: and also the mechanical grip
points.zh: 还有它的机械抓地力

points.en: where you... when you finish the trail brake, coming off the brake,
points.zh: 当你完成了循迹刹车，开始松开刹车踏板

points.en: a typical 911 start to understeer.
points.zh: 普通的911开始转向不足

points.en: And these ones with the wishbone and with the way the suspension is built up,
points.zh: 但这个车型凭借着双叉臂还有悬架整体的构造

points.en: the kinematic, the car just continue to rotate,
points.zh: 它的运动学特性让车子持续旋转

points.en: which helps you to carry some speed.
points.zh: 这有助于维持一些速度

points.en: So these two features are really cool.
points.zh: 所以这两个特性真的很酷

points.en: Yeah, that's very nice.
points.zh: 是啊，非常棒

points.zh: 什么时候能再见到你开街车冲击圈速记录？

points.zh: 没接到Manthey的通知呢 可能吧

points.en: we'll see. We'll see.
points.zh: 再说吧 再说吧

points.en: But no, I enjoy. I enjoy a lot.
points.zh: 我很享受 真的很享受

points.en: But these hot laps are fun,
points.zh: 这些快圈很有趣

points.en: and the record laps are on another level.
points.zh: 但要刷记录就是另一个层次了

points.en: That's proper, proper hard work and a lot of adrenaline.
points.zh: 那要付出艰苦的努力 还有很多肾上腺素

points.en: Do you even have time in your agenda to do it?
points.zh: 你时间表里还有空做这个吗？

points.zh: 现在这个时间点是挺棘手的 明年会容易些

points.en: So, as soon as I'm going to be going for Japan in 3 days.
points.zh: 所以我马上又要飞日本了，三天后出发

points.en: What are you looking forward to the most for next year?
points.zh: 明年，你最期待的是什么？

points.zh: 现在才九月，我们就开始聊明年了

points.en: but you have already some plans, I think. So...
points.zh: 但你应该已经有些计划了 所以...

points.en: seven and a half hours of Nürburgring?
points.zh: 纽博格林七个半小时耐力赛？

points.en: Hopefully, 24 Hours of Nürburgring with a win,
points.zh: 希望能赢下纽博格林24小时

points.en: fighting for the win on the Grello again.
points.zh: 再次身披黄绿战袍争夺冠军

points.en: This is the goal definitely for this, on this track.
points.zh: 这绝对是在这条赛道上的目标

points.en: And hopefully, bring a good show for the,

points.en: for the thousands or...

points.en: hundreds of thousands of spectators coming here and looking on TV.
points.zh: 献给成千上万来到现场 还有电视前的观众

points.en: Two last things for the viewers.
points.zh: 最后给观众的两个问题

points.en: We have a lot of young kids watching you being their idol.
points.zh: 有很多年轻小孩都在看你，视你为偶像

points.en: What's the tip you can give them to chase their dreams
points.zh: 能不能给他们一些建议，怎么追梦

points.en: or become a better driver?
points.zh: 或者成为车手？

points.en: Well, you have to, yeah, for sure follow your dream.
points.zh: 首先，你一定要坚持自己的梦想

points.en: Believe in yourself. Keep working.
points.zh: 相信自己 不断努力

points.en: Keep working on every aspect of yourself,
points.zh: 要努力提升自己的方方面面

points.en: on the languages, on whatever, mathematics.
points.zh: 比如语言、数学这些都很重要

points.en: It also helps you to be a better driver at some point, when you speak to an engineer,
points.zh: 这能帮助你未来和工程师沟通更顺畅，让你成为更好的车手

points.en: which I was not great at.
points.zh: 我这方面就不擅长

points.en: And no, yeah, keep working very hard.
points.zh: 没错，要持续不懈地努力

points.en: Finding sponsors, I think that's the hardest part.
points.zh: 去找赞助商，这可能是最难的一环

points.en: That's why the language is very important.
points.zh: 所以语言的能力至关重要

points.en: Being good in marketing, selling yourself and
points.zh: 要擅长营销自己，做好推广

points.en: enjoy while driving, I think.
points.zh: 同时还享受驾驶吧

points.en: Other than that, hope for some luck, getting some fundings and some races.
points.zh: 然后就需要一点运气，能获得资助、还有比赛机会

points.en: That's important. And last final thing.
points.zh: 这很关键 最后一个问题

points.en: What's the most common mistake you see people do
points.zh: 在你看来大家最常犯的错是什么？

points.en: when you go out with them coaching,
points.zh: 因为你也偶尔做做教练

points.en: instructing, because that's also something you do occasionally?
points.zh: 你在指导时，最常看到的错误是什么？

points.en: Most of the time is not using the whole track.
points.zh: 通常就是没有用满赛道宽度

points.en: So entering the corner, not fully, let's say if it's a left corner,
points.zh: 比如说一个左弯，在你入弯的时候

points.en: entering the corner, not fully on the right.
points.zh: 入弯时没有贴到最右边

points.en: And then in the exit, having some space.
points.zh: 出弯的时候留有多余的空间

points.en: You make the corner a lot easier if you,
points.zh: 如果能把赛道宽度吃满

points.en: you know, use the whole width of the track.
points.zh: 你过弯的难度就会小很多

points.en: And most of the time is holding the brake at the end of
points.zh: 很多时候入弯快结束时还在拖刹车

points.en: the entry and you slow down the car.
points.zh: 这样会把速度降太多

points.en: Just, you have to turn the car.
points.zh: 你得让车子转起来

points.en: Give the position... give the direction with the wheel,
points.zh: 用方向盘给出方向

points.en: but turn the car with the brake.
points.zh: 但真正用刹车让车转向

points.en: And this is what you have to learn while trail braking.
points.zh: 这就是你在做循迹刹车时要掌握的

points.en: Yeah. And I think this is something we saw perfectly you do on our lap.
points.zh: 是的 刚刚那圈你把这一点展现得淋漓尽致

points.en: So thank you very much for making this happen. It was amazing.
points.zh: 非常感谢你让这一切成真了 真的太棒了

points.en: Thank you Porsche and Manthey  racing, of course, also for providing fantastic car.
points.zh: 也感谢保时捷和Manthey Racing带来了这么出色的车

points.en: And now enjoy the fantastic masterclass by Kévin Estre
points.zh: 敬请欣赏Kévin Estre带来的大师课

points.en: therefore, because they're luxurious, more luxurious.

It has GiroDisc and which pads for those?

points.en: And when one stripe, like the for the water and noise,

points.en: So very good, very nice.

points.en: Yeah, very nice.

points.en: And I don't know, is there anything else mentioning?

points.en: The standard stuff, so the S280 Turbo Technics turbo.

points.en: -Tuning. -Tuning, yeah.

points.en: Sauce.
points.zh: 秘制配方

points.en: And yeah, the inside of course, we have bucket seats, cage,

points.en: we have shorter shifter by Coolerworx, so it works nicely.

points.en: Rear anti-roll bars as well.

points.en: Yes, and also worth mentioning, the rear axle is a solid beam axle,

points.en: so I think we have some two-wheel action maybe?

points.en: Maybe, maybe one-wheel action.

points.en: Maybe one wheel actually at some point.

points.en: So I'm hoping that we have some nice pictures

points.en: that we will see some of that. And yeah, it was really crazy.

points.en: -So thank you so much for making this happen. -I appreciate it.

points.en: Always happy to drive something unique and out of the box.

points.en: And yeah, Transit,
points.zh: 说到全顺

points.en: I think that name will always be linked to Sabine Schmitz and yeah,
points.zh: 这个名字永远会和Sabine Schmitz联系在一起

points.en: the Transit Challenge. You can definitely do this lap time, well,

points.en: what Clarkson did in this van, even faster.
points.zh: 比Clarkson跑的那圈快得多

points.en: This is actually sub-8 car because we've done like around 8 minutes
points.zh: 其实这车能跑进8分钟，因为我们跑了大概8分钟

points.en: with some traffic and it can be significantly faster,

points.en: especially when you know the car.

points.en: That's plus running mid boost, which wasn't high.
points.zh: 再加上增压还没有调到最高

points.en: but no, it's amazing. Hope you guys enjoyed the lap.

points.en: The only van in Time Attack.

points.en: Just moulded it and plastic welded it,

points.en: and then I did do a flocking job myself, DIY.

points.en: Did look really good when I first done it,

points.en: but sort of now it's worn off

points.en: once we start stripping all the interior out.

points.en: There's still more to come out of it as well.

points.en: Nice, nice, very, very cool. No, amazing, really, really loved it.
points.zh: 不错，非常、非常酷 真的惊艳，我非常喜欢

points.en: Once again, thank you so much. I'm happy we could make it happen.

points.en: a V-Spec, and not just a V-Spec, but with a couple of more mods.

points.en: -So put it all together. -Nice, nice, nice, nice.

points.en: Oh, cold tyres.

points.en: Second gear in here. Long gearing.
points.zh: 这里二挡 齿比太长了

points.en: I don't know what to say.
points.zh: 不知道该说什么了

points.en: I mean, usually I need to be talkative through these laps,
points.zh: 平时跑圈的时候，我都会说个不停

points.en: but it's one of those laps where...
points.zh: 但这一圈真的是...

points.en: The boost is kicking in relatively late, so...
points.zh: 涡轮介入得比较晚 所以...

points.en: Coming after five, so...
points.zh: 要过五千转才...

points.en: With every upshift we're out of the rev range.
points.zh: 每次升档转速都会掉出最佳区间

points.en: So it's...
points.zh: 所以...

points.en: You really need to push it to eight.
points.zh: 必须狠踩到八千转

points.en: Otherwise you're out of rev range for the big turbo.
points.zh: 不然的话，大涡轮就使不上劲

points.en: Understeer.
points.zh: 推头了

points.en: Bit of traffic, so we need to be respectful and responsible with,
points.zh: 有点堵车 我们得注意礼貌和安全

points.en: I don't even want to know what the value of this car is today.
points.zh: 我都不敢想这车现在值多少钱

points.en: The brakes are doing well.
points.zh: 刹车表现不错

points.en: There's a Genesis taxi.
points.zh: 捷尼赛思出租车

points.en: It's scraping a bit. Downshift.
points.zh: 有点刮底 降挡

points.en: The guys behind me in Genesis have some good flames.
points.zh: 后面的捷尼赛思能看到漂亮的火焰

points.en: The suspension is really not that bad.
points.zh: 悬挂其实没那么差

points.en: The brakes are really good.
points.zh: 刹车的表现非常好

points.en: There's a bit of traffic management and the symphony of the RB26 DET
points.zh: 一边超超慢车，一边听着RB26 DET的声浪交响曲

points.en: without the... without the second T because it's been taken out.
points.zh: 没有了... 第二个T，拆掉了一个涡轮

points.en: It's insane.
points.zh: 太疯狂了

points.en: Quick glimpse at the oil temps, 105.
points.zh: 瞥一眼油温 105度

points.en: Really good, I'm impressed.
points.zh: 相当不错 令我印象深刻

points.en: The heat management is phenomenal for such a high horsepower car.
points.zh: 对于这么高马力的车来说，这热管理简直惊人

points.en: I think we're going to have a yellow flag here,
points.zh: 我觉得这里应该会出黄旗

points.en: so we might as well take it easy.
points.zh: 正好我们可以放松一下

points.en: Also don't want to put too much stress on the car.
points.zh: 也不想给车子太大的压力

points.en: Yeah, here's 100.
points.zh: 现在100了

points.en: It's not mph, it's km/h, so...
points.zh: 不是英里是公里每小时 所以...

points.en: we'll take it easy, let the car cool down.
points.zh: 慢慢开 让车降降温

points.en: I'm sweating. Today's like 30 degrees.
points.zh: 汗流浃背了 今天大概30度

points.en: Again, I'm so impressed.
points.zh: 真的让人印象深刻了

points.en: 750 or 850 horsepower car,
points.zh: 750还是850匹的车

points.en: depending on the amount of ethanol in it.
points.zh: 取决于乙醇掺了多少

points.en: Big boost, big turbo, hot day, we're flooring it
points.zh: 高增压、大涡轮、大热天 全程地板油

points.en: and we're just 107 degrees of oil temperature,
points.zh: 然后现在的油温才107度

points.en: 93 of water.
points.zh: 水温93度

points.en: And all the modern cars, you do a bit of chip tuning and also limp mode...
points.zh: 看看现在那些车 稍微刷个程序就不行了，进跛行模式...

points.en: Like it's like insert this dog meme of like you know,
points.zh: 就像那个狗狗表情包 你懂的

points.en: two thousand years ago I killed a pack of wolves
points.zh: 两千年前我手撕狼群

points.en: and ate the liver, and nowadays
points.zh: 生吞肝脏 而现在呢

points.en: like you change my food and I have the diarrhoea for two weeks.
points.zh: 你给我换个狗粮我就拉肚子两星期

points.en: That's basically the equal comparison.
points.zh: 这个对比特别贴切

points.en: So I think we're good because the car stopped there.
points.zh: 看来没问题 因为车在那停下来了

points.en: Yeah, we have no speed limit there.
points.zh: 嗯 那里没有限速了

points.en: There was a car on fire here.
points.zh: 之前这有台车着火了

points.en: You can see earlier today.
points.zh: 今天早些能看到

points.en: R34 coming through.
points.zh: 给R34让让道

points.en: The flames and me sweating.
points.zh: 它在喷火而我汗如雨下

points.en: No photographer there. So sad.
points.zh: 摄影师不在 太可惜了

points.en: My glasses are falling out from the sweat.
points.zh: 汗水太多，眼镜都快掉了

points.en: I'm properly working here.
points.zh: 实打实的锻炼

points.en: Miata? Miata, let me through. Miata.
points.zh: Miata？Miata 让让我 Miata

points.en: You know, funny enough, I think the power steering got a bit hot
points.zh: 说起来好笑 我觉得转向助力有点过热

points.en: because it's... It exited.
points.zh: 因为... 出来了

points.en: So the engine survived.
points.zh: 发动机倒是没事

points.en: This hot pressure, but I think power steering got overheated
points.zh: 这么高的温度，转向助力可能过热了

points.en: because it's like really...
points.zh: 因为这真的...

points.en: Yeah, now it's back again.
points.zh: 嗯，现在又恢复了

points.en: Of all the components.
points.zh: 部件里就它掉链子

points.en: All right, let's take it easy.
points.zh: 好了，我们慢点开

points.en: Oil pressure is still there, so.
points.zh: 油压还是稳的，没问题

points.en: I need a drink.
points.zh: 我得喝口水

points.en: My God.
points.zh: 天呐

points.en: Insane.
points.zh: 太疯狂了

points.en: Alright, do I... Do I really need to tell you how it was.
points.zh: 所以我真的还有必要描述体验如何吗

points.en: Do I need to be a little bitch and be like, yeah, yeah,
points.zh: 真的需要我扭扭捏捏地说 是啊 是啊

points.en: suspension is a bit soft, but...
points.zh: 悬挂是有点软 但是...

points.en: Legendary car, iconic.
points.zh: 传奇车型 经典之作

points.en: It held out the whole lap of the Nürburgring.
points.zh: 完整撑完了一圈纽博格林

points.en: With no overheating.
points.zh: 没有过热

points.en: Just power steering got a bit sad and tired.
points.zh: 就转向助力有点不高兴，累了

points.en: But everything else like phenomenal.
points.zh: 其他没有问题，太出色了

points.en: Let's do parade lap, let's show people what's what.
points.zh: 我来巡游一圈，让大家见识见识

points.en: I think the brakes are also a bit smoking.
points.zh: 刹车好像有点冒烟了

points.en: I can definitely smell them.
points.zh: 都能闻到味道了

points.en: Oh man, I'm sweating like crazy.
points.zh: 老天 我汗如雨下

points.en: Phenomenal.
points.zh: 太出色了

points.en: I'm soaking wet.
points.zh: 全身湿透了

points.en: Good morning everyone! Some Dino Merlin vibes for those who know.
points.zh: 大家早上好，懂的人自然懂的Dino Merlin氛围来一波，

points.en: Today is Tuesday, the 18th of March, and it's actually the second day
points.zh: 今天是3月18日星期二，实际上已经是第二天了

points.en: that the track is open for industry pool. This means that the manufacturers,
points.zh: 赛道对行业测试池开放的日子，这意味着各大厂商

points.en: all the kinds of BMW, Mercedes, Porsche, you name it,
points.zh: 像是宝马、奔驰、保时捷这些品牌

points.en: get to play and test the latest prototypes on the Nürburgring Nordschleife.
points.zh: 都可以在纽博格林北环试驾和测试最新原型车

points.en: So, let's hop out a car and see what kind of interesting cars
points.zh: 咱们赶紧下车看看今天能遇到哪些有意思的车

points.en: we might be able to spot today. I really need to wash it.
points.zh: 这台车真该洗了

points.en: Supra... I wonder if we're gonna get a Supra with a S58 engine
points.zh: Supra...不知道会不会看到搭载S58引擎的Supra

points.en: Because the car has been around since 2019, so I guess the new model,
points.zh: 毕竟这车从2019年就存在了，估计新款

points.en: if it's coming, will be coming soon.
points.zh: 要是推出的话应该快了

points.en: All right. Let's see what we're gonna see today.
points.zh: 好吧 看看今天能有什么发现

points.en: Oh yeah, big send in this Škoda.
points.zh: 嚯，这斯柯达冲得真猛

points.en: I wonder if he flashed me because it was someone I know.
points.zh: 它在闪灯是不是因为认识我啊

points.en: Has an L on the back and it's not a big L.
points.zh: 车尾贴着L标，不过不是很大

points.en: It means that he's getting his industry pool licence.
points.zh: 说明他正在考行业测试池驾照

points.en: It's something that I hope I'll be able to get over at some future,
points.zh: 希望我将来有机会也能拿到这个证

points.en: just to be able to do it.
points.zh: 多一种可能嘛

points.en: Also L on the back. It makes sense because today is the first week—
points.zh: 车尾也带L标，毕竟这是今年行业测试池

points.en: or like this week is the first week. Today is Tuesday.
points.zh: 开放的第一周，今天还是周二

points.en: So lots of drivers are actually getting their licences for this year's industry pool sessions.
points.zh: 所以很多车手都在考今年的测试池驾照

points.en: Another FK—what is it? 8? 7?
points.zh: 又是FK，是8还是7？

points.en: I'm so bad with my Hondas. I just know that they overheat.
points.zh: 对本田车型真的不熟，就知道它们容易过热

points.en: Oh, hello. Alpina and another Alpina.
points.zh: 快看，两台阿尔宾娜

points.en: Because the licence plate OAL—that's where Alpinas are registered.
points.zh: 车牌OAL开头，阿尔宾娜专用注册地

points.en: Mercedes.
points.zh: 奔驰来了

points.en: Followed by more BMWs. A trey... Holy. Cannoli.
points.zh: 后面跟着更多宝马，三个... 我的天

points.en: Yeah.
points.zh: 好吧

points.en: The Lambo team is outplaying as well. STO and Revuelto.

points.en: Actually doesn't sound too bad.
