points.en: Now from the supercars or sports cars,
points.zh: 现在说到超跑和性能车

points.en: I think the biggest exciting car of the year will be the GT2 RS.
points.zh: 今年最让期待的车型应该是GT2 RS

points.en: I believe Porsche has unofficially announced it last week by saying that
points.zh: 保时捷上周非正式宣布

points.en: the 911 is going to get a new flagship model.
points.zh: 911即将推出新旗舰车型

points.en: I mean, they already have the Turbo, the Turbo S, and GT3 RS for the 992.
points.zh: 毕竟992现在有Turbo、Turbo S和GT3 RS

points.en: So I guess it needs to be the GT2 RS.
points.zh: 所以应该就是GT2 RS了

points.en: We'll see what that's going to be.
points.zh: 拭目以待吧

points.en: Just hope that the potential hybrid system is not going to make it too heavy.
points.zh: 希望混动系统别让车重增加太多

points.en: I'm sure Porsche Engineering will be able to...
points.zh: 相信保时捷工程团队肯定能...

points.en: Oh that's a big send.
points.zh: 这推得挺猛的

points.en: They'll be able to compensate for that.
points.zh: 他们肯定能平衡好的

points.en: Lots and lots of cars today. I wonder what I've missed.
points.zh: 今天车真多，不知道有没有漏看什么

points.en: So quick reminder: if you ever come to the Nürburgring and look at the track opening times,
points.zh: 顺便提醒下，来纽博格林要注意赛道开放时间

points.en: if it's open from 5:15, that means that there is no industry pool.
points.zh: 如果5:15开放说明没有行业测试池

points.en: And if it's 5:30, then it means that there is industry pool.
points.zh: 5:30开放就是有行业测试池

points.en: And this is why the track is open 15 minutes later.
points.zh: 所以赛道会晚开放15分钟

points.en: What else we gonna see?
points.zh: 还能看到啥

points.en: Oh, Black Series.
points.zh: 哇，Black Series

points.en: Hello there.
points.zh: 看

points.en: With the big L sticker on the back.
points.zh: 车尾贴着超大L标

points.en: And a big wing for the GT86.
points.zh: GT86装了个大尾翼

points.en: But that's a cool car to do your industry pool permit in.
points.zh: 开这车考测试池执照还挺酷

points.en: i20 N.
points.zh: 是i20 N

points.en: Oh no, no, no, no, no. I'm sorry that's an i30 N Fastback.
points.zh: 不不不，看错了是i30N溜背

points.en: Fastback, right? That's the correct name.
points.zh: 溜背版对吧，这才是正确叫法

points.en: Another... Well speaking of Hyundai.
points.zh: 既然说到了现代

points.en: IONIQ 6N should be released this year as far as I know.
points.zh: IONIQ 6N今年应该会发布

points.en: And that should be a very exciting car.
points.zh: 那台车绝对值得期待
M4吗？

points.en: M4 LCI.
points.zh: M4中期改款

points.en: Not sure if it was the CS that didn't see the grill properly.
points.zh: 没看清中网，不确定是不是CS版

points.en: And I'm very much looking forward to drive the M3 CS Touring.
points.zh: 我超期待试驾M3 CS旅行版

points.en: And since my M3 CS Touring will be leaving. I need a replacement.
points.zh: 我的M3 CS旅行版要离开了，得找个替代品

points.en: Cool.
points.zh: 有意思

points.en: Audi squad.
points.zh: 奥迪小分队

points.en: RS3 and whatever it's following.
points.zh: RS3和后面跟着的

points.en: So basically a part of the...
points.zh: 培训的一环是...

points.en: Just a Golf.
points.zh: 就是台高尔夫

points.en: Sorry, Polo? Went very wide. Sorry I didn't show it to you.
points.zh: 是Polo吗？刚刚过弯走线好开，可惜没拍到

points.en: Part of the industry pool training—
points.zh: 都是行业测试池培训内容

points.en: you need to do many laps of course. But you also need to do lead and follow,
points.zh: 不仅要刷圈，还要练习带队和跟车

points.en: because you need to show the instructor behind you
points.zh: 因为要让后车的教练看到

points.en: that you know how to drive the 'Ring basically.
points.zh: 你熟悉在纽北怎么驾驶

points.en: That's why quite often the iPool drivers are doing it in pairs.
points.zh: 所以测试池车手经常成对出现

points.en: GR Yaris.
points.zh: GR雅力士

points.en: With the traditional ABS emergency braking lights.
points.zh: 带着经典的ABS紧急制动灯

points.en: Hello. That's actually quite impressive.
points.zh: 看这台，相当带劲啊

points.en: Do we have the new WRX in Europe already?
points.zh: 欧洲已经有新WRX了吗

points.en: I don't even remember.
points.zh: 我都记不清了

points.en: We don't have the STi for sure.
points.zh: STi肯定是没有的

points.en: Big send.
points.zh: 真猛

points.en: Oh, team Lotus. I wonder what kind of cars they will be cooking.
points.zh: 莲花团队，不知道在憋什么大招

points.en: I believe they ditched the full electric route.
points.zh: 听说他们放弃了纯电路线

points.en: Older Cayman.
points.zh: 老款Cayman

points.en: Also L.
points.zh: 也带L标

points.en: More Yaris.
points.zh: 又是雅力士

points.en: Actually from our neighbors Rent4Ring. Neighbors so far,
points.zh: 是我们邻居Rent4Ring的车，暂时还算是邻居

points.en: until we move to the new place hopefully soon.
points.zh: 等我们很快搬了新家就不是了

points.en: The previous GR Yaris.
points.zh: 老款GR雅力士

points.en: A lot more unique than the current one.
points.zh: 比新款的独特多了

points.en: There's the big send Škoda flashing lights again.
points.zh: 那台猛冲的斯柯达又在闪灯了

points.en: The Audi gang.
points.zh: 奥迪帮出动

points.en: We start seeing all the same cars all over again,
points.zh: 开始重复看到同样的车了

points.en: so I'm not sure if we're gonna see anything spectacular because, again,
points.zh: 所以估计今天看不到 什么特别的了

points.en: Do the industry pool to then come back later with actual prototypes and have lots of fun?
points.zh: 先拿证，之后才能带着真家伙回来撒欢

points.en: To be fair, I believe majority of the drivers have quite a boring job.
points.zh: 说实话这些车手的工作挺枯燥

points.en: It's just simply doing kilometers, doing kilometers, doing kilometers—not really pushing it.
points.zh: 就是不停刷里程，不用真的激烈驾驶

points.en: Of course, driving sportier than normally the public roads, but simply making sure that
points.zh: 当然比日常驾驶运动些，但主要是确保

points.en: you will satisfy the TÜV demands
points.zh: 满足TÜV的安全认证标准

points.en: Because depending on the part, if you need to homologate certain parts—
points.zh: 比如要认证某个部件的话

points.en: that's a beautiful color—
points.zh: 这颜色真漂亮

points.en: You might have to do like 1500 kilometers on the Nürburgring under full load.
points.zh: 可能需要在纽北满负荷跑1500公里

points.en: Now, of course, no one is measuring real lap times, but they just say
points.zh: 当然没人会计时圈速

points.en: it cannot be wet. Need to put actual load through the car part and
points.zh: 只要是干地，让部件承受实际负载

points.en: then you might get two of approval for a part or for a car. So yeah.
points.zh: 就能通过认证了

points.en: Oh, camouflaged M2. Oh, oh, we need to zoom in.
points.zh: 伪装M2，快拉近镜头

points.en: Ducktail, so I guess it's a CS if we're gonna get one
points.zh: 鸭尾设计，估计是CS版

points.en: Oh running wide. Beautiful.
points.zh: 走得很宽，漂亮

points.en: Another one.
points.zh: 又一辆

points.en: And the green one very nice color
points.zh: 绿色那台颜色真赞

points.en: Wonder if Benny Leuchter, like, is one of them.
points.zh: 不知道Benny Leuchter在不在里面

points.en: Just want to see this white Polo that went very wide previously.
points.zh: 想看看之前走线很开的那台白色Polo

points.en: Oh, hello Lambo people.
points.zh: 看，兰博的人来了

points.en: Sounds much more quiet because the factory STO gets banned for noise levels
points.zh: STO原厂排气因为噪音被禁，所以声音小很多

points.en: So I guess they brought it on something for the exhaust or...
points.zh: 可能换了排气系统

points.en: Where is it, the Revuelto? Another car I really want to see is
points.zh: Revuelto在哪？还有一台很想看的车

points.en: ZR1. I'm sure a lot of people want to see that.
points.zh: ZR1，大家都期待吧

points.en: Wondering what kind of lap time it can do
points.zh: 不知道能跑出什么圈速

points.en: Sub-6:45 hopefully.
points.zh: 希望进6分45秒

points.en: I think that's kind of it
points.zh: 差不多就这些了

points.en: because there's not much more to see.
points.zh: 实在没更多可看的

points.en: It's also almost the end of the session. Then the public session will start.
points.zh: 测试池快结束了，接下来是公众开放时段

points.en: So maybe I'll go do some laps. Maybe. But that's for another channel.
points.zh: 可能去跑几圈，不过那是另一个频道的内容了

points.en: Or maybe I'll just go home and enjoy time with family.
points.zh: 或者回家陪家人

points.en: So yeah. There's that.
points.zh: 就这样吧

points.en: Because we have, of course, also the weekend is quite big with the race.
points.zh: 毕竟周末还有重头戏

points.en: The first NLS race. I'm happy that the industry pool is taking place now
points.zh: 首场NLS比赛，很高兴现在有测试池

points.en: because they can lay all the nice extra rubber here,
points.zh: 这样能留下更多轮胎橡胶

points.en: and we can have a grippier track.
points.zh: 让赛道抓地力更强

points.en: And then, after NLS, it's going to be even grippier because of all the full slicks.
points.zh: 等NLS结束后，全热熔胎会让抓地力更夸张

points.en: And then on Sunday, it's going to be the first rain day of the year,

points.en: Sad.

points.en: so technically maybe we can...

points.en: Should we try it?

points.en: And then we can always cruise.

points.en: Now the car is in the right settings.

points.en: with accelerating over the corners.

points.en: and we can see what the car can do,

points.en: because we're gonna end up with an empty tank.

points.en: But I'm really impressed.

points.en: It's really, really, really good.

points.en: that fast, you're still the fastest out there.

points.en: Recharge... nope. Let's do Hybrid, so...

points.en: Temperature is also very good, it seems.

points.en: Oil, engine, everything is good. The pressure is good.
points.zh: 油温、引擎，一切正常 胎压也没问题

points.en: And today is quite warm.

points.en: Like close to 30 degrees. Or not over 30...

points.en: although some sections it might be.
points.zh: 虽然有些路段可能已经超了

points.en: Look, we're cruising like, what, fourth gear, fifth...

points.en: upshifting to the max

points.en: and we're still following with the traffic nicely.
points.zh: 但我们依然能很好地跟住车流

points.en: GT3 also chilling it...

points.en: because we do not want to take
points.zh: 因为旋转木马有慢车

points.en: unnecessary risks with traffic in Carousel.

points.zh: 没意识到、也没看见你...

points.en: and just drops backwards.

points.en: You know, I'm enjoying these like easy laps.
points.zh: 讲真，我还挺享受这种放松圈的

points.en: We're hypermiling while following two very track capable cars.

points.en: The E92, fully modified...

points.en: Lots of elevation changes, lots of aero.

points.en: Love it.

points.en: Full EV mode.

points.en: So see you next time. Bye bye.

points.en: Hello everyone, from sunny and beautiful Nürburgring,
points.zh: 欢迎来到晴朗 美丽的纽博格林

points.en: and to be precise,
points.zh: 准确地说

points.en: welcome to a exclusive first look at 2025 Nürburgring track updates.
points.zh: 欢迎来到2025年纽博格林赛道翻新后的独家首秀

points.en: Over winter the Nürburgring has been extremely busy
points.zh: 整个冬天，纽博格林都忙得不可开交

points.en: by resurfacing certain areas of the track,
points.zh: 赛道一些区域进行了重新铺设

points.en: but the most important update of the year is this new exit for the track
points.zh: 但今年最重要的更新，还是这个赛道的新出口

points.en: and then it would also cause some traffic jams
points.zh: 这会导致一些交通堵塞

points.en: you had, of course, also the opportunity to go straight directly for the lap
points.zh: 当然了，你也可以直接进入赛道跑圈

points.en: but now, you're gonna have the opportunity to go directly off the track
points.zh: 但现在，你可以选择直接从赛道开出去

points.en: onto the public road, which should relieve lots of track pressures.
points.zh: 进入公共道路，这应该会大大缓解交通压力

points.en: We're gonna have a look at it in a bit,
points.zh: 我们稍后会仔细看看

points.en: because we're gonna do a full lap to see
points.zh: 因为我们准备跑一整圈

points.en: what kind of other changes have been done to the track as well.
points.zh: 看看赛道还做了那些升级和变化

points.en: So, I invite you for this exclusive look,
points.zh: 这次我带你们来个独家揭秘

points.en: and most importantly, also, if you are new to the channel, give it a sub.
points.zh: 还有就是，新来的观众关注记得点个订阅

points.en: Let's see if we can crack 100,000 subscribers before the start of the season.
points.zh: 我们看看赛季开始前能不能突破10万订阅

points.en: The track is reopening this weekend, 8th of March.
points.zh: 赛道会在3月8日，这个周末重新开放

points.en: The same type of weather is being predicted, so 16 and 17 degrees, sunny and
points.zh: 天气预计和现在一样晴朗又干燥，大概16、17度

points.en: and I actually already done my first lap and the track looks amazing.
points.zh: 其实我已经抢先跑完一圈了，赛道真的太美了

points.en: It's going to be beautiful. So, come by, have some laps.
points.zh: 绝对会是个好日子 所以都来跑几圈呗

points.en: Because on Tuesday, we're gonna have snow again.
points.zh: 因为周二，又要开始下雪了

points.en: So let's see. This might be a opening weekend before many many.
points.zh: 这个周末 可能是接下来很久唯一的好机会了

points.en: anyway we are hopping in the Nürburgring official video
points.zh: 好了，我们跳上了纽博格林的官方视频车

points.en: because, thanks to the Nürburgring, I'm allowed to make this video.
points.zh: 多亏了纽博格林官方，我才能制作这个视频

points.en: So it will be not a full send lap because there's still construction works happening.
points.zh: 所以这不是全力冲刺的一圈，因为还有施工在进行

points.en: therefore it's a two-lane road, and we need to stay on the right side
points.zh: 所以现在是双向车道，我们必须靠右行驶

points.en: and not drive faster than 80 kilometers per hour.
points.zh: 并且车速不能超过80公里每小时

points.en: So, in case you're wondering why we're not taking the racing line
points.zh: 如果你好奇 为什么我们今天不走赛车线

points.en: because today we have also construction workers' line
points.zh: 因为今天我们要走 施工人员线

points.en: As you can see, there is car going in opposite direction. So therefore.
points.zh: 大家也能看到，有车子在对向行驶 这就是原因

points.en: Anyway, let's hop in and do a lap. Yeah.
points.zh: 让我们上车跑一圈吧

points.en: Oh, the first thing are, actually, can you stop here?
points.zh: 哦，能先在这里停一下吗？

points.en: That's interesting. That was quick.
points.zh: 有点意思 真快

points.en: So, we are at T13 that was a very quick stop
points.zh: 我们到了T13，我们先停在了这里

points.en: because we had to drive on from the GP track
points.zh: 因为我们从GP赛道开过来

points.en: and I'm like, wait, stop here, because this is something new.
points.zh: 我赶紧喊停，因为这里有个新东西指得一看

points.en: Look at that.
points.zh: 快看那个

points.en: The words that everyone loves: sustainability, and becoming green
points.zh: 大家最津津乐道的词：可持续性 和 绿色发展

points.en: or actually orange. I don't know what kind of energy
points.zh: 或者说其实是橙色？什么能源什么颜色

points.en: or color energy the solar energy is, anyway.
points.zh: 不确定太阳能到底是个啥颜色

points.en: Since the grand stands here at T13 are not really used,
points.zh: 反正T13这里的大看台基本用不上

points.en: even when RCN is taking place, there are not really people standing there,
points.zh: 即使RCN比赛的时候，也没有人在那里观赛

points.en: and for lap record attempts, while everyone is just walking here.
points.zh: 冲击圈速记录的时候，大家都会走到跟前这里

points.en: So, now they've been converted to solar panels.
points.zh: 所以现在它们被改造成了太阳能板

points.en: I haven't seen any press release yet, how much power it generates,
points.zh: 我还没看到任何新闻通告，说它能发多少电

points.en: but it's always good; it's always good; and it's always good when it's so sunny like it is today.
points.zh: 但这总归是个好事，尤其是像今天这么明媚的阳光

points.en: Anyway, let's proceed with our lap.
points.zh: 总之，我们继续这一圈吧

points.en: is a new sponsor for corner names. So now, it's Falken Tyres.
points.zh: 弯道名称的标牌赞助商，换成飞劲轮胎了

points.en: So the signs look a bit different.
points.zh: 标志牌看有点不同了

points.en: We'll have a closer look at some other point when we stop the next time.
points.zh: 我们下次停车的时候 会凑近了仔细看看

points.en: Everything looks the same, like I haven't stopped driving.
points.zh: 一切看起来还是老样子，不用停下来看

points.en: So the good thing about this year is, because over the last two to three years,
points.zh: 今年有一点特别好，因为过去整整两到三年

points.en: lots of works were done in terms of digitalization.
points.zh: 在数字化方面做了很多工作

points.en: the first half of the track was covered in mud,
points.zh: 赛道的前半段弄得满是泥

points.en: Then last year, the second half of the track was covered in mud
points.zh: 然后去年，赛道的后半段也被整得灰头土脸

points.en: because the second half of the digitalization project had to be finished.
points.zh: 因为后半圈的数字化系统要收尾

points.en: And now, it's all clean. It's fantastic.
points.zh: 现在一切都干净了，太棒了

points.en: So, only the new tarmac bits will be parts where you need to watch out
points.zh: 只有沥青重铺的部分路段 需要格外留意

points.en: because of the grip levels, but everything here looks really the same.
points.zh: 因为抓地力水平有变化，这里的一切还是没变

points.en: So that's really, really nice.
points.zh: 不错，真的挺好的

points.en: And speaking of the digitalization project, officially from this year,
points.zh: 说到数字化系统，今年是正式上线

points.en: the project should be fully functional.
points.zh: 整个系统完全投入使用了

points.en: So it should be very safe to drive, I mean, of course,
points.zh: 所以驾驶起来应该更安全了 当然了

points.en: even last year, we saw that the project or like the system was working
points.zh: 其实去年 我们也看到了系统已经在运作了

points.en: and it would notify the drivers if all of a sudden there's rain
points.zh: 系统会及时提示车手，如果突然下雨

points.en: or if there's a yellow zone, yellow flag, you name it.
points.zh: 或者出黄旗了，整个赛段黄旗了

points.en: So it was already working but officially it's working from this year on.
points.zh: 所以系统已经上线一阵子了，今年是正式启用

points.en: So that's very good to know makes me significantly calmer
points.zh: 所以挺好的，这让我安心了很多

points.en: after seeing also the system working last year.
points.zh: 尤其看到了去年系统运行的效果

points.en: So yeah. Yeah, everything similar similar potato potahto.
points.zh: 嗯嗯，都大同小异嘛，差不多

points.en: because it looks like the hedges alongside the track have been trimmed down.
points.zh: 因为赛道旁的树篱 似乎是被修剪过了

points.en: I'm genuinely surprised how clean the track is.
points.zh: 我真的惊讶赛道这么干净

points.en: There's like a bit of mud here and there from the construction works,
points.zh: 只有零星几处地方有一些施工留下的泥巴

points.en: but overall, it looks very, very drivable.
points.zh: 总体看起来，非常非常适合驾驶

points.en: I mean I've seen it worse in autumn days or the even start of the season days
points.zh: 在秋天，甚至以往的赛季初 我见过糟得多的情况

points.en: when there is still some mess from leaves or construction works on track.
points.zh: 那时候 赛道上还有落叶 或者施工留下的杂物

points.en: So, so far, it looks very good.
points.zh: 目前为止，看起来非常好

points.en: However, still, make sure to watch out because
points.zh: 不过，还是要小心为妙

points.en: even though, this weekend, they predicted to be 16 to 17 degrees,
points.zh: 尽管这个周末预测气温是16到17度

points.en: overnight, it's still freezing.
points.zh: 但夜间还是会结冰

points.en: So the tarmac temperatures are going to be still quite low.
points.zh: 所以路面沥青的温度仍然会很低

points.en: So the grip levels are not going to be very high,
points.zh: 所以抓地力水平不会很高

points.en: even though the ambient temperatures might be high,
points.zh: 哪怕环境温度可能已经很高了

points.en: But, yeah, I'm really excited to go here a bit faster
points.zh: 是啊，真的很期待能在这里跑快一点

points.en: once we're allowed to when the track opens in two days' time.
points.zh: 等两天后赛道开放了，就可以跑快了

points.en: Oh, the Schwedenkreuz sign is now much more prominent here
points.zh: 哦，瑞典十字的标牌现在更显眼了

points.en: on the left side.
points.zh: 左边这里

points.en: Oh wow, look at that!
points.zh: 哇哦，看啊

points.en: Xiaomi SU7 Ultra is now the branding advertisement partner of the Nürburgring.
points.zh: 小米SU7 Ultra现在是纽博格林的品牌广告合作伙伴

points.en: Yokohama not only lost all the corner name signs but also this.
points.zh: 优科豪马不仅丢了弯道标牌冠名，这个也丢了

points.en: That's actually impressive.
points.zh: 真的很令人印象深刻

points.en: Will be interesting to see what they're gonna do
points.zh: 好奇今年小米会怎么做

points.en: if they're gonna come back this year and do something more.
points.zh: 会不会继续回到纽北，做更多的事情

points.en: Yeah, we're now descending into Foxhole, of course,
points.zh: 是啊，我们现在正进入狐狸洞

points.en: the most controversial part of the track from last year with the big kerb.
points.zh: 去年这里成了最有争议的部分，因为那个高路肩

points.en: Let's see if any changes have taken place but I guess not.
points.zh: 一起看看有没有啥改动，我估计是没有

points.en: It's still so weird to drive that part in the sim nowadays
points.zh: 现在 在模拟器里开这段还是怪怪的

points.en: because you need to take the kerb like you used to do back in the old days,
points.zh: 因为你需要用以前的方式 吃路肩过去

points.en: and on the track, you should definitely stay off it.
points.zh: 真跑赛道，绝对需要避开那个路肩

points.en: Nope, it looks as high and used as ever,
points.zh: 没翻修，它看起来还是那么高

points.en: so do not take the kerb.
points.zh: 所以别压那个路肩

points.en: But... what is this?
points.zh: 等等，这是什么？

points.en: Oh, can you stop here for a second?
points.zh: 你能在这里停一下吗？

points.en: This looks new. This is new.
points.zh: 好像是新的 真是新的

points.en: Wow, interesting. Let's investigate.
points.zh: 有意思，让我们调查一下

points.en: That's funny. I didn't see that in the press release.
points.zh: 真奇怪，我在新闻稿里没看到这个

points.en: It's a little surprise. So, I think, yeah...
points.zh: 这是个小小的惊喜，我觉得...

points.en: Well, the seam is seamless. So that's good.
points.zh: 接缝处理得很平整，真不错

points.en: This I think is still the old part from last year?
points.zh: 这部分应该还是去年的旧路面吧

points.en: Or is it, like even older part? Because I see a seam over there,
points.zh: 甚至是更老的？因为我看到那边有个接缝

points.en: which could be interesting, but definitely this is a new part.
points.zh: 有点意思，但这部分绝对是新的

points.en: So in the corner, in the wet, what you need to know is that,
points.zh: 所以湿地过弯的时候，你需要留意的是

points.en: in the wet the grip levels are going to be significantly higher
points.zh: 新铺的沥青在湿地时 抓地力会有显著提高

points.en: because there is still no rubber from the cars on it.
points.zh: 因为上面还没有积攒轮胎橡胶

points.en: Therefore, in the wet the grip levels will be higher
points.zh: 所以湿地的时候，抓地力会更高

points.en: But in the dry, it might be less because it's a brand-new tarmac
points.zh: 干地时抓地力则是更低，毕竟是全新的沥青

points.en: and it doesn't have the all the rubber.
points.zh: 上面还没有积累胎胶

points.en: All right, good to know. Let's see till where it goes
points.zh: 不错，看看新铺装的沥青延伸到哪里

points.en: and if they changed any curbs, maybe at the Adenauer Forst itself.
points.zh: 有没有可能把阿德瑙森林那里的路肩改了

points.en: Look at the beautiful day. Fantastic. So warm actually.
points.zh: 天气真好啊 太美好了 而且很暖和

points.en: There's much more overview here because that has been definitely trimmed down.
points.zh: 这里的视野更开阔了，这里的树篱肯定被修剪过了

points.en: Not that it helps but sometimes it could be good.
points.zh: 虽然没啥用，但总归是好的嘛

points.en: Also look at all these new barriers.
points.zh: 还有看看这些新护栏吧

points.en: Some of them are because of me. RIP M4,
points.zh: 有些是我的功劳 ，安息吧M4

points.en: and revival of the M4 is coming up actually.
points.zh: 不过M4很快就要复活了

points.en: All right, so let's see till where the new tarmac goes.
points.zh: 好吧，让我们看看新路面延伸到哪儿

points.en: Well, there's some extra fencing on the left for the curious photographers, videographers.
points.zh: 左边额外增添了一些护栏，摄影师、摄像师们想知道的话

points.en: No, this is already old. That's... yeah.
points.zh: 好吧 这已经是旧路面了

points.en: Okay, interesting. A very small part has been resurfaced.
points.zh: 有点意思 就重铺了很小一段路面

points.en: And look at that, all the greens are gone, still.
points.zh: 所有植物的绿色都还没长回来

points.en: But the Rebel Tree is completely green. So pretty.
points.zh: 但叛逆之树已经完全绿了，真漂亮

points.en: Interesting, there is some gravel traps there.
points.zh: 有意思，那里有一些砂石缓冲区

points.en: Could be, maybe for some, I don't know, some drainage.
points.zh: 可能是为了赛道排水啥的吧

points.en: Oh, falcon.
points.zh: 哦，猎鹰

points.en: Bye.
points.zh: 拜拜

points.en: Was a piece cut out of the tarmac. I'm not sure if I remember it from last year.
points.zh: 这里的沥青好像切掉了一块 我不确定去年是不是这样

points.en: We'll see.
points.zh: 再看看呗

points.en: The hedges are nicely trimmed.
points.zh: 树篱修剪得很整齐

points.en: Gardening works done a good job over winter.
points.zh: 冬天的园艺工作 弄得不错

points.en: Yeah, that's very nice because now you can look really good into the corner.
points.zh: 真不错，现在大家可以很好地看到弯角了

points.en: Oh, new patch on the left.
points.zh: 哦，左边有新补丁

points.en: Will not affect much because this is off the line anyway.
points.zh: 不会影响太多，因为不在赛车线上

points.en: This left section was done new last year, I think, anyway.
points.zh: 反正左边这部分去年已经重新修过了

points.en: I don't know if this is new. No, doesn't look like... or is it?
points.zh: 这是新铺的吗？看着不像...难不成新的？

points.en: The white lines are definitely new.
points.zh: 这条白线倒肯定是纯新的

points.en: I believe here after Mutkurve.
points.zh: 应该在勇气之弯后面

points.en: So here the construction works of this section has been done new. Right ahead of us.
points.zh: 所以在我们前面这一块是刚刚施工弄好的

points.en: The Porsche killer corner,
points.zh: 保时捷杀手弯

points.en: because the right-hander makes the rear engine car
points.zh: 这个右转时常会让后置引擎的车子推头

points.en: sometimes understeer, and you end up too much on the left.
points.zh: 转向不足，就冲到左边去了

points.en: So, this is new.
points.zh: 这是新的了

points.en: And then the transition to the right is very smooth.
points.zh: 然后这里向右的过渡非常丝滑

points.en: Yeah, that looks good. Nice.
points.zh: 看起来不错，很好

points.en: Can you just stop here for a second?
points.zh: 我们能在这里停一下吗？

points.en: All right, yeah, everything is new and smooth.
points.zh: 好的，一切都是新的、很平滑

points.en: Like I said that part over here, usually...
points.zh: 就像我刚刚说到的

points.en: Well, I know lots of Porsches, including the GT2 RS MR taxi
points.zh: 我知道好多保时捷，包括GT2 RS MR的出租车

points.en: that died over there.
points.zh: 都在那里完蛋了

points.en: This extra rumble strip was added already last year, so that's convenient,
points.zh: 这条额外的缓冲带是去年就加上的，挺方便的

points.en: and sometimes you actually can take it if you run really, really wide.
points.zh: 要是有时候路线跑太宽了，真可以借这里救急

points.en: But the transition seems to be very smooth and nice,
points.zh: 不过这段的衔接非常流畅 很舒服

points.en: so that could definitely benefit the pace, the feeling, the safety, of course, most importantly.
points.zh: 绝对能提升节奏、感觉、安全性，当然安全是重中之重

points.en: I would have loved to see actually this section,
points.zh: 要我说 真应该把新铺设的路段

points.en: the new section being repaved even further until Steilstrecke,
points.zh: 新铺装的路面一路延伸到小陡坡就好了

points.en: because there you have a nasty bump, nasty bump, nasty bump,
points.zh: 因为那里有一个可恶的颠簸，可恶，真可恶

points.en: that will unsettle or trigger your ABS when you go over it
points.zh: 会让你的车子不稳定，甚至触发ABS

points.en: with certain cars, like BMWs and Renault Mégane, etc.,
points.zh: 一些车子，比如宝马和雷诺梅甘娜啥的

points.en: when you go on the brake, the car thinks that you're actually in the air
points.zh: 当你踩着刹车的时候，车子以为已经完全腾空了

points.en: because you're, well, that you have no grip on the tyres and will fully engage ABS,
points.zh: 因为轮胎抓地力完全丧失了，ABS就会完全介入

points.en: and then you can end up in a tyre wall.
points.zh: 然后就会栽轮胎墙里了

points.en: Happened to me, happened to many others that I know.
points.zh: 我撞过，认识的人里不少也撞过

points.en: So yeah, that's something you need to be aware of and go on the brakes a bit before.
points.zh: 所以务必要注意这一点，把刹车点往前挪一些

points.en: Just to make sure that your car will not lift and yeah, that things won't happen.
points.zh: 确保车子不会抬起，避免悲剧的发生

points.en: But other than that, I'm actually, extremely positively surprised
points.zh: 不过除此之外，我其实挺惊喜的

points.en: because over the last years, mostly I've been bitching about
points.zh: 毕竟，过去几年我可没少抱怨接缝问题

points.en: the seams that the seams are not that seamless.
points.zh: 这些新旧沥青之间的过度不够平滑

points.en: But right now, the transition from the new tarmac to the old one is seamless.
points.zh: 不过现在好了，新路面到旧路面的衔接真的无缝了

points.en: It's really, really good. Really good job, job, job.
points.zh: 真的非常棒 干得漂亮

points.en: You will not even know it if you will not know it. Very nice.
points.zh: 如果你不知道的话，根本感知不到

points.en: All right, let's proceed to the rest of the track.
points.zh: 我们继续剩下的赛道吧

points.en: Carousel, looks still the same.
points.zh: 旋转木马，没啥变化

points.en: Same old, same old.
points.zh: 老样子，老样子

points.en: No new flags were painted.
points.zh: 旗子没有刷新的

points.en: No new concrete things were added.
points.zh: 那个水泥块也没有新加

points.en: What's it called? Concrete plates.
points.zh: 叫什么来着？混凝土板

points.en: Tradition remains the same.
points.zh: 老传统一直没变

points.en: The faint grass on the right is still fake and it's still there.
points.zh: 右边的假草还是假的，还在那里

points.en: Wippermann curbs are still the same.
points.zh: 弹跳者的路肩还是老样子

points.en: They were redone last year, I think anyway, or two years ago.
points.zh: 这些路肩是去年还是前年重新弄过的

points.en: Now we're gonna see one of the new changes.
points.zh: 现在我们来看看一个新变化

points.en: That's not necessarily on the track, but next to the track.
points.zh: 不是在赛道上的变化，而是赛道边的变化

points.en: Sort of additional sitting area in Brünnchen
points.zh: 小水井增添了一个额外的休息区

points.en: where you can sit or put an extra chair on top or, yeah.
points.zh: 你可以坐那儿，或者放把椅子啥的

points.en: It's quite nice.
points.zh: 挺不错的

points.en: And most importantly,
points.zh: 重头戏来了

points.en: we are now entering the main construction works,
points.zh: 现在正式进入主要的施工路段

points.en: difference, or addition, or change.
points.zh: 反正是有不同的新变化

points.en: And that is starting from here from Brünnchen to, which is over here.
points.zh: 那就是从小水井开始 一直到前面为止

points.en: If you can stop at Eiskurve there.
points.zh: 冰弯那里我们停一下

points.en: So that's for me the most interesting bit
points.zh: 我最感兴趣的就是这一段

points.en: because from here it looks very smooth.
points.zh: 因为这里看着挺平顺的

points.en: And there is, it looks like there is no bump anymore for any tripoding action.
points.zh: 好像那种能让车子三轮着地的颠簸已经没了

points.en: Yeah, here is fine. Yeah, that's nice.
points.zh: 嗯嗯，这里可以 就这里吧

points.en: So Eiskurve, one of the most spectacular spots for Racetracker photographers
points.zh: 冰弯 是Racetracker摄影师们最喜欢的机位之一

points.en: that would be standing there, and taking a shot in that direction.
points.zh: 他们会站在那里，朝那个方向拍照

points.en: And then, well, we're a bit too much to the left side,
points.zh: 然后呢 我们有点太靠左边了

points.en: but then the car would be tripoding.
points.zh: 车子抬一只轮子

points.en: And that was caused by, A, lots of grip on the track over here
points.zh: 一个是因为赛道这边的抓地力特别的强

points.en: and also additional bumping over here.
points.zh: 另外就是这边有一些颠簸

points.en: Now the section was extremely slippery in the wet,
points.zh: 湿地的时候，这个部分非常的滑

points.en: so there was also lots of drifting happening, which is not allowed.
points.zh: 所以经常能在这里看到漂移，这是赛道禁止的

points.en: But now I think it's extremely smooth,
points.zh: 我觉得现在路面已经平滑了

points.en: and therefore, yeah, unless you have very high grip levels,
points.zh: 所以说，除非有非常强的抓地力

points.en: I do not think that the cars will be tripoding.
points.zh: 否则车子不会再三轮着地了

points.en: But we will see. We will see. The bump is definitely out of it.
points.zh: 我们拭目以待吧，但路面颠簸确实没了

points.en: More importantly, also here, you have extra runoff area.
points.zh: 更重要的是，这里新增了额外的缓冲区

points.en: This curbing, this runoff curbing is new.
points.zh: 这截路缘石，缓冲路沿石是新的

points.en: So now you can run extra wide if you would want to.
points.zh: 现在如果走外线，能跑得比以前宽多了

points.en: And more importantly, because this is new, in the past,
points.zh: 更重要的是，这个新设计好就好在

points.en: if you would fall off it, in the wet, then the car would lose traction
points.zh: 以前要是在雨天冲了出去，车子就会失控

points.en: because you would hit the section covered in rubber.
points.zh: 因为会压到有轮胎橡胶的地方

points.en: And therefore, now the transition would be much smoother.
points.zh: 所以现在这段的过度就会丝滑非常多

points.en: Also, this transition over the hill will be much smoother.
points.zh: 而且翻过这个坡的衔接现在顺滑太多了

points.en: And I think it would, yeah, definitely be a lot easier and confident to drive.
points.zh: 我敢肯定 现在开起来绝对会更轻松、更有底气

points.en: I'll just keep on walking with my nice follow car here next to me,
points.zh: 我会继续步行，带着跟拍车子继续往前溜达

points.en: because this is the section that I want to show you mostly on foot.
points.zh: 因为这段路我想带大家亲自走一趟

points.en: And I want to see how it looks like, once you're on top of the hill.
points.zh: 重点看看到了坡顶的时候看着怎么样

points.en: A little detail. You can see the fresh seeds for the grass are here.
points.zh: 有个小细节，你能看到新鲜的草籽在这里

points.en: And now this section is going to be extremely faster,
points.zh: 我觉得现在这个赛段应该会快得多

points.en: I guess, than it was last year.
points.zh: 肯定是要比去年快

points.en: Look at this. Here's a nice safety area.
points.zh: 看着个，有个不错的安全区

points.en: So in case you have a breakdown or whatsoever,
points.zh: 如果你遇到了故障抛锚了啥的

points.en: orange barriers indicates that there's an opening behind the barrier,
points.zh: 可以找找有这种橙色护栏，后面会有逃生口

points.en: and you can stop there safely if you would have to.
points.zh: 如果需要的话，可以安全停在那里

points.en: So over here is one, for example. and then there are a couple of more on the track.
points.zh: 所以这里有一个逃生口，整个赛道上还有好几个

points.en: This looks so amazing.
points.zh: 看起来棒极了

points.en: All right. Well, that's the look from here. It looks extremely fast.
points.zh: 这就是从坡顶看过去的样子，看起来非常快

points.en: Well, the main question is, of course, now,
points.zh: 当然了，现在的主要问题是

points.en: how did the jump get affected? Will we still have the jump?
points.zh: 飞坡部分受到了什么影响？还能起飞吗？

points.en: Today we will not find out,
points.zh: 今天我们试不出来

points.en: because we're not allowed to drive faster than 80 kilometers per hour.
points.zh: 因为我们不能超过80公里每小时的限速

points.en: But from here, it doesn't look as jumpy as before.
points.zh: 从这里目测，弹跳的程度会小很多

points.en: Well, let's get in the car and see how it feels,
points.zh: 走吧，让我们上车实测一下

points.en: at least at low level speeds, and also stop there and see.
points.zh: 哪怕是慢速也感受一下，然后停下看看

points.en: All right, approaching the jump. We're not going to jump today.
points.zh: 好的，我们接近弹跳者，我们今天不会跳

points.en: Big anticipation.
points.zh: 非常期待

points.en: Well, actually, it still looks steep from here. I might be wrong.
points.zh: 说实话，从这里看还是很陡的，可能我错了

points.en: Here?
points.zh: 这里？

points.en: Yeah, here is fine.
points.zh: 嗯，这里可以

points.en: All right, I don't know.
points.zh: 我也不知道了

points.en: It looks steep still,
points.zh: 陡还是陡

points.en: but smooth. Does it work, steep and smooth?
points.zh: 但很顺滑 又陡又顺还能起跳吗？

points.en: It's hard to say. It's really hard to say.
points.zh: 真说不准 实在说不准

points.en: I would almost say that this side is a bit flatter than that side.
points.zh: 要我说这边路面比那边更平整一点

points.en: Not sure if you can see it, like on the gradient change.
points.zh: 不知道你们能不能看到 这个坡度的变化

points.en: Oh, well.
points.zh: 行吧

points.en: I guess we'll find out the day after tomorrow.
points.zh: 只有我们后天实测才能知道了

points.en: Kinda. More or less.
points.zh: 也许，大概吧

points.en: All right.
points.zh: 好吧

points.en: By the way, as promised, a more close-up
points.zh: 答应大家的，凑近了来看看

points.en: of the new signs that indicate the corner names.
points.zh: 弯道名称标牌的新设计

points.en: It looks nice. Looks very nice.
points.zh: 看着不错 真不错

points.en: And now we're approaching the last corner of the track,
points.zh: 我们马上就要到赛道的最后一个弯

points.en: Galgenkopf, before we're entering the main straight,
points.zh: 就是断头台，接下来就是主直道了

points.en: where, of course, is the new, best and the most important feature of the construction works,
points.zh: 当然了，这里有这次施工最亮眼最重要的更新

points.zh: 而且内饰完整保留，舒服地买菜都没问题

points.en: It even has a bit more fancy carpets from 9FF
points.zh: 甚至还有9FF提供的豪华脚垫

points.en: and the main important thing in comparison to previous lap,
points.zh: 比起上次刷圈最大的升级是

points.en: right now it received the conversion by 9FF, their G Turbo series.
points.zh: 现在做了9FF的G Turbo系列改装

points.en: Now, the car could run 760, 780 horsepower, but we took it easy
points.zh: 这车能跑到760、780匹，但我们悠着点

points.en: and we just did about 680 to try it out.
points.zh: 只调到680匹试了试水

points.en: I just want to show you the fact that we even have the frunk.
points.zh: 给你们看这车居然还保留着前备箱

points.en: Yep. So, this means that it's actually more practical than a GT3 RS,
points.zh: 没错 实用性上来讲远远超过了GT3 RS

points.en: and probably also much more faster to a certain extent.
points.zh: 某种程度上比GT3 RS可能还快得多

points.en: So yeah, it was quite crazy, quite insane.
points.zh: 总之这次真的很疯狂、离谱

points.en: Anything to add? Well, a bit more horsepower for next time,
points.zh: 还能升级些什么？下次再多加点马力吧

points.en: once we have confirmed that it works and we confirmed that it works
points.zh: 等确认系统稳定后，现在确实也稳定了

points.en: so next time let's go again with 780 horsepower.
points.zh: 所以下一次直接上780马力

points.en: And, maybe, a bit newer tires
points.zh: 或许再换上新轮胎

points.en: and maybe, actually, also our Vulcan Alpha dedicated front splitter
points.zh: 或许再装上Vulcan Alpha定制的前铲

points.en: because, yeah, with such a big wing, you need to have something on the front.
points.zh: 毕竟这么大的尾翼，前面也必须得匹配上

points.en: But yeah, and maybe a bit more practice, and maybe put my helmet on,
points.zh: 或许再多点练习，戴上我的头盔

points.en: and HANS, and then see what it can do.
points.zh: 还有HANS，然后就能看极限在哪

points.en: But until then, enjoy the lap and that was freaking insane.
points.zh: 在那之前，先享受这圈吧，真挺疯狂的

points.en: That was really, really insane.
points.zh: 真的非常、非常离谱了

points.en: So, thank you very much, nine and a half, 9FF,
points.zh: 所以非常感谢9.5...9FF

points.en: and SWH for making all of this happen.
points.zh: 和SWH促成这一切

points.en: We are lined up on the track at this car track day.
points.zh: 赛道日活动我们排在发车位

points.en: They allowed me to go out first, and I decided to go out alone now, first.
points.zh: 他们让我当头车出发，我决定先自己一个人跑

points.en: So, although it's going to be like a warm-up lap trying to feel the car,
points.zh: 所以，虽然只是一个热身圈，感受一下车子

points.en: we also are gonna have weight of the passenger
points.zh: 但我们还是带上乘客的重量

points.en: to show what the car can do to a certain extent.
points.zh: 也能一定程度上展示这车的实力

points.en: Not gonna send it because I'm, like, not wearing helmet, I don't know the car,
points.zh: 不会推到极限，毕竟我没戴头盔也不熟悉这车

points.en: but I think I should be comfortable enough to,
points.zh: 但我还是有一些把握的

points.en: yeah, to feel out its speeds, halfway through the lap once the tyres are warm.
points.zh: 等跑了半圈轮胎热起来之后，能摸清它的速度

points.en: Off we go.
points.zh: 出发

points.en: Can go much faster than that.
points.zh: 其实还能快得多

points.en: Let's not do that today.
points.zh: 今天就算了吧

points.en: Much better than last year.
points.zh: 比去年强多了

points.en: Not bad for a warm-up lap. Holy s***!
points.zh: 热身圈这成绩 我去！

points.en: Give me a day and that's gonna be a record car.
points.zh: 给我一天的时间，应该能破纪录

points.en: Even with me behind the wheel, so let alone with a pro driver.
points.zh: 我都能开成这样，职业车手还得了

points.en: No snap oversteer here.
points.zh: 这里没有突然甩尾

points.en: No snap oversteer.
points.zh: 完全没有突然甩尾

points.en: Over the crest number two...
points.zh: 越过第二个坡顶...

points.en: A proper import, because recently someone asked me like,
points.zh: 一辆正经进口车，之前有人问我

points.en: what kind of license plate is that?
points.zh: 这是什么车牌？

points.en: It's a Dutch plate
points.zh: 是荷兰牌照

points.en: if the car has been imported from somewhere far away,
points.zh: 如果这车是从很远的地方进口的

points.en: like other continent even most of the times.
points.zh: 比如跨大洲，通常都是这样

points.en: And in this case, it's a proper JDM S2000.
points.zh: 这是一台纯正的JDM S2000

points.en: Why is it proper JDM?
points.zh: 为什么说是正经JDM？

points.en: Well, it came straight from Japan.
points.zh: 这车直接从日本来的

points.en: It's right-hand drive,
points.zh: 是右舵的

points.en: but more importantly, it has the gentleman's agreement speed limiter.
points.zh: 但更重要的是它还带着绅士协议的限速器

points.en: So 180 kilometres per hour, hard cut.
points.zh: 180公里每小时，直接断油

points.en: Yeah, so we were hitting it a few times, Schredenkreuz, Foxhole,
points.zh: 是啊，我们在瑞典十字、狐狸洞

points.en: and the climb to Kesselchen.
points.zh: 还有爬到小盆地时都触发了

points.en: So that was a bit like interesting experience.
points.zh: 所以这体验还挺特别的

points.en: But more importantly, this is an AP1,
points.zh: 更重要的是这是一辆AP1

points.en: known for a very tricky handling from factory
points.zh: 以原厂状态难以操控而闻名

points.en: because of the 16-inch wheels and big sidewall.
points.zh: 主要是因为16寸轮毂和超大的侧墙

points.en: It's yeah, quite sketchy.
points.zh: 确实有点不靠谱

points.en: And some people say it's very prone to snap oversteer.
points.zh: 好多人也说它容易突然甩尾

points.en: More on that later or watch the video
points.zh: 视频后续会提到，或者去看

points.en: that The Drive has posted recently
points.zh: The Drive最近发布的视频

points.en: because they explained it very nicely.
points.zh: 他们解释得特别清楚

points.en: This is an AP1, so with the FA, I think it's a yeah, FA20 engine.
points.zh: 这AP1，搭载FA...应该是FA20发动机

points.en: Basically, yeah, two litre, 9,000 RPM.
points.zh: 就是2.0升，能拉到9000转

points.en: The AP2, the facelift or the updated version has a 2.2
points.zh: AP2款，也就是改款或升级版，是2.2升

points.en: with a lower rev limiter at the 8.2 or 8.4 or something,
points.zh: 转速上限降到了8200或8400左右

points.en: but more torque, so it's actually much nicer.
points.zh: 但扭矩更大了，所以其实更好开

points.en: But yeah, those are the main differences.
points.zh: 不过，主要就是这些差别

points.en: But yeah, this is AP1, but has AP2 wheels.
points.zh: 这台是AP1, 但用了AP2的轮毂

points.en: So bigger wheels, smaller sidewall.
points.zh: 轮毂更大了，侧壁更薄了

points.en: It doesn't dance on the sidewall and quite good.
points.zh: 侧壁的支撑更好了，还挺好的

points.en: It is Toyo R1R tyre, so quite alright.
points.zh: 轮胎是东洋R1R，也还行

points.en: Has some sort of DIXCEL brake pads.
points.zh: 刹车皮好像是DIXCEL的

points.en: And for the rest,
points.zh: 其他部分嘛

points.en: I think it's pretty much stock except for the air brake.
points.zh: 基本都是原厂，除了这个空气制动器

points.en: Well, the wing that fell down mid-lap and functioned as an air brake,
points.zh: 就是那个半圈掉下来的尾翼，临时当了空气制动器

points.en: but it was... it was alright. It was good.
points.zh: 但也... 没啥大问题 挺好的

points.en: I really, really enjoyed actually driving this car
points.zh: 我真的，真的很享受开这台车

points.en: because the driver position, the involvement,
points.zh: 因为驾驶的坐姿，参与感，跟指

points.en: the heel-and-toe and everything,
points.zh: 一切都特别到位

points.en: this is like a really proper driver's car,
points.zh: 这真的是一台正经的驾驶者之车

points.en: especially since it fixes the issue of the AP1 with the wheels.
points.zh: 尤其是它解决了AP1的轮毂问题

points.en: So, very, very good.
points.zh: 所以真的很棒

points.en: Yeah, a bit noisy on the roof, but other than that, fantastic car.
points.zh: 车顶有点吵，但其他地方简直完美

points.en: -So thank you for the, for the opportunity. -No problem.
points.zh: -感谢这次的机会 -不客气

points.en: And good luck with that.
points.zh: 也祝你好运

points.en: get the speed limiter off and, yeah, I don't know what else.
points.zh: 把限速器去掉，还有别的嘛... 我也说不好

points.en: Maybe a bit better brakes.
points.zh: 可能再升级一下刹车

points.en: Hmm, interesting.
points.zh: 嗯，有意思

points.en: -So yeah, well, thanks a lot. -Hey, thank you for the feedback.
points.zh: -嗯，真的太感谢了 -嘿，感谢你的反馈

points.en: Yeah, have a good trip and, yeah, you guys enjoy the lap.
points.zh: 祝你一路顺风，大家好好享受这一圈吧

points.en: I'm quite excited because S2000s are fantastic cars
points.zh: 挺激动的，因为S2000真的太棒了

points.en: and I have great joy driving those.
points.zh: 每次开这车都特别开心

points.en: We've done a K-swapped, we've done AP1, AP2, we've done a Type S,
points.zh: 试过K机移植的、AP1、AP2、还有Type S都开过

points.en: which was for me one of, I think the best out of the box cars.

points.en: Well, the best S2000 that I've driven.

points.en: To which I said, no. Because...

points.zh: 所以，我开过AP1

points.en: This is very noisy.

points.en: That's going to be quite... interesting.

points.en: I don't know if it's from factory like this.

points.en: but apparently not everything.

points.zh: 这地方能给你的车快充，最高400千瓦

points.zh: 所以，我开过AP1

points.en: The problem with AP1... I think something very loud came by.
points.zh: AP1的问题是... 好像有辆很吵的车呼啸而过

points.en: With AP1s, it sits on 16-inch wheels and very high sidewall tyres,
points.zh: AP1用的是16寸轮毂和高侧壁的轮胎

points.en: which makes it lose traction quite easily,
points.zh: 这导致它很容易失去抓地力

points.en: or like very imbalanced because the car is dancing on sidewalls.
points.zh: 或者感觉特别不稳，车子就像在侧壁上晃

points.en: AP2 has fixed it and has also better engine
points.zh: AP2解决了这个问题，还换了更好的引擎

points.en: with more torque because it's 2.2.
points.zh: 2.2 升扭力更强。

points.en: This car is quite interesting because it's AP1 with AP2 wheels,
points.zh: 这台车挺有意思，是AP1配上了AP2的轮毂

points.en: so it has the 9,000 RPM engine with very little torque,
points.zh: 所以用的是9000转发动机，但扭矩很小

points.en: very long gear ratios.

points.en: speed limit apparently, like they have it in Japan.
points.zh: 180公里每小时的速度限制

points.en: The Drive has done an explanation
points.zh: The Drive做了个讲解

points.en: that a snap oversteer does not exist.
points.zh: 所谓的突然甩尾并不存在

points.en: Because S2000s especially have like the myth among the owners/drivers
points.zh: 因为S2000这车，在车主和车手之间流传着一个说法

points.en: that the car is going to snap oversteer by itself
points.zh: 在你连续过弯的时候

points.en: by... if you're going from one corner to another.
points.zh: 车子会突然自己转向过度

points.en: But it all has to do with the driver inputs.
points.zh: 其实，这和驾驶者的输入有关

points.en: So yeah.
points.zh: 是啊

points.en: It's unfortunate there's like lots of noise from the roof coming up,
points.zh: 可惜车顶传来的噪音实在太大了

points.en: but... because you cannot hear the 9,000 RPM.
points.zh: 根本听不到9000转的轰鸣

points.en: Should have taken the roof off completely, but...

points.en: Is that the...

points.en: It kicks in so abruptly.

points.en: There's some car behind us.

points.en: We cannot overtake an Abarth.

points.zh: 我不是说Abarth不好啊，但是...

points.en: Flat on the gas.

points.zh: 结果限速了... 可惜 车子像直接踩了刹车一样

points.en: Oh, this is so sad.

points.en: Yeah, the owner didn't...
points.zh: 是啊，车主没能...

points.en: didn't get the... the device in time to unlock the speed limiter.
points.zh: 没能及时... 搞到破解限速器的设备

points.en: But the downshifts are so amazing.
points.zh: 但是降挡还是很棒的

points.en: Even a bit of one-hand...
points.zh: 甚至有点单手...

points.en: What's it called?
points.zh: 叫啥来着？

points.en: One-hand, not drift,
points.zh: 单手，不是漂移

points.en: but like, you know, there was a bit of oversteer, you corrected it.
points.zh: 就是那种轻微转向过度，轻轻一打方向就稳住了

points.en: So this proves that S2000s do not have snap oversteer.
points.zh: 这也证明了S2000不会有那种突然甩尾

points.en: Just need to be very patient with the inputs.
points.zh: 只是输入得特别耐心才行

points.en: All good here.
points.zh: 这里没问题

points.en: The brakes are not doing what they're supposed to do.
points.zh: 刹车没有发挥出该有的水平

points.en: Because it has DIXCEL brake pads, it should be good,

points.en: but I guess, maybe they're just like not that new anymore.

points.en: But what's not sad is the handling.

points.en: Really enjoying that.

points.en: and that's a lot that's happening, unfortunately.

points.en: With the... the precision for heel-and-toe,

points.en: Now, the tickets so far have been sold out, but...

points.en: the entry to the so-called Schnuppertribüne is for free,
points.zh: Schnuppertribüne，体验看台，免费开放

points.en: so you can actually watch the show for free,

points.en: hear those cars fly by on the GP track for free,

points.en: so you just need to pick them up at Nürburgring Carré.

points.en: And that's kind of it. That's all I want to say.
points.zh: 就这样 要说的就这么多

points.en: So best things in life are for free including this video.
points.zh: 生活中最好的都是免费的，包括这个视频

points.en: And what I want to say is that, as of recently,
points.zh: 我想说的是，最近总有人担心

points.en: some people were concerned that my content is now just behind the paywall.
points.zh: 我的内容全部会变成付费专享

points.en: No, channel memberships have been around since 2021 already,
points.zh: 不是的，频道会员从2021年就有了

points.en: and whoever wants to become a member gets some nice benefits,
points.zh: 成为频道会员能有一些不错的专属福利

points.en: such as early preview and some member exclusive content,
points.zh: 比如抢先看视频和独家内容

points.en: but so far we only had, I think over the last five years, just three videos.
points.zh: 但是，五年里付费的独家视频总共才三期

points.en: Everything else is early release, and then it gets public for everyone else,
points.zh: 其他视频都是会员抢先看，然后对所有人公开

points.en: everyone gets a free video for the last, I would say 10 years,
points.zh: 十年如一日为大家免费提供内容

points.en: nothing's going to change that, but if you want to have an early release
points.zh: 这点不会改变，不过，如果你想要抢先看

points.en: and some other benefits, you can become the member of the channel.
points.zh: 享受一些其他福利，随时欢迎加入会员

-V12. -Really?
Really, it's V12. V12.

points.zh: 千匹猛兽、声浪炸裂、速度狂暴、漆黑车身

points.en: very big exhaust, and engine, and the powertrain, and this and that.

points.en: It's like baby sidewall. Oh, yeah, okay.

points.en: But it's enough. The tyres are okay for the amateur driver.

points.en: Yeah. That's nice.

points.en: 311, okaky.
Mission Completed!

points.en: green light for a flight.

points.en: But it's the end of the lap.

points.en: Brilliant.
points.zh: 太棒了

points.en: No overtake from the right. Rules from the Touristenfahrten.
points.zh: 不能从右侧超车 游客日的规矩

points.en: Okay, let's cool down the car. Okay.
points.zh: 好了，让车子冷却下来

points.en: And what do you feel?
points.zh: 你觉得怎么样？

points.en: Car is very fast. Car is very capable. The brakes are great.
points.zh: 车快得离谱 性能很好 刹车给力

points.en: Yeah, but the driver, tell about me how suck I am.
points.zh: 但车手嘛，说说我有多菜吧

points.en: Good track knowledge and steering input,
points.zh: 对赛道很熟悉，转向输入不错

points.en: it seems like you struggle with the low speed corners,
points.zh: 但你在低速弯里似乎有点挣扎

points.en: where you put... When high speed, there is no problem,
points.zh: 特别是...但是高速弯反而没有问题

points.en: that's actually surprising,
points.zh: 让人很意外

points.en: because high speed you're fluid, you're going quite good,
points.zh: 高速路段很流畅，你的表现很好

points.en: but like, you know, Steilstrecke and stuff, you over brake the car,
points.zh: 可像小陡坡这些地方，你刹车太重了

points.en: and then, we're like really almost stand still, I'm like, umm.
points.zh: 几乎把车子刹停了，让我陷入深思

points.en: Usually, it's the other way around, people are not afraid to go slow
points.zh: 一般人情况正好相反，低速弯没有什么可怕的

points.en: or like and this... and the other thing.
points.zh: 这是会...然后还有就是

points.en: I would suggest is work on the brake application,
points.zh: 我建议改进一下刹车的力度

points.en: because you really slam the brakes it feels.
points.zh: 因为感觉你真的猛踩刹车

points.en: Okay, this is something that one racing driver told me already,
points.zh: 嗯嗯，有一个赛车手也是这么对我说的

points.en: that I slam the brakes and I should be more gentle.
points.zh: 说我刹太猛了，应该更轻柔地刹车

points.en: -Yes, exactly. -So, this is a common thought that I do wrong.
points.zh: -对的，没错 -看来这是我的老毛病

points.en: And that puts too much weight transition,
points.zh: 这回导致重心转移过于剧烈

points.en: the car goes in full ABS and that's when it skids.
points.zh: 会触发车子的ABS，开始打滑

points.en: You need to be like really gentle and
points.zh: 你得一开始温柔一点

points.en: then you start doing it faster, you still can be fast,
points.zh: 再逐渐加快速度，你仍然可以很快

points.en: -but just like really more soft. -I appreciate that.
points.zh: -只要更柔和一些 -我很受教

points.en: I need to work on this definitely,
points.zh: 我绝对要在这块下功夫

points.en: because you are not the first time person that spots this.
points.zh: 因为你也不是第一个指出来的

points.en: Yeah, but everything else...
points.zh: 嗯嗯，不过其他方面...

points.en: because then we can go to the shop directly.
points.zh: 因为直接可以直接回工作室

points.en: Okay, yeah.
points.zh: 好的，行

points.en: Everything else felt great, like I said, I didn't feel not safe with you.
points.zh: 其他真的没毛病，坐你的车没让我觉得不安全

points.en: You have good safety margin, like the steering and the braking.
points.zh: 你的转向和刹车都留足了安全余量

points.en: It's just like if you become just more smoother with braking,
points.zh: 只要你的刹车再丝滑点

points.en: and there like were a couple of corners where you really over brake the car,
points.zh: 就是有几个弯道你确实刹得太过了

points.en: where you could just like lift slightly. Everything else...
points.zh: 其实松点油门就好了 总体来说...

points.en: You are probably like the first Lambo driver that I was planning with,
points.zh: 你大概是我副驾坐过的首位兰博基尼司机

points.en: definitely the first Polish one.
points.zh: 绝对是第一个波兰人

points.en: Okay, I treat this as a compliment, so thank you, Misha,

points.en: I appreciate, because it is nice to hear some, you know, constructive stuff
points.zh: 我很感激，因为能听到这种建设性意见

points.en: about the style of your driving and so on.
points.zh: 特别是驾驶风格方面

points.en: It was good. Going your left and then we're immediately in the industrial park.
points.zh: 开得不错 左转然后我们马上就到工业园了

points.en: Okay, and how about the car? Tell me about the car.
points.zh: 那车子怎么样？说说这车吧

points.en: Yeah, the car is great.
points.zh: 嗯，车子非常棒

points.en: The power, I was very surprised that it was so manageable,
points.zh: 出乎我意料，动力非常可控

points.en: because I compared this with the Aventador,
points.zh: 特别是对比Aventador

points.en: and Aventador is just like whiplash, upshifts and lots of drama and emotion,
points.zh: Aventador换挡像抽鞭子，充满戏剧感和情绪张力

points.en: which is great, but on track really not usable.
points.zh: 非常带感，但赛道实用性差

points.en: Here you have linear power that is usable, that is not trying to kill you, and...
points.zh: 这车动力很线性，很可控，不会有那种要谋杀你的感觉...

points.en: -Straight and then right. -Okay.
points.zh: -直行后右转 -明白

points.en: So yeah, here you go to the right,
points.zh: 嗯嗯，就是这里右转

points.en: The brakes are great, the tyres so far they seem to manage also all right,
points.zh: 刹车超棒，轮胎现在来看也算是扛得住

points.en: so actually quite fantastic car, I mean it's like...
points.zh: 所以真的是台很棒的车，特别是...

points.en: actually different generation from Aventador.
points.zh: 和Aventador完全两个世代

points.en: Yes, I can agree. I used to have Aventador S and I can agree with you
points.zh: 对，我同意 我之前有Aventador S，完全同意

points.en: that it's a totally different car, they have improved much.
points.zh: 脱胎换骨的进化，提升非常大

points.en: The handling, the stability, the gearbox, of course. The gearbox is quite obvious,
points.zh: 操控、稳定性、变速箱 变速箱的进步很明显

points.en: but the other things, like driving, performance, handling, breaking even.
points.zh: 包括驾驶体验、性能、操控甚至刹车都有提升

points.en: -It's totally different level of the car. -Exactly.
points.zh: -整车完全不在同一层级 -没错

points.en: But, but, but, I have also SF90, and I can tell you that
points.zh: 但是，但我还有SF90，我可以这么说

points.en: the SF90 is more stable on the high speed corners. It seems to be glued.
points.zh: SF90高速弯还是更稳定 稳稳粘在地上

points.en: I don't know if there is like Venturi channel or something, but it's very glued.
points.zh: 不知道是文丘里通道还是什么的功劳，反正贴地性超强

points.en: And I tested this, not here on the Nürburgring,
points.zh: 我不是在纽博格林这里试的

points.en: -because road is very curvy... bumpy. -Bumpy.
points.zh: -因为纽北太...对，颠簸 -颠簸

points.en: but I tested this on the German Autobahn when I was driving here.
points.zh: 我来的时候在德国不限速高速上试过了

points.en: So, like you know, there is a A4 with no speed limit
points.zh: 就是那个A4高速，没有限速

points.en: and small curves and so on.
points.zh: 带着小弯那种

points.en: So, I was tested SF90. It was glued to the ground. This, not especially.
points.zh: 我试了试SF90 真的是贴地飞行 这车就没那么稳了

points.en: Not so much huh? Oh, interesting.
points.zh: 哦，没那么稳？有意思

points.en: -Yeah, interesting because you drove SF90 by yourself. -Yes.
points.zh: -你是亲自开过SF90对吧 -对的

points.en: Yeah, but with the... On the wrong side.
points.zh: 不过那次方向盘在错的那边

points.en: True.
points.zh: 这倒是

points.en: But, no, very nice car. I'm really positively impressed.
points.zh: 嗯，对，Revuelto真的让我印象深刻

points.en: Like I said, the the previous...
points.zh: 对比前代车型...

points.en: This out of the box, to be this good. Very, very, very surprised, happy,
points.zh: 它原厂状态就这么好 非常，非常，非常惊喜，开心

points.en: and yeah, it's very nice.
points.zh: 是啊，真的很好

points.en: -Okay, here we are. -Yep.
points.zh: -我们到了 -嗯嗯

points.en: Oh, my cameraman.
points.zh: 我的摄像师

points.en: All righty, awesome. Thanks a lot.

points.en: Thank you, Misha.

points.en: This was amazing.
points.zh: 这太棒了

points.en: That was pleasure, you know. We are the legend of the Nürburgring.
points.zh: 真的非常美好的体验 我也可以算纽博格林传奇了

points.en: So, for me, it was legend, and I'm cross fingers for the business,

points.en: for your son, for the people, for everything.

points.en: Thank you so much.

points.zh: Misha, Misha Charoudin，对吧？

points.en: Yes, thank you so much.

points.en: in a 720S and then 765LT also like three or four years ago.

points.en: So anyway, yeah, fresh from UK,
points.zh: 总之，刚刚从英国来的

points.en: because it's from UK, not from Malaysia, right?

With the massive downforce of a Honda Jazz...

points.en: You will see that she was very eager to go for a lap,
points.zh: 大家能看出来她特别想来跑圈

points.en: because she kept messaging me like, "Hey, come on, when are we going for a lap?"
points.zh: 一直给我发消息说 “嘿，我们什么时候去跑一圈啊”

points.en: I'm like, I'm busy doing more exciting stuff with the Honda Jazz, okay?
points.zh: 我说正忙着开本田飞度、玩更刺激的好吗？

points.en: So, not last—yes, last year—but beginning of last year,
points.zh: 我们是去年，准确说是去年年初

points.en: so technically, almost two years ago, we've done a lap with Honda Jazz of Alex,
points.zh: 严格来说差不多两年前，开着Alex的本田飞度跑了一圈

points.en: which was back then fully stock.
points.zh: 当时还是完全原厂的状态

points.en: It was kind of—you could say—a meme, because it's 83 horsepower,
points.zh: 可以说那次有点像玩梗，毕竟它只有83马力

points.en: and like, yeah, let's do it, because why not?
points.zh: 但我想着管他呢 试试呗

points.en: At the end of the day, if a car hasn't been on the channel yet,
points.zh: 反正只要是频道里没出现过的车子

points.en: I would gladly drive it, because at the end of the day,
points.zh: 我都乐意开一把，因为说到底

points.en: I actually want to make sort of a library of all the cars,
points.zh: 我想打造一个纽北所有车型的大合集

points.en: or as many cars driven as possible on the Nürburgring,
points.zh: 在纽博格林体验尽可能多的车型

points.en: so even if they are in stock condition, I would love to drive them,
points.zh: 就算它们是原厂车，我也很想试试

points.en: as long as they're safe, so don't come with extremely rusty, unsafe stuff.
points.zh: 前提是安全的，别是一堆锈迹、很危险的那种就好

points.en: But, so yeah, in that case, Honda Jazz was like,
points.zh: 当时本田飞度，我想的就是

points.en: "Okay, let's see what an 83 horsepower car can do."
points.zh: "好吧，一起来看看83马力表现如何"

points.en: It was actually quite fun—memeable fun—
points.zh: 老实说挺欢乐的，也很有梗

points.en: but almost two years later, a lot of things changed
points.zh: 不过将近两年之后，发生了不小的变化

points.en: Aside from the inflation, all the other nonsense.
points.zh: 除了通货膨胀，其他乱七八糟的

points.en: Yeah, I was like, if somebody knows how to get this size for a normal price,
points.zh: 谁知道哪里能用正常的价格买到这个尺寸的轮胎

points.en: please tell me. Now it's like 300 euros. It's bad.
points.zh: 现在要价300欧元，实在太离谱了

points.en: The car has received quite some mods, starting with—you'll see on the front,
points.zh: 这车子后来做了不少改装，先从最前面说起

points.en: it has semi-slick tyres, Advan Neova AD08 RS.
points.zh: 装了半热熔，Advan Neova AD08 RS

points.en: Yeah, RS. It has some different discs, brake discs.
points.zh: 对的，RS 刹车碟也换了

points.en: From Rotinger.
points.zh: 是Rotinger的

points.en: Yeah, and pads?
points.zh: 嗯，刹车皮呢？

points.en: Pads, Dixcel S.
points.zh: Dixcel S刹车皮

points.en: Yeah, yeah, yeah. Lines, fluid, irrelevant in this car, but there's something about it.
points.zh: 嗯嗯 刹车油、管路什么的也改了，虽然对这车意义不大

points.en: It helps. It helps.
points.zh: 但总归有帮助

points.en: Camber in the front, and new suspension from Vogtland,
points.zh: 前轮做了倾角，装了Vogtland避震

points.en: 40 millimeters lower and a little bit harder.
points.zh: 降低了40毫米，也变得硬了一点

points.en: Very nice, very nice. And there was some sway bars.
points.zh: 挺好的 挺好的 还加了防倾杆

points.en: In the rear, the car didn't have a... rear sway bar before,
points.zh: 在后面，后轴原来是没有防倾杆的

points.en: but I added one, and it does way better with it.
points.zh: 现在我加上之后变得好多了

points.en: Yeah, it's actually, you can really throw the car around,
points.zh: 是啊，现在车子开起来更加得心应手了

points.en: it rotates fantastic, and it also has rear seat delete,
points.zh: 转向非常灵活，当然后排座椅也拆了

points.en: because that's all the unnecessary weight,
points.zh: 因为都是没必要的死重

points.en: because you will definitely notice every kilogram on such a car,
points.zh: 对于这种车来说，每一公斤的变化你都能感知到

points.en: on such a low-powered car.
points.zh: 对于这种小马力车子

points.en: Fire extinguisher, also very safe, very smart, very good.
points.zh: 装了灭火器，很安全、很明智，挺好的

points.en: The main feature of this car is that it has a CVT gearbox.
points.zh: 这车的主要特点是它有一个CVT变速箱

points.en: So it's basically an automatic with a simulation of gears,
points.zh: 基本上就是自动挡，但挡位是模拟出来的

points.en: you could call it, that you can switch by yourself.
points.zh: 因为你也可以自己手动切换

points.en: Upshifting does by itself; You just need to downshift,
points.zh: 升档是自动的，降档需要手动

points.en: because it doesn't do it really by itself.
points.zh: 因为它自己不太会主动降挡

points.en: So sometimes we were getting carried away, so I needed to do that.
points.zh: 有时候我们忘乎所以了，忘记去降挡了

points.en: And the special L, long gear overdrive feature,
points.zh: 它还有L档，长齿比的功能

points.en: where it just keeps the RPM high, to help you to pull up the hill.
points.zh: 它能保持高转速，能帮助你更好爬坡

points.en: Yep, that's all there is to it.
points.zh: 嗯，基本情况就这样

points.en: Just missing a big wing, I guess.
points.zh: 现在就差一个大尾翼了

points.en: Yeah, because that's what you need with 83 horsepower, for all the drag.
points.zh: 这样才能和83匹大马力搭配嘛，增加下压力

points.en: Imagine DRS on this. DRS on this is just like a roof gets chopped off,
points.zh: 试想一下这车装DRS，那不得把车顶都削掉

points.en: so you don't have all the drag from the front windshield.
points.zh: 这样前面风挡的风阻也没了

points.en: Exactly, maybe one day.
points.zh: 说不定哪天真这么干

points.en: But a lot of people do K-swap them in the UK.
points.zh: 英国那边挺多人做K机移植的

points.en: I think even DMO had or has one, like K20 Turbo or something.

points.en: They are popular, unfortunately, and luckily, depends on how you look at it,
points.zh: 那边挺火的，说幸运也好不幸也罢，取决于你怎么看

points.en: we're in Germany, but in case of TÜV regulations, definitely big, unfortunately.
points.zh: 很遗憾，我们在德国，这里的车辆安全法规太严格了

points.en: We're not allowed to do fun stuff. We need to do everything by the book.
points.zh: 我们没法做那些好玩的事情，所有事情都得照规矩来

points.en: Sometimes a very outdated book. But who am I to talk?
points.zh: 甚至是陈腐的规矩 但我有什么资格说呢？

points.en: Anyway, we had lots of fun,
points.zh: 总之，我们玩得很开心

points.en: and that's something I wish you will have as well while watching this video.
points.zh: 我希望大家看这个视频也能这么开心

points.en: So, Alex, see you next time.
points.zh: Alex，下次见

points.en: Maybe with another car, because you're moving on to something else, probably.
points.zh: 说不定下次开别的车了，因为你也准备要换车了

points.en: Yeah, maybe a second car. Maybe a second car, maybe this with something else.
points.zh: 嗯，也许会再买一辆车，也可能保留它再添置别的什么

points.en: If someone else has a Jazz with some more power, let me know as well.
points.zh: 谁有台马力更大的飞度，也可以联系我

points.en: And I'll go, keep this piece of impatience satisfied or something. I don't know.
points.zh: 接下来，我得去应付一下这个急躁的家伙啥的

points.en: Alright, enjoy the lap.
points.zh: 好好享受这圈吧

points.en: And after doing a lap previously. Was it last year or...?

points.en: The last year of the beginning. The first day of last year, I think.

points.en: What you can do to a Honda Jazz?

points.en: And it's a CVT gearbox. It's shifting up by itself. I would only need to downshift.

points.en: Yeah, maybe a bit. A tiny bit.

points.en: Let's take the kerb, okay?
points.zh: 吃个路肩没问题吧？

points.en: To make sure that everything is... Okay, we can go.

points.en: 3, 2, 1. See ya!
Oh, yes.

points.zh: 待会你就知道了 简直离谱

points.en: We even done two laps because it's actually winter now.
points.zh: 我甚至跑了两圈，因为现在真的是冬天了

points.en: You might not see it, but it's quite cold.
points.zh: 可能看不出来，但其实挺冷的

points.en: Track is not getting warm, so we had to warm up these tires.
points.zh: 赛道暖不起来，所以我们得先暖胎

points.en: -But yeah... -Especially for you.
points.zh: -不过嘛... -尤其是对你来说

points.en: -Especially... -If it was on Cup 2s...
points.zh: -特别是... -要是换Cup 2的话...

points.en: It would have been undrivable on the street, yeah.
points.zh: Cup 2的话，在街上根本没法开

points.en: So it's on PS4S because you need to drive 5 hours back home still
points.zh: 所以用的是PS4S，因为你还得开5小时回家

points.en: on probably wet and busy highway.
points.zh: 还是又湿又堵的高速

points.en: So Cup 2Rs in the winter not good.
points.zh: 所以冬天用Cup 2R不行

points.en: This is very, very good. Actually, quite fresh.
points.zh: 这个就很好了 说真的，还挺新的

points.en: You can see it's 10th month of 25 or 10th batch,
points.zh: 你看，是25年第10周，或者第10批

points.en: but I guess 10th month, anyway.
points.zh: 我猜是第十个月，随便吧

points.en: Having said that, tires were one of the limiting factors.
points.zh: 话虽如此，轮胎还是拖了后腿

points.en: Suspension was okay,
points.zh: 悬挂还行

points.en: but still set a bit not completely compliant for the Nürburgring.
points.zh: 但调校还是不太适合纽博格林的路况

points.en: But then comes the other problem, also brakes and mostly the aero.
points.zh: 然后还有别的问题，刹车和空力，尤其是空力

points.en: Why am I saying this? Because it has a wing,
points.zh: 为什么这么说？因为它虽然有尾翼

points.en: but when you look at GT3 car that runs only 500 horsepower,
points.zh: 但你看GT3赛车才500匹马力

points.en: it has massive wing, massive front splitter, side skirts
points.zh: 却有巨大的尾翼、超大的前铲、侧裙

points.en: underneath the tunnels and everything,
points.zh: 车底的扩散器什么的

points.en: which helps it to press it down on the ground.
points.zh: 这样才能把车死死压在地面上

points.en: And it's running full slicks
points.zh: 而且用的是全热熔胎

points.en: and it's running big, big, big AP Racing brakes.
points.zh: 还有超大号的AP Racing刹车

points.en: And here you have a street car.
points.zh: 而这台，只是一台街车

points.en: So it's funny enough, it performs great on the straights,
points.zh: 挺有意思的，它在直道上表现极佳

points.en: but for the track...
points.zh: 但下赛道嘛...

points.en: Yeah, it's actually quite a lot of fighting.
points.zh: 嗯，是真的挺费劲的

points.en: So you could make it more track-optimized,
points.zh: 你可以让它更赛道化取向一点

points.en: putting like Cup 2R tires, putting crazy enough,
points.zh: 比如换上Cup 2R轮胎 疯狂点的话

points.en: maybe a bit somewhat better brakes on it, and definitely more aero.
points.zh: 刹车再升级一下 空力更是必须加强

points.en: That's all possible.
points.zh: 这些都能实现

points.en: Should speak to MTM, maybe we can slap a big splitter on it.
points.zh: 得跟MTM聊聊，说不定我们能给它装个大前铲

points.en: So who knows? But most importantly, the car didn't overheat.
points.zh: 谁知道呢？但最重要的是，车子没有过热

points.en: It went full send, full mode. Everything was great.
points.zh: 全力冲刺，火力全开 一切都很完美

points.en: And everything else can be... Some pops and bangs, cute.
points.zh: 其他的嘛... 这回火声，挺可爱的

points.en: Wait till you hear that car.
points.zh: 等你听到这台车再说

points.en: Actually got banned for the noise on the second lap.
points.zh: 其实这台车第二圈就因为噪音被禁了

points.en: Did you know that?
points.zh: 你知道了吗？

points.en: -It got banned. -You got banned?
points.zh: -被禁了 -你被禁了？

points.en: Yeah, on the second lap.
points.zh: 对，第二圈的时候

points.en: So and I think it's because of the turbo whistle or the wastegate,
points.zh: 我觉得是因为涡轮啸叫或者泄压阀

points.en: because the exhaust is not making much noise, in my opinion.
points.zh: 因为我觉得排气本身动静不算大

points.en: So but who cares? Yeah. Is there anything else we should mention?
points.zh: 但管他的呢 还有什么要提的吗？

points.en: Not really.
points.zh: 没了

points.en: Do you... So is it a turn-key solution that you just buy it as it is,
points.zh: 你是... 所以它是一个交钥匙方案，你直接买成品

points.en: or you bring a car and then MTM can build it, or is it both?
points.zh: 还是你带台车让MTM改，或者两种都行？

points.en: -It's both possible. -Yeah, yeah, yeah.
points.zh: -两种都可以 -嗯，好，好

points.en: Do you know roughly the price?
points.zh: 大概是什么价位？

points.en: -A lot. -I think it's around... It's six figures.
points.zh: -很贵 -我觉得大概... 六位数吧

points.en: -It's around... -Yeah, of course. Yeah, yeah.
points.zh: -大概... -那当然 嗯，是啊

points.en: That should be, should be.
points.zh: 应该的，应该的

points.en: But it's a big issue and... it's all German TÜV approved.
points.zh: 绝对是个大工程... 全车都过了德国TÜV认证

points.en: Yeah, everything is legal. Yeah, yeah, exactly.
points.zh: 嗯，完全合法上路 对，对，没错

points.en: So but yeah, for that you can go reach out to MTM
points.zh: 所以大家有兴趣的话可以联系MTM

points.en: and they can tell you...
points.zh: 他们会告诉你详情...

points.en: I'm only the driver guys, you know.
points.zh: 大家懂的，我只是一个开车的

points.en: Yeah, you're just the bringer.
points.zh: 对，你只是个送车的

points.en: Don't shoot, don't shoot the messenger.
points.zh: 别开枪，我只是传话的

points.en: And I like that. Exactly. So it was fast, it was epic,
points.zh: 我就喜欢这样 没错 所以这车很快，相当震撼

points.en: and I think for you now it's time to go watch the video.
points.zh: 我觉得现在是时候让大家去看看正片了

points.en: So enjoy and thanks again MTM for very special car.
points.zh: 好好享受，再次感谢MTM带来这台特别的车

points.en: So I don't know what can top this after that.
points.zh: 我不知道这之后还有什么车能超越它了

points.en: Maybe the same car in a big aero trim, but yeah, we'll see.
points.zh: 也许同款车配上大空力套件吧，我们拭目以待

points.en: Anyway, enjoy the sunset as well. It's actually quite nice.
points.zh: 对了，也好好欣赏日落吧 真的很美

points.en: Yeah, well, if it would focus.
points.zh: 嗯，要是能对上焦的话

points.en: Yeah, that's nice.
points.zh: 可以，确实不错

points.en: Not gonna lie, considering the weather conditions
points.zh: 说实话，考虑到天气状况

points.en: and the tire temperatures, pretty nervous.
points.zh: 还有轮胎温度，我挺紧张的

points.en: I mean, that's why we will be doing two laps.
points.zh: 所以我们会跑两圈

points.en: Warm up tires, get used to the car.
points.zh: 把轮胎热起来、熟悉车况

points.en: That's why I'm also in Performance. Sport mode on traction control.
points.zh: 所以开的是Performance模式 牵引力控制调Sport档

points.en: Listen how the car goes from the outside.
points.zh: 听听车外这声音

points.en: We are in first gear.
points.zh: 现在是一挡

points.en: I don't know the speeds we're doing.
points.zh: 不知道现在速度多少

points.en: But we could have done 300 with no short shifting.
points.zh: 如果不提前升挡，其实能上300的

points.en: All right, that's a serious cookie.
points.zh: 好吧，这家伙真的狠

points.en: Happy I'm wearing my baking gloves,
points.zh: 还好我戴着烘焙手套

points.en: because it's just out of the oven.
points.zh: 刚从烤箱里拿出来似的

points.en: The car needs semi-slicks, Cup 2, Cup 2R, warmed up on a summer day.
points.zh: 这车需要半热熔胎，Cup 2或者Cup 2R，夏天暖透了再上路

points.en: This is...
points.zh: 这是...

points.en: Let's see.
points.zh: 看看吧

points.en: And it needs a big front splitter
points.zh: 这车还得配个大前铲

points.en: because the front end is lifting up so much.
points.zh: 不然车头抬得太厉害了

points.en: I'm not intimidated often by a car, but...
points.zh: 我很少会被一台车吓到，但是...

points.en: but this is one of those cases.
points.zh: 这次真有点怕了

points.en: Hop, Mégane!
points.zh: 梅甘娜，快！

points.en: The power is so linear.
points.zh: 动力输出太线性了

points.en: It's actually quite good,
points.zh: 这真的挺好的

points.en: but yeah, we're missing the grip on the tires.
points.zh: 但就是轮胎抓地力跟不上

points.en: Are they actually getting hot?
points.zh: 它们真的在升温了吗？

points.en: I mean, the car does not feel fast.
points.zh: 我是说，这车感觉上不快

points.en: Because the acceleration is so linear, so refined.
points.zh: 因为加速太线性、太细腻了

points.en: You need to be aware of that
points.zh: 这点你得心里有数

points.en: when you're approaching a braking zone on a corner,
points.zh: 进弯前到刹车区的时候

points.en: that you're doing double or triple the speeds you'd usually be doing.
points.zh: 你的速度可能是平时的两三倍

points.en: I never had a car take off there.
points.zh: 从没哪辆车在那飞起来过

points.en: I never knew it was possible to have a jump there. What the hell?
points.zh: 从来不知道那里还能起跳 搞什么鬼？

points.en: This is quite insane.
points.zh: 真的太离谱了

points.en: Suspension is a bit soft setup.
points.zh: 悬挂设定偏软

points.en: You can feel probably the car move around.
points.zh: 能感觉到车子在晃

points.en: I mean, you can see it maybe.
points.zh: 可能镜头里都能看出来

points.en: So it's really cautious with the corners,
points.zh: 所以过弯得特别小心

points.en: and the front end grip is really missing because it has a wing,
points.zh: 前轴抓地力严重不足，虽然有尾翼

points.en: but it's just like a proper GT3 splitter.
points.zh: 但前铲不像GT3那样给力

points.en: Because at the end, GT3 cars have 500 horsepower.
points.zh: 毕竟GT3赛车也就500匹马力

points.en: This has two and a half times more that.
points.zh: 这台是它的两倍半还多

points.en: So it's the aero is really lacking for on-track performance.
points.zh: 所以下压力对于赛道来说真的不够

points.en: But let's be honest...
points.zh: 但说实话...

points.en: as a daily, which this could be,
points.zh: 日常代步，他完全可以胜任

points.en: or a street car, this is more than enough.
points.zh: 或者当街车开，这性能绰绰有余

points.en: Oh no.
points.zh: 糟了

points.en: Saved by the yellow.
points.zh: 多亏了黄旗救场

points.en: I don't even know if I should do a second lap.
points.zh: 我都不知道要不要跑第二圈

points.en: I mean, maybe because we're gonna have like optimal temperature tires

points.en: and otherwise the internet is going to complain
points.zh: 不然网友们又要吐槽了

points.en: that I haven't done a second lap.
points.zh: 说我没跑第二圈

points.en: So for the sake of science,
points.zh: 所以为了科学严谨

points.en: we will drop the pressures and try it out.
points.zh: 我们降个胎压再试试看

points.en: Unless something big has happened,

points.en: then they're gonna close the track.
points.zh: 不然赛道应该还能继续跑

points.en: But let's see.
points.zh: 先看看情况

points.en: Oil trail on the right.
points.zh: 右边有油渍

points.en: So that's the main issue.
points.zh: 这就是主要问题

points.en: I've seen an oil trail.
points.zh: 我看到油迹了

points.en: I'm not sure if I'm okay to proceed again.
points.zh: 不确定还能不能继续跑

points.en: Because I do not want to slip with this car.
points.zh: 因为我可不想让这台车打滑

points.en: There was no yellow light, so...
points.zh: 黄灯没亮，所以...

points.en: maybe that's the car that dropped oil.
points.zh: 可能就是刚才那台车漏的油

points.en: I never done 300 km/h.
points.zh: 我从没上过300

points.en: After the exit.
points.zh: 出弯之后

points.en: On the straight.
points.zh: 在大直道上

points.en: In TF.
points.zh: 在游客日

points.en: I think that's all we need to say about this car.
points.zh: 我觉得这车已经不用多说什么了

points.en: We get quite often cars that whose tuners...
points.zh: 我们经常遇到一些车，改装厂或者车主...

points.en: owners claim to have a lot of horsepower.
points.zh: 号称马力多么多么大

points.en: And then they literally slower than stock cars.
points.zh: 结果跑得比原厂车还慢

points.en: I think this one is no bullshit.
points.zh: 但这台车绝对货真价实

points.en: What the hell.
points.zh: 太夸张了

points.en: All right, yeah, let's drop the pressures and see if we can...
points.zh: 好吧，先把胎压放一点，看看能不能...

points.en: I don't even know,
points.zh: 我也说不准了

points.en: we're definitely not gonna try to go faster because f that.
points.zh: 反正肯定不冲更快了，去他的

points.en: My god.
points.zh: 我的天

points.en: I'm definitely not going to be talking now.
points.zh: 我现在肯定不说话了

points.en: So I need to really concentrate.
points.zh: 得全神贯注才行

points.en: In these conditions, it's worse than rain on a hot day.
points.zh: 这种条件下，比大热天雨战还糟糕

points.en: I am not full throttle by the way.
points.zh: 顺便说一下，我还没全油

points.en: And I don't care how fast it was.
points.zh: 而且我也不在乎具体多快

points.en: It was fast.
points.zh: 反正就是快

points.en: Even GT3 RS has struggles with low speed grip.
points.zh: 连GT3 RS在低速抓地力挣扎的时候

points.en: Come on, screen, go back.
points.zh: 拜托 屏幕，切回去

points.en: There we go.
points.zh: 好了

points.en: Oh, from Split?
points.zh: 斯普利特来的？

points.en: Came back just yesterday from there.
points.zh: 昨天刚从那里回来

points.en: Trust this.
points.zh: 信它一回

points.en: Last time I passed the red Mustang here,
points.zh: 上次我在这超那台红色野马的时候

points.en: it didn't end well for the red Mustang.
points.zh: 那台红色野马下场不太好

points.en: The tires are out of the temperature window now
points.zh: 轮胎现在已经不在工作温度区间了

points.en: because this is way too much.
points.zh: 因为这太夸张了

points.en: Tires are hot, the track is way too cold, so horrible combination.
points.zh: 胎温高，赛道冷，简直是灾难组合

points.en: Okay, that's enough. Let's cool down.
points.zh: 好了够了 冷却一下吧

points.en: Insane, insane.
points.zh: 离谱，太离谱了

points.en: I never would have thought that I would say that
points.zh: 我从没想过我会说这话

points.en: a car with a wing
points.zh: 一台带尾翼

points.en: with ceramic brake discs
points.zh: 配碳陶刹车碟的车

points.en: needs to have better brakes and better aero.
points.zh: 居然还需要更好的刹车和空力

points.en: I mean, with the wing, I could have said that.
points.zh: 带个尾翼确实可以这么说

points.en: Very simple reason for that.
points.zh: 理由非常简单

points.en: Again, GT3 cars have 500 horsepower on full slicks,
points.zh: 再次强调，GT3赛车是500匹马力配全热熔胎

points.en: on racing brakes, AP Racing monocaliper monoblock caliper,
points.zh: 配赛用刹车、AP Racing单体卡钳

points.en: on proper aero, massive front splitter, massive rear wing.
points.zh: 配完整的空力套件，大前铲、大尾翼

points.en: It's not even comparable to it.
points.zh: 这台车根本没法比

points.en: And here we have two and a half more times horsepower
points.zh: 然而我们这台车的马力达到了GT3赛车

points.en: than a GT3 car has.
points.zh: 2.5倍以上

points.en: So... what's wrong?
points.zh: 所以... 怎么了？

points.en: -The car is too loud. -Too loud?
points.zh: -这车太吵了 -太吵了？

points.en: Oh, okay.
points.zh: 好吧

points.en: Weil jetzt gerade habe ich schon eine Runde gedreht, aber okay.
points.zh: 因为我刚已经跑了一圈了 不过行吧

points.en: Yeah, yeah, it's okay. Okay.
points.zh: 没事，没事，好的 好

points.en: Dann gehe ich was anderes fahren. Jo, danke.
points.zh: 那我去开别的车了 好，谢了

points.en: Well, I guess changing the...
points.zh: 嗯，我猜调整了...

points.en: Going for the second lap after doing the pressures did help
points.zh: 调完胎压之后第二圈确实有帮助

points.en: because we could keep it more fast on the gas,
points.zh: 因为我们给油能给得更猛了

points.en: but there was a Mégane
points.zh: 当时前面有台梅甘娜

points.en: before me at the microphone section.
points.zh: 在经过测噪路段的时候

points.en: Can not tell you where it is, but you can guess where Mégane was.
points.zh: 不能告诉你具体位置，但你能猜到梅甘娜在哪

points.en: Oh, I think this is...
points.zh: 这是不是...

points.en: No, it's not the Fiesta I drove a few years ago.
points.zh: 不是，不是我几年前开的那台嘉年华

points.en: So yeah,
points.zh: 是啊

points.en: and I think the car is too loud on the turbos
points.zh: 我觉得是这车涡轮声音太大了

points.en: because the turbo whistle is too loud, not the exhaust,
points.zh: 因为啸叫声太吵，不是排气的问题

points.en: because exhaust doesn't sound bad at all,
points.zh: 因为排气声听起来完全没问题

points.en: but I think the high-pitched whistle of the turbo/wastegate maybe.
points.zh: 但我觉得可能是涡轮/泄压阀那种高频的哨声

points.en: Made it a bit too much.
points.zh: 有点太过了

points.en: So, the main thing,
points.zh: 那么说回正题

points.en: MTM has done a phenomenal job,
points.zh: MTM做得非常出色

points.en: because although I was trying to push it on the track
points.zh: 因为虽然我在赛道上想使劲推

points.en: and it was difficult to drive because we do not have the full slicks,
points.zh: 而且因为我们没有上全热熔胎，确实不好驾驭

points.en: we do not have the aero, we do not have like the really big brakes,
points.zh: 也没有空力套件，也没有那种大刹车

points.en: we were still quite on it, high RPM range, high on it,
points.zh: 但我们还是顶着高转，很激进地在跑

points.en: and the car did not overheat.
points.zh: 车子完全没有过热

points.en: Now, of course, we're driving in the winter,
points.zh: 当然，现在是冬天在开

points.en: but... I've driven plenty of cars in the winter
points.zh: 但是... 我冬天也开过不少车

points.en: that already would overheat
points.zh: 那些车早就过热了

points.en: with significantly less extreme mods than this car.
points.zh: 而且改装程度可比这台轻多了

points.en: So, having said that,
points.zh: 所以这么说吧

points.en: MTM has done a fantastic job when it comes to the tuning kit.
points.zh: 就这套改装套件而言 MTM做得非常出色

points.en: And again, I doubt people who would buy such a car
points.zh: 而且说真的，我怀疑，那些买这种车

points.en: or build such a car would take it out on track. I mean, why not,
points.zh: 或者改这种车的人，真的会下赛道吧 不过，有何不可呢？

points.en: when you also change the other components.
points.zh: 只要你把其他部件也升级了

points.en: At that point you might end up just driving
points.zh: 到那种程度，你可能就直接去开

points.en: racing GT3 professionally, but who knows?
points.zh: 职业GT3赛车了，但谁知道呢？

points.en: So most of these cars are going to be very, very fast street cars

if you put it on stickier rubber.

-3582, yeah. -Yeah, yeah.
Not too bad because I think the GTR I drove recently was like 42 GTX

points.en: but you can solve it with some clicks obviously.
points.zh: 不过调几格就能解决

points.en: Really, really enjoyed it.

points.en: that I'm done for today or the car.
points.zh: 今天这台车到此为止了

points.en: Surprisingly enough, not.

points.en: Or maybe they missed us.
points.zh: 可能没注意到我们

points.en: Oh well.
points.zh: 行吧

points.en: Well, then maybe we didn't get banned.
points.zh: 好吧，那可能我们没被禁

points.en: Maybe we didn't drive it hard enough, which is maybe a good thing.

points.en: I don't know.

points.en: So... yeah, I loved it.
points.zh: 所以... 真的爱了

points.en: I really, really loved it.
points.zh: 我真的太喜欢了

points.en: Could I wish for something more?

points.en: So...

points.en: Yeah, let's not... Let's not overdo it.
