points.en: Hello everyone and welcome to probably the most anticipated video of the year.
points.zh: 大家好，欢迎收看可能是今年最受期待的一期视频

points.en: A quick reminder earlier this year in June,
points.zh: 先快速回顾一下，今年六月

points.en: Anton and I had quite a bonding experience, I would say
points.zh: 我和Anton经历了一次深刻的"交心时刻"

points.en: where we had, without over-exaggerating, near deadly crash on the Nürburgring
points.zh: 毫不夸张地说，我们在纽博格林遭遇了近乎致命的撞车

points.en: where I was driving his BMW M4.
points.zh: 当时我正驾驶着他的宝马M4

points.en: And therefore, I always say the driver is always responsible
points.zh: 毕竟我一贯的主张就是谁开车，谁负责

points.en: and since I made this whoopsie, you can say I said,
points.zh: 既然捅了这个篓子，我就主动提出

points.en: "Listen, I want to rectify the mistake so I can either
points.zh: “听着，我想弥补这个错误”

points.en: build you a new car, I can give you the cash value of the car,
points.zh: “要么给你造辆新车，要么按车价赔偿”

points.en: or we can build something else." To which you said,
points.zh: “或者搞点别的项目”  结果你说

points.en: "I want to fulfill my dream, and I want to have a big white van
points.zh: “我想实现梦想，搞辆波兰牌照的大白货车”

points.en: on Polish plate so I can do sketchy business."
points.zh: “方便做些不太正经的生意”

points.en: Jokes aside, inside we have van full of parts to build the new BMW M4
points.zh: 不开玩笑，货车里塞满了组装新宝马M4的零件

points.en: and we also have a new chassis.
points.zh: 我们还有一个全新的车架

points.en: And actually, we're going to unveil another project car of ours.
points.zh: 现在来揭晓我们的另一台项目车

points.en: this is—
points.zh: 这就是—

points.en: Sorry not sorry, Gio!
points.zh: Gio我不是故意的

points.en: or was an Audi RS Q3—and as you can see on this car and the BMW M4,
points.zh: 原本是奥迪RS Q3—正如大家在它和宝马M4一样

points.en: hundreds of cars all over the world get crashed every single day,
points.zh: 全球每天都有成百上千台车发生事故

points.en: not only on the Nürburgring,
points.zh: 不仅仅在纽博格林

points.en: and sometimes being repaired without mentioning the damage,
points.zh: 车子修好以后就对之前损伤只字不提

points.en: and then when you end up buying it, you might end up with a lemon.
points.zh: 然后等你买到手了，才发现是大事故车

points.en: And this is why it is important to run a CarVertical check
points.zh: 所以，用CarVertical做车况检

points.en: to review all the hidden history.
points.zh: 扒一扒隐藏记录很重要

points.en: So in the case of this Audi RS Q3, it says that the purpose was okay;
points.zh: 比如这台奥迪RS Q3，显示车辆的用途正常

points.en: odometer was good which is, for us, very important.
points.zh: 里程表没问题，这对我们很关键

points.en: Legal status is okay, but the damage needs some attention.
points.zh: 法律状态正常，但损伤需要留意

points.en: It shows that the vehicle was damaged
points.zh: 报告显示车辆受损

points.en: and actually the vehicle was severely damaged on left side, the rear, the front,
points.zh: 具体是车子的左侧、尾部、前部严重受损

points.en: and "other." Yep, that seems like correct.
points.zh: 还有"其他部位"，确实没错

points.en: More importantly, it also shows that estimated repair costs are
points.zh: 更重要的是，它会显示预估维修费

points.en: between 15 to 20 thousand euros.
points.zh: 在1万5到2万欧元之间

points.en: Now luckily, that doesn't apply to us, because our only intention is
points.zh: 好在这和我们无关，因为我们买来只想

points.en: to take the engine and transmission out of this car,
points.zh: 拆走它的发动机和变速箱

points.en: and use for our Opel Speedster project.
points.zh: 用在欧宝Speedster项目上

points.en: to what we have seen when we were buying the car.
points.zh: 和我们购车时看到的一致还挺方便

points.en: The only thing you need for your CarVertical check is the VIN
points.zh: CarVertical检测只需要车辆识别码

points.en: and the registration plate of the car of your interest.
points.zh: 还有你感兴趣车子的车牌号

points.en: And, as a little bonus, CarVertical is giving you 20% off
points.zh: 作为小福利，CarVertical给你打八折

points.zh: 感谢CarVertical赞助本期视频

points.en: So, back to the van and the man with a plan
points.zh: 回到货车和这位早有计划的家伙

points.en: actually, in this case, as mentioned, we are going to rebuild the car.
points.zh: 正如所说，这次我们要重建这台车

points.en: Before we're going to go over some of those parts,
points.zh: 在我们细说其中一些零件之前

points.en: let's talk a bit about some additional costs that we have managed to collect
points.zh: 让我们先聊聊这次惊心动魄的"飞行事故"中

points.en: on our airline of... It was quite a flight of the trip.
points.zh: 我们产生的一些额外费用

points.en: So, because people want to talk about
points.zh: 毕竟大家总喜欢讨论

points.en: how much does it cost to crash on the Nürburgring.
points.zh: 在纽博格林撞车要花多少钱

points.en: When it comes to the recovery, we paid 598 euros and 57 cents.
points.zh: 先说拖车费，我们付了598.57欧元

points.en: Now usually, if you have a crash on the Nürburgring before,
points.zh: 一般来说，如果你在纽北撞过车

points.en: you might know that the cost is roughly 300 euros.
points.zh: 可能知道拖车费大概300欧

points.en: In this case, it is indeed 290,
points.zh: 这次基础费用确实是290欧

points.en: but we got charged additional charge for an extra person to help to recover the car,
points.zh: 但因为额外请人帮忙拖车 我们被加收了额外费用

points.en: and additional 50% because it was on a Saturday.
points.zh: 又因为是周六，还被加收了50%

points.en: So, if you decide to crash on the Nürburgring, do not crash on a Saturday or Sunday,
points.zh: 所以你想在纽北撞车的话，别挑周六和周日

points.en: you might be paying extra because you need to pay for other people's wages.
points.zh: 否则就要多付钱 毕竟要付别人的加班费嘛

points.en: That's where it is. Regarding the barrier,
points.zh: 就是这样 再说护栏

points.en: that made for me the most expensive barrier damage so far ever.
points.zh: 这是我有史以来付过最贵的护栏赔偿

points.en: It was 10,289 euros.
We clipped two barriers. It's... No, three. Three. Three barriers.
points.zh: 我们蹭到了两道护栏，不，三道，整整三道

points.en: But very, very impressively I cannot show you pictures
points.zh: 可惜因为媒体协议的原因

points.en: because of the media licence unfortunately.
points.zh: 没法给大家看现场画面

points.en: But basically, almost straight through, bounced off it, bounce on once,
points.zh: 简单说就是直线撞上，弹开，再撞两次

points.en: and then bounce again on the other side.
points.zh: 然后弹到另一侧

points.en: So yeah, three barriers was quite impressive.
points.zh: 没错，连撞三道护栏确实壮观的

points.en: 10 grand, of which, actually, your insurance has paid 70% because 30% is your own risk.
points.zh: 一万欧元，其中保险付了70%，30%是自付额

points.en: So, sometimes your car might be insured to drive on the Nürburgring and you might get paid out
points.zh: 所以，有时你的车险涵盖了纽博格林是能获得赔付的

points.en: Only the barriers were paid out, because public session Nürburgring is being considered public road.
points.zh: 但也只有护栏赔偿能走保险，因为公众开放日算公共道路

points.en: So barrier was okay, but driving your car too fast on the road is not okay;
points.zh: 护栏可以赔付，但开快车本身是不保的

points.en: Therefore, yeah, we need to cover it ourselves.
points.zh: 所以车损得自己承担

points.en: Finally, I had to pay roughly a thousand euros,
points.zh: 最后，我还付了大概1000欧元

points.en: I need to find the bill, to the local government of Adenau
points.zh: 让我找找账单，付给阿德瑙当地政府

points.en: for sending the fire department and cleaning up the mess that we made.
points.zh: 作为消防队出动和清理现场的费用

points.en: So, that was additional thousand euros.
points.zh: 这又是1000欧元

points.en: So, overall, the crash itself without counting the car
points.zh: 撞车本身，排除了车损

points.en: and the potentially medical bills that were covered by the insurance.
points.zh: 也不算保险涵盖的医疗费用

points.en: By the way, could have been a lot more.
points.zh: 其实本来可能更贵

points.en: But other than that, it was about 12,000 euros in total.
points.zh: 除此之外，撞车总共花了约12000欧

points.en: Since I mentioned the fire department, let's speak about another partner that we have
points.zh: 既然说到了消防队，必须介绍另一位合作伙伴

points.en: DF... Lapo, how do I pronounce this, because you're Italian?
points.zh: DF... Lapo你是意大利人，说说这个怎么读

points.en: Antincendio. Anti, Antin-cendio. Yes.
points.zh: Antincendio. 反，防火

points.en: When we had a crash, the car caught fire on three different spots.
points.zh: 撞车的时候，车子有三处起火点

points.en: I think two in the front and one in the rear.
points.zh: 车头有两处，车尾有一处

points.en: Therefore, for the rebuild we're going to have a full fire suppression system.
points.zh: 所以，这次重建我们会安装一整套的灭火系统

points.en: So, if we're going to go out again, we're going to need it. We're going to use it
points.zh: 下次我们出场，我们就需要它，能用上了

points.en: and not wait for the fire department to pay a thousand euros.
points.zh: 不用等消防队来 再花那1000欧

points.en: Guess what, the price of this system is also about 11 or maybe 1300 euros,
points.zh: 你猜怎么着，这套系统价格大概1100到1300欧

points.en: I need to double check, almost as expensive as getting a fire department involved when you crash.
points.zh: 我需要再确认一下，几乎和车祸叫消防队一样贵

points.en: So, this is actually much cheaper for you to do so.
points.zh: 但长期来看更划算

points.en: We have lots and lots of parts. Literally enough to rebuild a complete car here.
points.zh: 我们有很多很多零件，足够重建一辆完整的车了

points.en: You can insert all the B-roll and see how much it is.
points.zh: 插段空镜让大家感受一下

points.en: It's really way too much, insert B-roll of all...
points.zh: 真的太多了，所有零件的空镜

points.en: Literally everything is there, almost everything. We're missing a couple of important things.
points.zh: 什么都有，基本全齐了，就差几个关键部件

points.en: Going backwards, because what can we reuse from the old car?
points.zh: 回头看，旧车能用的有啥呢？

points.en: -Engine, gearbox. That's it. -That's it.
points.zh: -发动机、变速箱 -就这些了

points.en: That's the only thing. Now, before you're gonna say like,
points.zh: 就仅此而已了，大家先别着急说

points.en: "Oh, but the engine is going to explode," or,
points.zh: “发动机肯定已经爆了”

points.en: "It was upside down in the air for 0.75 seconds, so probably it has oil starvation."
points.zh: 或者"在空中倒置了0.75秒，可能已经机油短缺了"

points.en: Worry not. The engine is disassembled, so the bearings will be replaced.
points.zh: 别担心，发动机已拆解了，会换新的轴承

points.en: It will be definitely good. Gearbox, also double checked. It will be good.
points.zh: 肯定没问题的 变速箱也检查过没问题

points.en: The differential, unfortunately, did not survive. So, that has been bought new,
points.zh: 不幸的是，差速器没挺住，所以买了个新的

points.en: and it's now being upgraded by KMP together with 24/7 Performance,
points.zh: 正在由KMP和24/7 Performance一起升级

points.en: and a couple of other more parts that we are waiting for...
points.zh: 还有其他一些零件 我们还在等

points.en: Suspension mods etc., that's for next video,
points.zh: 悬挂改装什么的，下期再说

points.en: but now, the main question is, where's the chassis?
points.zh: 现在的重点是，车架在哪？

points.en: Isn't she wonderful? Right now we're filming slightly more in the future，
points.zh: 是不是很惊艳？这段其实是未来补拍的

points.en: that's why Anton is not with me.
points.zh: 所以Anton不在

points.en: He's already in Poland unpacking all of the fancy goody stuff.
points.zh: 他已经去波兰拆那些宝贝零件了

points.en: So, we are right now at 24/7 Performance, where AST cage has been welded inside the chassis.
points.zh: 我们在24/7 Performance这里，AST防滚架已焊在车架上了

points.en: Now, first about the chassis itself.
points.zh: 先说说车架子本身吧

points.en: Previously, when we unveiled the crashed car and when I said
points.zh: 之前，当我们展示撞毁的车时 我说过

points.en: I'm going to rebuild a car to Anton,
points.zh: 我要给Anton重建一台车

points.en: many people have said "There is no way you can rebuild that."
points.zh: 不少人评论说 “这车绝对修不好的”

points.en: I know, what I meant is I'm going to build the same kind of car
points.zh: 我懂，其实我的意思是给Anton造台同款

points.en: for Anton as he had before we had the incident.
points.zh: 和事故前一模一样的车子

points.en: And this involved that, we needed definitely different chassis.
points.zh: 这就意味着，我们肯定需要新的车架子

points.en: Now, of course, we had multiple options.
points.zh: 当然，我们有几个选项

points.en: We could have gone full Mat Armstrong, get another crashed car
points.zh: 可以学Mat Armstrong那样搞台事故车

points.en: or slightly dented car with a complete chassis and then rebuild that.
points.zh: 或者拿一台微暇车子的车架来重建

points.en: But, in this case, I believe he needs to have proper new car
points.zh: 现在这个情况，Anton还是需要正经新车

points.en: and also, due to our applications, it makes sense to start from zero.
points.zh: 而且从改装用途来看，从零开始更合理

points.en: So in this case, we actually have a brand-new chassis that you can order from BMW,
points.zh: 于是，我们从宝马订购了这个全新的车架

points.en: because this is actually a delivery sheet from BMW.
points.zh: 这就是宝马的发货单

points.en: So, in case you want to order one yourself, the part number is 41009629790.
points.zh: 如果你也想要的话，零件号是41009629790

points.en: In this case, you get a chassis with a VIN number.
points.zh: 你会得到一个带车辆识别码的车架

points.en: We could have gone full Polish spec because it's already Polish built,
points.zh: 其实我们完全走波兰规定，因为在波兰重建嘛

points.en: and taken the VIN number from the other crashed chassis,
points.zh: 随便拿一个撞毁车架上的识别码过来

points.en: and put it on and pretend like nothing happened.
points.zh: 放在新车架上加装无事发生过

points.en: But in this case, we have a brand-new VIN number,
points.zh: 但现在有了全新的车辆识别码

points.en: so we're going to have literally a brand-new car.
points.zh: 等同于我们有了一辆全新的车子

points.en: This also means you can actually get a chassis without a VIN number,
points.zh: 其实你也可以买没有识别码的车架的

points.en: and you can also get a chassis from a GT4 or a GT3 car,
points.zh: 或者买GT4、GT3赛车的底盘

points.en: and the option was there on the table,
points.zh: 这些选项都考虑过

points.en: but since he wants to preserve some streetability we went with that.
points.zh: 但为了能保证合法上街，选了现在这个

points.en: The other reason GT4 chassis cost over 30,000 euros, the chassis alone,
points.zh: 另一个原因是GT4底盘光车架就3万多欧元

points.en: whereas this is roughly one third of the price.
points.zh: 现在这个只要三分之一价格

points.en: So, the chassis here it arrived in the primer and,
points.zh: 车架到货的时候只有底漆

points.en: as you can see, and as mentioned, it has AST cage inside.
points.zh: 如你所见，如前所述，里面焊上了AST防滚架

points.en: We had the AST roll bar installed in the car that we had an incident with.
points.zh: 发生事故的车子原来装的就是AST防滚架

points.en: And I believe it definitely contributed to saving our lives.
points.zh: 相信那也是我们的救命功臣之一

points.en: So, therefore, in this case, we decided to, you know what,
points.zh: 自然而然地，我们就决定

points.en: since this build will be significantly faster, and also for a fact that
points.zh: 既然要造更快，还要跑比赛的车子

points.en: it will be a competition car use, we need a full cage and let's go with AST.
points.zh: 所以必须装全笼的防滚架，那还是选AST吧

points.en: So we had AST cage. It arrives to you in a box.
points.zh: AST防滚架是整箱到货

points.en: You can do a full specification actually yourself.
points.zh: 可以完全的自定义规格

points.en: You can go to for a different style sidebars.
points.zh: 选择不同风格的侧杠

points.en: You can go for NASCAR sidebars for the, like the doors for drift specifications etc.
points.zh: 你可以选NASCAR式的侧杠，或者漂移规格的门等等

points.en: There's lots of options, and also the option
points.zh: 有很多很多的选项，还可以选择

points.en: to put the cage towards the front towers, which it has.
points.zh: 延伸到前塔顶，现在这个就有

points.en: It sits also very close to the chassis itself to utilize most of the space
points.zh: 而且它非常贴近车架子，能最大化利用空间

points.en: that you have, as a driver, and also contributes to the rigidity of everything.
points.zh: 能保证驾驶员的空间，并增强整体的刚性

points.en: But fantastic work. It just needed to be welded and this is what 24/7 Performance has done.
points.zh: 非常不错，现在24/7 Performance已经完成了焊接

points.en: So we will get soon our FIA certificate with that as well,
points.zh: 我们很快就能拿到FIA的认证

points.en: and that's all there is to it.
points.zh: 就这么简单

points.en: Right now, the car will be picked up in the next couple of days by Anton,
points.zh: 接下来几天，Anton就会来取车

points.en: and it will go, again, also to Poland to be painted first.

points.en: I don't know which color it will get.
points.zh: 我都不知道什么颜色

points.en: Probably simple white because the car will be wrapped anyway for the exterior.
points.zh: 可能就是基础白，反正车子外面会全部贴膜

points.en: And for the interior I think simple white is traditionally BMW motorsport anyway.
points.zh: 内饰的话，基础白也是宝马赛车的传统嘛

points.en: I guess that's all there is to say about the chassis.
points.zh: 车架的部分就说到这里吧

points.en: So now, back to the van full of parts, and to tell you about our next steps.
points.zh: 现在回到装满零件的货车，说说下一步计划

points.en: I hope nothing is gonna fall out from behind.
points.zh: 希望后面东西别掉出来

points.en: Shiny stuff. Some additional overview. So we have here the under tray.
points.zh: 闪亮亮的零件，先看这块底护板

points.en: We have the full subframe because that was dead as well.
points.zh: 还有整个副车架，因为旧的已经撞废了

points.en: And massive... -bumper. -Oh, that's a bumper.
points.zh: 超大... -前杠，对这是前杠

points.en: But why do you have it? Because we have a full carbon fiber stuff.
points.zh: 为啥要买这个？我们不是有全套碳纤维件吗？

points.en: It's gonna be plastic, cheaper and it's gonna be replaced quite often as you know.
points.zh: 这是一个塑料的，更便宜，反正要经常换

points.en: You see we're building it already with... having in mind that things might go wrong.
points.zh: 你看我们在重建阶段，早早就考虑到可能会再出意外

points.en: As mentioned, already gave it away the car will be getting
points.zh: 刚刚我说漏嘴了，车子将会有

points.en: a full carbon fiber body kit, wide body with some extra bits
points.zh: 全碳纤维的套件，带着宽体什么的

points.en: with some aero etc., etc., brakes you name it. That is for the next time.
points.zh: 空力套件什么的，还有刹车等等，留到下期再说

points.en: For now, we really wanted to get this video out of the way,
points.zh: 现在，我们想着先把这期视频发出来

points.en: because people have been for a very good reason asking like,
points.zh: 毕竟大家一直都在催更，不停在问

points.en: "Hey Misha, what's up with this M4 that you said you're gonna rebuild?"
points.zh: “Misha，说好的重建M4到哪里去了？”

points.en: Well, everything's work in progress.
points.zh: 一切都在推进中嘛

points.en: We had to wait quite some time for a brand-new chassis,
points.zh: 等新的车架和零件花了不少时间

points.en: for all these parts, to arrive, and a lot more to come.
points.zh: 还有好多好多的部件还没有到货

points.en: But now, the plan is, this is going to Poland, because you are from Poland.
points.zh: 现在计划是把车运到波兰，毕竟Anton是波兰人

points.en: So, no jokes about it's cheaper to rebuild the car in Poland.
points.zh: 别说在波兰改车便宜是笑话了

points.en: -It is. -It is.
points.zh: 事实就是

points.en: But in this case there's actual, actual reason behind it,
points.zh: 不过这次真有正经的理由

points.en: aside from the fact that while you rebuild it,
points.zh: 除了在重建车子期间

points.en: you can actually eat fantastic pierogi and a lot more stuff.
points.zh: 能吃到超赞的波兰饺子和其他美食

points.en: Jokes aside, all the parts are going to Poland to the workshop there,
points.zh: 说正经的，所有零件都会运到波兰改装车间

points.en: to be assembled, disassembled, checked how this and what is what, put together,
points.zh: 在那里组装、拆解、检查什么的，最后拼起来

points.en: and I think that's kind of it.
points.zh: 大概就是这样

points.en: Next video is going to be update of I don't know what.
points.zh: 下一期的更新 谁知道呢

points.en: Maybe I will fly out to Poland to see the new chassis.
points.zh: 我可能飞去波兰看看新车架

points.en: And eat some food. And eat some food definitely.
points.zh: -当然还有吃美食 -那是肯定的

points.en: I know, the Vulcan Alpha team is dying to eat some Polish food.
points.zh: Vulcan Alpha团队超想吃波兰菜

points.en: Our trip to Ultrace was like the best trip ever,
points.zh: 上次的Ultrace之旅超棒

points.en: so we cannot wait already next year too.
points.zh: 所以我们等不及明年再去了

points.en: After showing the wrecked car at Ultrace, next year we want

points.en: to show the actual rebuilt car and a couple more project cars, maybe.
points.zh: 明年要展示重建好的车子 可能还有更多项目车

points.en: Anyway, we start to talk a bit sidetracked. Stay tuned for upcoming updates.
points.zh: 总而言之，扯远了，请持续关注更新

points.en: The plan is definitely to have the car running for next year.
points.zh: 计划肯定是让车子在明年能跑起来

points.zh: 对的对的，波兰赛道大师赛

points.en: Maybe not only Poland. A couple of other for us just in Poland
points.zh: 可能不止波兰，但波兰赛我们会去

points.en: because we go there for food.
points.zh: 毕竟要去吃美食

points.en: And a couple of more tracks. We will be here as well,
points.zh: 其他赛道也会去 我们也会在这里

points.en: and who knows what else. So subscribe, like and share.

points.zh: 再次感谢CarVertical的赞助

points.en: And on to many other updates.

points.zh: 她被那台车的动态吓得不轻

points.en: And she is used to a lot of things,
points.zh: 虽说她也算见多识广了

points.en: but at the same time, she's also scared of driving on track
points.zh: 但与此同时，在目睹了几次事故之后

points.en: after witnessing a couple of the accidents.
points.zh: 她对跑赛道还是心有余悸

points.en: So I can not blame her. Anyway, we are here now with another STO,
points.zh: 所以我也不能怪她 现在，又有一台STO摆在面前

points.en: hopefully is going to be redemption lap.
points.zh: 希望它能一圈一雪前耻

points.en: So the main issue is that the other car maybe had alignment off.
points.zh: 问题可能是之前那台车的四轮定位没做好

points.en: Also, it had Bridgestone tires, and from what I have been told/heard,
points.zh: 而且，它用的是普利司通轮胎，据我所知

points.en: the car was developed on Pirellis,

points.en: and then last moment Lamborghini switched to Bridgestone
points.zh: 结果最后关头，兰博基尼换成了普利司通

points.en: as a marketing partnership, etc.
points.zh: 出于营销合作之类的

points.en: So the car works on Trofeos apparently much better
points.zh: 用Trofeos明显比普利司通好开得多

points.en: than it is on Bridgestones.
points.zh: 明显比普利司通好开得多

points.en: However, this one is still on Bridgestones,
points.zh: 但这台车还是配的普利司通

points.en: but many people also say it is kind of okay-ish. Regardless...
points.zh: 不过很多人也说普利司通也还可以 不管怎么说...

points.en: -We have a race tire here. -We have race tires, Potenza Race.
points.zh: -我们用的是赛道胎 -是Potenza赛道版

points.en: Those are Race. I think the other one was a Potenza Sport.
points.zh: 是Race版的 之前那台大概是Sport版的

points.en: -Ah, okay. All right, all right. This should be... -So...
points.zh: -啊，好吧 行，行 这次应该... -所以...

points.en: -A little bit better. -Should be a little bit better, yes.
points.zh: -会好一点 -应该会好一点，嗯

points.en: Yeah, the car has been serviced multiple times, so it should be...
points.zh: 这车已经保养过了几次，所以应该...

points.en: -It's almost new, actually. -Is it? Is it?
points.zh: -几乎就是全新的 -真的假的？

points.en: -Yeah, yeah. Yeah, few thousand kilometers. -Nice.
points.zh: -对，对，对，只跑了几千公里 -不错

points.en: -It's like Ithaca Verde color, I think? -It's a Verde Citrea.
points.zh: -好像是叫伊萨卡绿吧？ -是香橼绿

points.en: -Ah, okay. Well, something beautiful and green. -Verde Citrea.
points.zh: -好吧 反正就是漂亮的绿色 -Verde Citrea

points.en: -Yeah, so power is 640, rear-wheel drive. -Rear-wheel drive.
points.zh: -640马力 后轮驱动 -后轮驱动

points.en: So not like Performante all-wheel drive,
points.zh: 不像Performante是四驱

points.en: it's just rear-wheel drive with all the extra bits and pieces of aero.
points.zh: 这车就是后驱，外加各种额外的空力套件

points.en: You could see all the ducting, etc, etc.
points.zh: 能看到各种风道导流设计

points.en: And yeah, anything else worth mentioning?

points.en: -Window here, a little cracked. -Little crack.
points.zh: -车窗这有点裂纹 -小裂纹

points.en: -We're not gonna blame that on you. -No, okay, thank you, thank you.
points.zh: -所以这就不会赖你了 -好的，谢啦谢啦

points.en: That's always good to know.

points.en: And yeah, but for the rest, stock-ish car.
points.zh: 嗯，其他部分基本原厂

points.en: Yeah, everything is stock.
points.zh: 是的，全都是原厂状态

points.en: -Also the exhaust. But anyway, it's too loud. -Yeah.
points.zh: -排气管也是 不过反正太吵了 -嗯

points.en: -It's one lap for you. -Yes. Oh yeah, yeah, yeah, of course.
points.zh: -你只有一圈的机会 -啊对，对的，当然当然

points.en: Stock is too loud.
points.zh: 原厂就太炸了

points.en: Yes, if you can not even... I think even in Sport or
points.zh: 是的，你甚至没办法... 就算用运动模式

points.en: like in Strada mode, it's still too loud, I think.
points.zh: 或者街道模式，它应该还是太吵了

points.en: So it will be... it will be fun. I hope. You know what?
points.zh: 应该... 会挺有意思的 希望吧 要不这样？

points.en: I think I'm gonna drive Revuelto first,
points.zh: 我决定先开Revuelto吧

points.en: because if people are just seeing like, oh, Lamborghini,
points.zh: 因为大家一看，哦，兰博基尼

points.en: and you come back and you're like banned, they're like,
points.zh: 结果你被禁了，再次归来，他们会想

points.en: they ban you again, they're like,
points.zh: 怎么又被禁了，他们会想

points.en: "Oh, you came back with another... It's another car."
points.zh: 天呐，你又换了一台... 不同的车来

points.en: "No, you have a green Lamborghini because also green."
points.zh: "不是啦，这台绿的和之前那台一样"

points.en: Like, you know, it's sometimes you start to overthinking.
points.zh: 你懂的，有时候人就是忍不住想太多

points.en: Let's not overthink, let's go for a lap. Let's go do a drive.
points.zh: 我就别想太多了 直接跑一圈吧 我们走起

points.en: And by the way,
points.zh: 顺带一提

points.en: since we do not have any passengers anymore, we have a passenger.
points.zh: 虽然现在一般不带乘客，但我们今天有位乘客

points.en: -So what's his name？ Or her? -It's René, it's me.
points.zh: -男的女的？什么名字？ -叫René，是我自己啦

points.en: Ah, it's you.
points.zh: 啊，原来是你

points.en: Amazing.
points.zh: 真棒

points.en: -And a smile. I smile. -Yes, perfect.
points.zh: -还带着笑容呢 -对，完美

points.en: All right, we are here.
points.zh: 好了，我们到地方了

points.en: A couple of points, I will be driving in the Trofeo mode.
points.zh: 先说几点，我会用赛道模式来跑

points.en: Traction control will be in ESC Trofeo.
points.zh: 牵引力控制会设在ESC赛道档

points.en: Because fully off, I don't think it's a good idea.
points.zh: 全关的话，我觉得不是个好主意

points.en: So I want to give it the benefit of the doubt,
points.zh: 所以我还是给它留点余地

points.en: because even Revuelto, a much newer car that I drove just now,
points.zh: 毕竟我刚才开的Revuelto，新得多的车

points.en: with everything off, is just almost undrivable.
points.zh: 辅助全关之后简直没法开了

points.en: I also have additional microphone,
points.zh: 我还额外带了麦克风

points.en: since I'm by now not taking passengers anymore,
points.zh: 因为现在我不带乘客了

points.en: so I try to talk a bit more,
points.zh: 我得多说点话

points.en: so it's good when you guys can understand me.
points.zh: 这样你们也能听清楚我说话

points.en: Although I do not have alive passengers with me, sounds weird,

points.en: but like human being passengers,

points.en: So his name is Axel, because not XXL, but just one XL.
points.zh: 它叫Axel，因为不是超超大XXL，而是XL

points.en: Let's proceed.
points.zh: 我们继续

points.en: First impressions, the front axle is still like on the soft mode.
points.zh: 第一印象，前轴还是像在一种很软的模式

points.en: Especially once it grips,
points.zh: 尤其是一旦抓住地

points.en: it really wants to steer the car in the direction it's pointing at.
points.zh: 它就特别想把车往它指向的方向拽

points.en: And when you do not have traction control on,
points.zh: 而牵引力控制关掉的时候

points.en: when the first time I drove the car.
points.zh: 让我特别难受的原因

points.en: Not a big fan of fixed pedal shifts because I can not...

points.en: It's difficult, whoa...

points.en: It's difficult to shift while you're mid-corner.

points.en: It's still weird, that's...

points.en: The shocks are...

points.en: It feels like the compression is too soft

points.en: and the rebound is too hard.

points.en: So the suspension compresses a lot

points.en: and then it kicks you out of the bottom too much.

points.en: That's how it feels like the car is set up.

points.en: But then again, we also do not really want to hit the top speeds.

points.en: and different brakes and everything.

points.en: I'm interested to see what he thinks of it.

points.en: But this, it was not overreacting of my wife.

points.en: It's really...

points.en: Especially here, huge compressions.

points.en: The brakes are good.

points.en: And we are on Potenza Race, so they're race tires.

points.en: So there... You feel that the grip is really good.

points.en: But it's like the car is not...

points.en: Even under braking, it's... it doesn't go straight because...

points.en: Too soft.

points.en: And that's with traction control on.

points.en: Especially braking mid-corner on...

points.en: so it actually more moves the chassis before it grips on the tires.

points.en: but also mid-corners.

points.en: and I have to say sorry, I don't like it.

points.en: or a race car. So you buy an actual Super Trofeo.

points.en: There's like zero... I don't trust it.

points.en: Too nervous.

points.en: You can work with alignments, with different suspensions,

points.en: but this should be the ultimate out-of-the-box track Lambo,

points.en: and it's unfortunately the worst I've driven.

points.en: This is a corner where you really want to have confidence

points.en: in the car, the whole section.

points.en: As much as I really wanted to.

points.en: But the emotion is great.

points.en: I'm sad. I'm genuinely sad

points.en: because I was genuinely hoping that the first STO that I'd driven,

points.en: that there was something wrong with it. Alignment, tires,

points.en: me being maybe emotionally affected by my scared wife.

points.en: But it's just... And we're gonna get now banned.

points.en: Yeah. This is another reason why STO is funny. Too loud.

points.en: Gut. Danke. Ciao.

points.zh: 话说回来，另一点就是，纽博格林已经是

points.en: with the loudest limitation for decibels, 128 on flyby.
points.zh: 限制最宽松的赛道了，动态噪音限制128分贝

points.en: And this car is too loud for the track.

points.en: So... But suspension, really sad.

points.en: So tricky, tricky.

points.en: Secondary air injection, which is secondary air pump,

points.en: but naturally aspirated.

points.en: Mid-engine.

points.en: Naturally aspirated, so it's not turbocharged.

points.en: Therefore, the power is not really great, but yet, yet...

points.en: And cooling.

points.en: 250, 260, something.
Yeah, it's something that it felt as well

points.en: in terms of naturally aspirated when you are doing 10,000 RPM

points.en: because everything below, it's kind of like really, really, dead.

points.en: But very good, good fun, very good emotion. Yeah.

points.en: I'm happy it didn't like go completely bad bad.

points.en: But yeah. So engine stock... sorry, sorry.

points.en: Engine is two-rotor, like from factory,

points.en: but it has lots of hybridization of RX-7 and RX-8.
points.zh: 不过混了RX-7和RX-8的各种部件

points.en: -So what happens? -When I say hybrid...
points.zh: -具体怎么改的？ -这里混的是...

points.en: It's not a hybrid turbo, it means there's parts of RX...

points.en: -It's not electric. -Yes.
points.zh: -不是电力混动 -嗯

points.en: Basically some parts are of an RX-7, some parts are of an RX-8.
points.zh: 基本上就是把RX-7和RX-8的零件混搭在一起

points.en: So what do you have of what?

points.en: So plates are still RX-8.

points.en: Rotors are still RX-8,

points.en: but they're machined to fit RX-7 apex seals,

points.en: because they're bigger.

points.en: And then, the solid corner seals as well.

points.en: The factory ones are two-piece and they tend to crack sometimes,

points.en: especially when you hit off the limiter, which you love doing.

points.en: but like I was approaching it a few times.

points.en: The most important thing is the RX-7 housings as well.

points.en: Basically, the exhaust ports on the RX-8s are usually on the plates,

points.en: and the hybrid uses the peripheral ports from the housings.

points.en: -Nice, nice. -With bridgeports, it also makes it brap.

points.en: Sometimes you do this and this and that.

points.en: it's already lower compression than the standard Renesis.

points.en: so it frees up the revs a bit better.

points.en: Hello from a sunny beautiful day here at the Nürburgring.

points.en: We have here Volkswagen Golf Edition 50, Golf GTI Edition 50, of course.
points.zh: 这是大众高尔夫50周年纪念版，GTI的50周年纪念版

points.en: And Benny Leuchter. And something in the trunk of the car

points.en: that we definitely are going to talk about,

points.en: which is the most important feature.
points.zh: 这可是最重中之重

points.en: Look at that. New lap record. Official lap time, 7 minutes 46.
points.zh: 快看，新的圈速记录 官方成绩7分46秒

points.en: So it makes it the fastest front-wheel driven Golf ever.
points.zh: 成为了有史以来最快的前驱高尔夫

points.en: And, driver excuse, Foxhole was a bit slippery.
points.zh: 狐狸洞那儿有点滑，车手的借口嘛

points.en: Let's say a little bit interesting.
points.zh: 或者说，有点小刺激

points.en: You also had the Foxhole kerb, what the other car didn't have.
points.zh: 你需要应付狐狸洞的新路肩，别的车可不用

points.en: You also had a factory gear ratio that the other car didn't have.
points.zh: 你的变速箱齿比也是原厂的，别的车可不是

points.en: Oh, that's, I'm allowed to say that. You're probably not.
points.zh: 哦，这话我能说 但你估计不能说

points.en: But anyway, you also were having factory interior, no sea...
points.zh: 话说回来，这台车还是原厂内饰，没有...

points.en: The only thing I did...
points.zh: 我只做了一件事...

points.en: Oh my God, you're going to have now...
points.zh: 我的天，你现在要...

points.en: So, you lowered the back seats and the front seat
points.zh: 所以你放倒了后排座椅和副驾座椅

points.en: for better central... lower center point of gravity.
points.zh: 为了让车子重心更居中更低

points.en: Yeah.
points.zh: 对

points.en: So now everyone going to be doing that to their cars.
points.zh: 这下大家都要去把自家车的座椅放倒了

points.en: My secret. It's my secret.
points.zh: 我的秘诀 独门秘诀

points.en: Your secret. Yes. But yeah, let's talk a bit about the car.
points.zh: 没错，你的秘诀 不过咱们还是聊聊车吧

points.en: So the latest and the best, Edition 50, to celebrate 50 years of GTI.
points.zh: 最新最强的50周年纪念版，庆祝GTI诞生50周年

points.en: 325 horsepower, 420 newton-meters of torque.
points.zh: 325匹马力，420牛米的扭矩

points.en: A lot and lots of suspension redevelopment.
points.zh: 悬挂系统做了大量的重新研发

points.en: So 5th millimeter lower, much stiffer bushings, springs,
points.zh: 车身低了5毫米，更硬的衬套、弹簧

points.en: 2 degrees of camber on the front compared to 1.3, I think, stock.
points.zh: 前轮有2度的倾角，对比原厂好像是1.3度

points.en: Yeah.
points.zh: 是的

points.en: So a lot of development went into it.
points.zh: 所以在它上投入了大量研发

points.en: Of course, together with that, the ESC and TC and ABS
points.zh: 当然了，与此同时，ESC、TC和ABS

points.en: and all the systems have been redeveloped and reworked.
points.zh: 所有这些系统也都经过了重新开发和调校

points.en: It has also fancy pedals. I really like that. It's very, very nice.
points.zh: 连踏板都做得很花哨，我超爱，真的非常好

points.en: Another thing that we actually need to mention aside from the suspension,
points.zh: 除了悬架，还有一点我们必须得提一下

points.en: the tyres have been completely developed specifically for this car.
points.zh: 就是它的轮胎是完全为这台车专门开发的

points.en: 235 35 19, the latest Bridgestone Potenza R semi-slicks.
points.zh: 235 35 19规格、最新的普利司通搏天族R半热熔胎

points.en: You said that it was 6 seconds faster than the last tyre?
points.zh: 你说过这个轮胎比上一款快了6秒？

points.en: -Yes. So, than the last car. -Than the last car, yeah.
points.zh: -嗯 是比前代车型快 -是比前代车型快

points.en: GTI Clubsport S, where I did the front-wheel drive lap record in 2016.
points.zh: 就是我2016年创下前驱车记录的GTI Clubsport S

points.en: That was our benchmark because we knew the car is very good.
points.zh: 那台车是我们的标杆、它的实力很强

points.en: And then we hook on this and developed that car,
points.zh: 我们就以此为基础研发新一代车型

points.en: and I'm very happy and proud that we achieved
points.zh: 能做到这个成绩我非常开心和自豪

points.en: by doing 6 seconds faster lap time.
points.zh: 圈速提升了整整6秒

points.en: Yeah. And it's actually, I'm feeling it now, it's super, super soft.
points.zh: 是啊 而且这轮胎、现在摸着超级、超级软

points.en: Not only is it soft and grippy, it's also very light.
points.zh: 它不光又软抓地力又好，还非常轻

points.en: I believe 1.3 kilos per tyre were saved over the previous one.
points.zh: 我记得每条轮胎比上代轻了1.3公斤

points.en: Almost 2 kilos on the wheels.
points.zh: 轮圈也减重近2公斤

points.en: So combined, it's 13 kilos overall of rotational mass.
points.zh: 加起来，总共减轻了13公斤的旋转质量

points.en: And 11 kilos on the exhaust, the Akrapovič exhaust.
points.zh: 然后用了天蝎排气，也轻了11公斤

points.en: But the rotational mass, as we've seen actually
points.zh: 旋转质量的减轻实测会非常显著

points.en: with the recent video of mine where I've done the Golf R stock
points.zh: 我最近专门拍了一期视频，对比了原厂高尔夫R

points.en: versus modified with just wheels and tyres and brakes,
points.zh: 和一台只改了轮圈、轮胎和刹车的高尔夫R

points.en: that's probably, yeah, you're going to notice it a lot on the track.
points.zh: 它们在在赛道上的感觉会非常不一样

points.en: Anyway, back to Benny. What's your most exciting track section,
points.zh: 话说Benny，你觉得赛道上最刺激的是哪一段

points.en: I would say, you drove with this car? Like, wha...
points.zh: 就是你开这台车的时候，哪一段…

points.en: I mean, to be honest, if I look back to the...
points.zh: 说实话，如果我回想那一圈...

points.en: Look, I get goosebumps to the, to the, when I remember the lap
points.zh: 你看，每次一想起那一圈我就起鸡皮疙瘩

points.en: because I was fully on the edge.
points.zh: 因为我整圈都在极限边缘

points.en: The fast corners was, I think there was no more room for speed.
points.zh: 我觉得那些高速弯已经没有什么提升空间了

points.en: I like the fast corners like Schwedenkreuz, Flugplatz.
points.zh: 我喜欢瑞典十字、飞机场这样的高速弯

points.en: 220 through Schwedenkreuz. GPS, legit GPS speed.
points.zh: 220过瑞典十字，GPS实测的数据

points.en: -Was very fast. -With limited aero, no big wing.
points.zh: -很快了 -而且空力有限，没有大尾翼

points.en: How much you go with the TCR car through there?
points.zh: 你开TCR赛车过瑞典十字能有多快？

points.en: Yeah, 230, 225, not much faster. Not much faster, but...
points.zh: 230、225，快不了多少 真快不了多少...

points.en: Okay. Okay. Yeah, but it's mostly because of
points.zh: 好吧 好吧 不过这主要是因为

points.en: the reduction of the speed due to the aero and drag, I guess. Yeah.
points.zh: 它们的空力和风阻也让速度有所降低 我猜

points.en: And if you look, also, Mutkurve,
points.zh: 如果你去看勇气之弯

points.en: I went in and then the car starts to slide
points.zh: 我进弯后 车子开始侧滑

points.en: and I slide until the edge of the, of the kerb.
points.zh: 一直滑到路肩边上才救回来

points.en: But I like actually, because it's a technical part,
points.zh: 因为那整个赛段都很考验技巧

points.en: all the part from Hohe Acht down to Schwalbenschwanz.
points.zh: 就是从瞭望台一直到燕尾弯整个赛段

points.en: All this part, this car is so strong there.
points.zh: 这一整段，这台车都非常强

points.en: And the, on most, the problem of front-wheel drive cars
points.zh: 对大多数前驱车来说，这段的问题在于

points.en: there is that you lose the front end.
points.zh: 前轴的抓地力会下降

points.en: So the car is able to go much faster, but your tyres are not...
points.zh: 虽然车还能更快，但轮胎已经扛不住了...

points.en: and we managed to develop that tyre especially for that car,
points.zh: 所以我们为这台车专门开发了这款轮胎

points.en: in combination with the setup,
points.zh: 再结合整车的调校

points.en: you see that the car has still good yawing and rotation,
points.zh: 车子依旧能保持很好的横摆和旋转性能

points.en: and that's where the time comes from.
points.zh: 这就是圈速提升的原因

points.en: Yeah, the time from... and the folded seats.
points.zh: 是啊，圈速来自...还有放倒的座椅

points.en: And folding seats.
points.zh: 还有放倒座椅

points.en: And you're losing 2 kilos.
points.zh: 还有你减掉了2公斤

points.en: Yes, that's also true. It's not a rumor. It's true.
points.zh: 没错，千真万确 不是谣言 真的

points.en: For the lap record, I lost 2 kilos. I went down to 50...
points.zh: 为了圈速记录，我减了2公斤，降到了50…

points.en: I don't say the...
points.zh: 具体就不说了

points.en: Wow, impressive.
points.zh: 哇，了不起

points.en: But I like how it was your actually request to Volkswagen
points.zh: 还有我很欣赏一点，是你主动向大众提出

points.en: to do a lap record in a fully, fully stock car.
points.zh: 要用一台完完全全的原厂车

points.en: So like no, like no cage, no bucket seats, no four-point harnesses.
points.zh: 没有防滚架、没有桶椅、没有四点式安全带

points.en: And speaking of seats actually, compared to the previous,
points.zh: 说到座椅，跟上一代比起来Clubsport S

points.en: -the Clubsport S, this one has the back seats. -Yes.
points.zh: -比起来，这台车是有后排座椅的 -没错

points.en: Because the previous record time was done without the back seats,
points.zh: 因为之前的圈速记录是没有后排座椅的

points.en: which is factory specification of course.
points.zh: 当然那也是它的原厂设定

points.en: Exactly. Yeah, and this is, we have full, full seats.
points.zh: 没错，我们这台车所有座椅都是完整的

points.en: We have the DSG gearbox, which is also heavier than the manual transmission.
points.zh: 而且用的还是DSG变速箱，它也比手动变速箱更重

points.en: But now we have a new shifting mode in that, where you are fully manual.
points.zh: 但现在我们有了一个新的，纯手动的换挡模式

points.en: So if you are shifting from the special mode, from S+ into M+,
points.zh: 如果你用特殊模式，从S+模式切换到M+

points.en: you are fully manual. That means you can also go to the rev limiter.
points.zh: 就是纯手动模式了，你可以把转速拉到限制区

points.en: You will hear it as well on the, on the lap.
points.zh: 大家在圈速视频里也能听得到

points.en: What I did, I was two times in the rev limiter,
points.zh: 我当时就有两次拉到了红线转速

points.en: -because it makes no sense to shift up. -Yeah.
points.zh: -因为当时升档毫无意义 -是的

points.en: -So these are the tweak points we had to deal with. -Yeah.
points.zh: -所以我们也要处理好这些细节 -嗯

points.en: But, yeah, that's why I'm more, more than proud to achieve that lap time.
points.zh: 这也是为什么我为能做出这个圈速感到非常自豪

points.en: No, absolutely, absolutely. I would be as well.
points.zh: 那当然，必须的，换我我也会

points.en: Like I said, it's a fantastic time considering it's a fully stock car.
points.zh: 就像我说的，考虑到它是完完全全的原厂车

points.en: And it's also very cool that you guys are still doing this,
points.zh: 看到你们还在这么坚持去做，实在太酷了

points.en: like performance internal combustion engine cars.
points.zh: 坚持这种高性能的内燃机汽车

points.en: Like I'm, I'm super happy to see it happen.
points.zh: 看到这一幕我真的太开心了

points.en: And, yeah, I wouldn't know what else to say.
points.zh: 所以，我真不知该说什么好了

points.en: It's like, it's so cool again to see you, that that it's been done,
points.zh: 能再次见到你们，见到你们达成这个目标

points.en: first of all, and also in the way that it has been done.
points.zh: 而且是以这种方式达成的

points.en: That's something that I applaud. Fully stock car.
points.zh: 这一点必须点赞 完全是原厂车

points.en: Yeah, see the lap itself, and we'll go out for some laps in the future.
points.zh: 待会儿大家来看圈速视频 未来我们也去跑几圈

points.en: This car is coming out next year to celebrate the 50 years.
points.zh: 这款车明年就会推出，用来庆祝50周年

points.en: So in 2026. So hopefully I'll get my hands on one shortly after that,
points.zh: 也就是2026年，希望到时候我能搞到一辆

points.en: and we can do our own impressions, which I'm looking forward to that.
points.zh: 然后就能亲自体验一下，我已经迫不及待了

points.en: Good luck with N24.
points.zh: N24比赛加油

points.en: Thank you, you too.
points.zh: 谢谢 你也加油

points.en: Yeah, thank you. And you guys, enjoy the lap.
points.zh: 多谢了 大家好好享受这一圈吧

points.en: There have been lots of speculations, hints, and teasers
points.zh: 即将推出的神力科莎EVO是否会有开放世界

points.en: about potential open world for the upcoming Assetto Corsa EVO.
points.zh: 已经有了很多的猜测、暗示和预告

points.en: And, today, it's time to take a look whether some of them are true,
points.zh: 现在，是时候来看看哪些是真的了

points.en: and whether they are going to live up to your expectations.
points.zh: 以及它们能不能达到大家的预期

points.en: Assetto Corsa EVO will feature an open world
points.zh: 神力科莎EVO将拥有一个开放世界

points.en: that is a near identical copy of the Eifel region surrounding the Green Hell.
points.zh: 场景几乎完美复刻了环绕着绿色地狱的艾费尔地区

points.en: 1600 square kilometers have been LiDAR scanned to be replicated
points.zh: 开发团队激光雷达扫描了1600平方公里实景

points.en: in the game through an innovative terrain technology developed by Kunos,
points.zh: 并借助Kunos自研的创新地形技术在游戏中呈现

points.en: with the unmatched level of detail.
points.zh: 以无与伦比的细节精度

points.en: I wonder are they going to replicate
points.zh: 我好奇会不会真实还原

points.en: the realistic traffic jams to the track entrance during the high season?
points.zh: 旺季时赛道入口堵车的盛况呢？

points.en: Now traffic jams are cool and all
points.zh: 虽然还原堵车场景挺酷的

points.en: but I can think of a couple of more exciting spots
points.zh: 不过我还能想到几个更好玩的地点

points.en: where you can gather with your friends and cars
points.zh: 可以和车友们带着爱车在那儿聚聚

points.en: and enjoy the Nürburgring atmosphere in better weather conditions.
points.zh: 在更宜人的天气条件下，感受纽博格林的氛围

points.en: And just like in the real world you'll be able to interact with local businesses.
points.zh: 和现实世界一样 你还能和本地的商家互动

points.en: For example, rent track cars for the Nürburgring.
points.zh: 比如租赛道用车，在纽博格林驰骋

points.en: If you wish to have your company's facility portrayed in Assetto Corsa EVO,
points.zh: 要是想让你的公司设施出现在神力科莎EVO里

points.en: scan this QR code and fill in your company details.
points.zh: 扫描这个二维码 填写公司的详细信息

points.en: Rental car companies are a fundamental link in the Nürburgring ecosystem,
points.zh: 租车行是纽博格林生态系统中必不可少的一环

points.en: but so are various car workshops.
points.zh: 各种改装工坊同样不可或缺

points.en: How big a wing you can put on your car,
points.zh: 你的车子能装上多大的尾翼

points.en: and whether it can support aftermarket DRS functionality.
points.zh: 它能不能加装后期改装的DRS系统

points.en: You'll be able to unlock all kinds of different upgrades
points.zh: 你将能够通过在Evo的开放世界中

points.en: for your own car by competing in various challenges in the open world of EVO.
points.zh: 完成各式各样的挑战，解锁丰富的改装选项

points.en: Imagine a scenario where you want to have an upgrade for your car
points.zh: 试想一下，你想给你的车子做一个升级

points.en: Maybe, an owner of a business will be able to offer you
points.zh: 说不定某位老板会愿意给你个折扣

points.en: a discount, or maybe even a free product
points.zh: 甚至免费送你个产品

points.en: if you're gonna bring him a tiramisu from Venti Sette.
points.zh: 只要帮他从Venti Sette捎一份提拉米苏

points.en: I really hope that the developers will come up with this tiramisu time trial,
points.zh: 我很期待开发团队能做这个提拉米苏计时挑战

points.en: on closed roads only of course,
points.zh: 当然，封闭道路进行

points.en: in various weather conditions and different times of the day.
points.zh: 还能体验动态的天气和时间变化

points.en: If you think that all of this is impressive, stay tuned.
points.zh: 如果觉得这些足够惊艳了，请继续关注

points.en: Assetto Corsa EVO guys are going to disclose
points.zh: 神力科莎EVO团队将在未来几个月

points.en: a lot more in the coming months.
points.zh: 陆续放出更多的内容

points.en: All I can tell you is Assetto Corsa EVO is going to be a game changer.
points.zh: 我只能告诉大家，神力科莎EVO 将会是颠覆性的

points.en: Sport Auto has just published an amazing video,
points.zh: Sport Auto刚发布了一个超棒的视频

points.en: namely, an updated lap with a Porsche Carrera GT
points.zh: 保时捷Carrera GT新的圈速测试

points.en: featuring Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2, brand-new developed tyres,
points.zh: 配备了全新研发的米其林Pilot Sport Cup 2

points.en: after 20 years of introduction of Carrera GT or more than 20 years.
points.zh: 在Carrera GT问世20年后 超过20年后

points.en: They done a lap on the Nürburgring and it went significantly faster than previously.
points.zh: 他们在纽博格林做了一个圈速，比之前快了非常多

points.en: Now, I was just recording a video about my lap analysis of Mustang GTD
points.zh: 我本来正在录Mustang GTD的圈速分析视频

points.en: and I thought, "You know what? This one deserves also a couple of inputs."
points.zh: 突然想到，这个圈速也值得我也好好聊一聊

points.en: Because whenever we speak about lap records on the Nürburgring,
points.zh: 因为 每次讨论纽博格林圈速记录的时候

points.en: one of the most prominent points or comments from other people is like,
points.zh: 评论区总有人喜欢提到的一个观点就是

points.en: "Hey, if you're going to put—most importantly—
points.zh: “要是给918换上现在的轮胎”

points.en: most oftenly they refer to Porsche 918;
points.zh: 说的最多的就是保时捷918

points.en: if you're going to put a 918 on today's Cup 2R tyres,
points.zh: “如果给它配上新的Cup 2R轮胎”

points.en: that's going to be faster than any of those modern cars."
points.zh: “肯定会比现在那些新车都要快”

points.en: So, and it's actually really impressive, important, and definitely interesting,
points.zh: 所以说这个测试很棒，不仅重要，还非常有看点

points.en: to see what those cars can do on updated technology
points.zh: 看看经典车在现代科技加持下的表现

points.en: and this is what this video is all about.
points.zh: 这正是本期视频的核心所在

points.en: So, let's have a look at the lap and what I have to say about it.
points.zh: 一起来看看这一圈，还有我的一些观察

points.en: By the way, we still have some Christmas sweaters left
points.zh: 顺带一提，圣诞毛衣还有一些库存

points.en: and it's actually Christmas, just around the corner.
points.zh: 圣诞节马上就到了

points.en: So, check out the link in the video description,
points.zh: 点击视频简介里的购买链接

points.en: MISHA24 code for 15% off.
points.zh: 用折扣码MISHA24能打85折

points.en: It's trademarked Nürburgring product.
points.zh: 这是纽博格林正版周边

points.en: Some of the profits go also to the Nürburgring, so you can also support your favorite racetrack.
points.zh: 部分收益会给到纽博格林，你能支持你最喜欢的赛道

points.en: And now, let's talk about the lap.
points.zh: 我们来聊聊这一圈吧

points.en: So, behind the wheel is Jörg Bergmeister,
points.zh: 驾驶者是Jörg Bergmeister

points.en: a factory development driver, who also done the lap record
points.zh: 保时捷的研发车手，之前做过GT2

points.en: with the GT2, sorry, GT3 RS.
points.zh: 不对，是GT3 RS的记录

points.en: And yeah, going on the gas, going through Hatzenbach,
points.zh: 给油，正在通过捕猎溪

points.en: actually similar speeds as any modern cars,
points.zh: 速度和现代车子差不多

points.en: and then going on the brakes into Hatzenbach,
points.zh: 然后刹车，进捕猎溪

points.en: and we can see there's actually quite some body movement, and we'll get to that in a point,
points.zh: 我们能看到明显的车身晃动，这点后面会细说

points.en: because, although the tyres are updated, because of the extra grip,
points.zh: 虽然轮胎升级了，但正因为有了更强的抓地力

points.en: there is a bit of more body roll due to the old suspension.
points.zh: 老旧的悬挂系统让车身侧倾加剧了

points.en: Well, it's 20-year-old technology.
points.zh: 毕竟是20年前的技术

points.en: Anyway. Going flat on the gas through Hocheichen towards Flugplatz,
points.zh: 全油门冲过大橡树，直扑飞机场

points.en: impressive speeds are being achieved of 200, almost 240 kilometers per hour.
points.zh: 速度非常快，冲到了200，接近240公里每小时

points.en: The V-minimum is 177, almost 180 kilometers per hour, GPS speed.
points.zh: 弯心速度也有177、接近180的GPS速度

points.en: Again, tyres doing great job, but I think it's more of
points.zh: 轮胎的表现很出色，但我觉得

points.en: a body roll issue that could have been a bit faster,
points.zh: 车身侧倾的问题拖慢了速度

points.en: It's a 20 year old car.
points.zh: 毕竟是20年前的车

points.en: Impressive is that the car is doing almost 280 through Schwedenkreuz,
points.zh: 瑞典十字达到了280公里的时速，非常快

points.en: 200 kilometers per hour over the crest of Schwedenkreuz.
points.zh: 在瑞典十字的坡顶达到200公里每小时

points.en: In comparison, 240 is being done by the 992 GT3 RS,
points.zh: 相较之下，992 GT3 RS在这里达到了240

points.en: so you can see the effect of aerodynamics.
points.zh: 所以你能看到空气动力学的差距

points.en: Carrera GT had like active aero of the spoiler going up and down, but...
points.zh: Carrera GT有主动升降尾翼，能上下调节

points.en: it's not as... It's not DRS, it's not the air brake.
points.zh: 但不是DRS，也不是空气刹车

points.en: It's more of a... Anyway, important here to feature, to notice,
points.zh: 总之，这里重点需要注意的是

points.en: is that Jörg was going a bit on the brakes way before the compression,
points.zh: Jörg在进入狐狸洞压缩区间前 就开始刹车了

points.en: and the car scraped significantly through the compression of Foxhole.
points.zh: 但车子在最大压缩区间还是有严重的托底

points.en: Again, this has to do with the fact that suspension is not really up to spec.
points.zh: 一样的问题，还是悬挂系统不够匹配

points.en: Going on the gas to Metzgesfeld, flat, flat, flat.
points.zh: 给油冲过屠宰场，全油门

points.en: exceeding 220 kilometers per hour. On the brakes
points.zh: 速度超过220公里每小时，刹车

points.en: and going... still quite impressive, almost 180 through here,
points.zh: 然后…依然很惊人，这里接近180了

points.en: which is similar speed that the Mustang GTD that I have done just a comparison of it right now.
points.zh: 正好做个对比，和我刚分析的Mustang GTD差不多

points.en: On the brakes, through Kellenhard, shifting to second gear.
points.zh: 刹车进入卡伦哈德，降到二挡

points.en: It's actually impressive to see how long the gearing is.
points.zh: 这车齿比设定真够长的

points.en: So quite often the second gear is being used,
points.zh: 所以二档用得很多

points.en: and the sixth gear almost never with the exception of, I think,
points.zh: 六挡几乎用不上了

points.en: Schwedenkreuz and also, of course, the later on the main straight.
points.zh: 除了瑞典十字，当然还有后面的大直道能用上

points.en: All right, Wehrseifen on the brakes, third, downshift again to the second.
points.zh: 进入卫赛芬，刹车、降到三挡再切二挡

points.en: Will the cars... Yeah, the car is losing kind of bit of traction,
points.zh: 这里车子有一点点打滑

points.en: but that is normal over there.
points.zh: 不过在里也很正常

points.en: And we are almost halfway through, we're on the bottom in,
points.zh: 我们差不多到一半了，到达最低点

points.en: Adenau, sorry, not... in Adenau, not Adenauer Forst.
points.zh: 阿德瑙...到了阿德瑙镇 不是阿德瑙森林弯

points.en: In Breitscheidt.
points.zh: 这是小镇桥

points.en: Okay, Hohe Acht,
points.zh: 高八山区路段

points.en: flat on the gas, good grip levels there.
points.zh: 全油门通过，抓地力不错

points.en: The car is not twitching, so that's actually very impressive
points.zh: 车身没有扭动，表现很棒

points.en: and very good, a bit of scratching of the helmet.
points.zh: 车手的头盔有点刮蹭

points.en: Lifting through Lauda Links, again, shows that there is not enough stability,
points.zh: 劳达左弯，这里收油还是说明稳定性不足

points.en: whether due to the body roll or definitely lack of aerodynamics,
points.zh: 可能是因为侧倾，肯定也有空力不足的原因

points.en: because the car has 600 horsepower, 610, I believe,
points.zh: 因为车子有 600 马力， 610 马力

points.en: quite light, 1300 kilos, so it can be propelled quite fast,
points.zh: 很轻，只有 1300 公斤，所以加速很快

points.en: but not enough stability to maneuver.
points.zh: 但操控的稳定性不够

points.en: Lift through here as well, whereas usually it is a flat corner,
points.zh: 这里也松油了，通常这是一个全油门的弯角

points.en: but yeah, you probably do not want to wreck one or two million euro car.
points.zh: 谁都不想开着价值一两百万欧元的车子冒险

points.en: Also, lifting through here, shows, again, that there is a bit of body roll,
points.zh: 这里收油 再次说明了车身侧倾的问题

points.en: because if the... if suspension is not stiff,
points.zh: 因为如果悬挂不够硬的话

points.en: there's a lot of bumps coming and you're flying there with 250 kilometers per hour,
points.zh: 在250公里时速下 经过很多颠簸的路段的时候

points.en: you do not want to unsettle the car too much.
points.zh: 你不会想让车子进入不稳定的状态

points.en: Going on the brakes into...
points.zh: 刹车进入…

points.en: into Steilstrecke and a bit of fighting with the grip
points.zh: 进入小陡坡，抓地力有些挣扎

points.en: and all right, third gear, upshift, off we go,
points.zh: 三挡，升档了，继续前进

points.en: Scrape, scrape, scrape...
points.zh: 刮，刮，刮

points.en: and off we go. All right.
points.zh: 好的，走你

points.en: The sound, by the way, is amazing. It's V10. Nothing that can beat it.
points.zh: 顺便说一句，这声浪太美妙了，V10无与伦比

points.en: Very, yeah, very smooth through here, through...
points.zh: 非常，嗯，这里非常丝滑

points.en: Lots of lifting happening, but then again, you also need to downshift, so that needs to be incorporated.
points.zh: 这里有好多次收油，但同样的，这是和降挡配合起来的

points.en: And gently, gently playing with throttle and then flat on the gas in Hohe Acht.
points.zh: 精准地控制油门，再后全油门冲向瞭望台

points.en: Approaching Wippermann, which is with the directional changes, I assume

points.en: Because, yeah, who knows? Anyway, enjoy the lap,

points.en: Welcome to the very first NLS race of the season, four hour endurance race.
points.zh: 欢迎来到本赛季首场NLS耐力赛，四小时耐力赛

points.en: It's great to be back. We have new suits, we have new car.
points.zh: 回到赛道太棒了，新赛车服、新战车

points.en: BMW M4 GT4 with the EVO pack on it. Slightly more horsepower, better aero,
points.zh: EVO套件的宝马M4 GT4，马力更强、空力更优

points.en: better traction control, so less driver excuses I guess. Extremely excited.
points.zh: 更好的牵引力控制，车手的借口更少了 我很激动

points.en: Manuel qualified the car on P1 in class. Steve will be doing the start,
points.zh: Manuel排位拿下了组别杆位 Steve负责起步

points.en: then it's Manuel and Jimmy, and I will be doing the finish.
points.zh: 然后Manuel和Jimmy，最后我来冲线

points.en: Extremely excited. Yesterday, we already did some laps with some practice,
points.zh: 我特别激动 昨天我们已经跑了几圈练习

points.en: and for that, you can go to the second channel
points.zh: 想看的可以到第二频道

points.en: where you see a bit of a more loose vlog.
points.zh: 那边有更轻松随性的vlog

points.en: Yesterday was also actually quite some sketchy moments, quite interesting ones.
points.zh: 昨天其实也有一些惊险瞬间，挺有意思的

points.en: Anyway, here she is. Looks... fabulous.
points.zh: 她来了 看起来…真惊艳

points.en: Beautiful livery, great job by Blackfish Graphics.
points.zh: 涂装真美，Blackfish Graphics干得漂亮

points.en: I think let's go and watch the start, shall we?
points.zh: 我们一起去看起跑仪式吧

points.en: So to be able to afford racing, sometimes you need to do things, other things,
points.zh: 为了负担得起赛车，不得不做点事情，别的事情

points.en: so we decided to start our own OnlyFans.
points.zh: 我们开了自己的OnlyFans

points.en: Hey, girl.

points.en: Oh, sh**. No.

points.en: I think that's too much.

points.en: at the lounge with the heating on.

points.en: And we're sitting here, freezing.

points.en: We're not freezing, it's warm. It's pretty warm, we're not freezing.
points.zh: 其实不冷，我们没在挨冻，真的挺暖和的

points.en: Now we're going back to the grid, after we hop on the pool.

points.zh: Steve第一棒 Jimmy现在出来 Manuel来接棒

points.en: We will have to do one more pit stop because of me.
points.zh: 因为我的原因，我们要多进站一次

points.en: I think we're like three minutes in the lead, so it's very, very tight. So, let's see.
points.zh: 我们现在领先了大概三分钟，非常胶着 拭目以待吧

points.en: Oh, good job.
points.zh: 干得漂亮

points.en: Yeah, I've pushed all of my luck now.
points.zh: 这下我把运气全都用光了

points.en: He is so wet.
points.zh: 他浑身湿透了

points.en: Who wants to buy Jimmy's sweat?

points.en: Alright, it's time for me to get ready.
points.zh: 好了，现在该我准备了

points.en: Manuel is doing two more laps. We have like four and a half minutes gap.

points.en: It's about one and a half minute pit stop time for us. So, three minutes.
points.zh: 我们进站要一分半，所以是三分钟的领先

points.en: I should be able to stay ahead of Super GT drivers and F1
points.zh: 应该能压住那些Super GT和F1车手

points.en: and very, very fast, Giti racing team, the girls only.
points.zh: 还有那个超快的Giti，全女车队

points.en: They've become extremely fast. So, good job over winter.

points.en: Probably, I've become extremely slow with my opposite job, over winter,
points.zh: 而我恰恰相反，一个冬天过去可能变慢了不少

points.en: but we'll see. It should be nice. I'm excited.
points.zh: 看看吧 应该没问题 我很激动

points.en: Yeah, let's bring her home.
points.zh: 嗯，平安带回吧

points.en: -Oh, Grelo. -Yeah.
points.zh: -Grello -嗯

points.en: He's going to lap Kévin Estre.

points.en: It's fine.

points.en: Literally the goat in the car.

points.en: Have more kids, Misha. Keep having kids. It makes you faster.

points.en: Well done, and fast lap times.
points.zh: 跑得好，圈速也快

points.en: Yeah, not bad.

points.en: You were so quick, man.
points.zh: 兄弟你太快了

points.en: Yeah. I think, for start and better performance than last year?
points.zh: 是啊，比去年一开始的表现好多了

points.en: A lot better.
points.zh: 进步超大

points.en: A lot better?
points.zh: 超大吗

points.en: The pace is really good.
points.zh: 速度真的很快

points.en: Yeah.
points.zh: 确实

points.en: The pace is good.
points.zh: 速度很棒

points.en: And I had like traffic, I had to let GT3s pass and, so yeah.
points.zh: 我遇到些交通状况，得给GT3让路

points.en: Just a bit of more practice and confidence.
points.zh: 得再多练练，多一点信心

points.en: Well, and here we are. The class winner of NLS 1.
points.zh: 我们做到了，NLS 1的组别冠军

points.en: Hopefully, one of many more to follow this year.
points.zh: 希望今年能继续拿更多冠军

points.en: What else is there to say?
points.zh: 还能说些什么呢？

points.en: I mean, first of all, thank you very much to everyone.
points.zh: 我想说，首先真的非常感谢大家

points.en: To all the sponsors of course, Bilstein, Black Falcon,
points.zh: 赞助商倍适登、Black Falcon

points.en: Ravenol, Falken Tyres and Zimmermann.
points.zh: 拉锋、飞劲轮胎和Zimmermann

points.en: The team, Manny, Jimmy, Steve, all of you guys,
points.zh: 队友们 Manny、Jimmy、Steve，还有大家

points.en: and I want to say that I dedicate this win
points.zh: 我要把这个胜利献给

points.en: to my son Marko, who actually came a bit early into this world last week,
points.zh: 我的儿子Marko，他上周提前来到这个世界上

points.en: because he was supposed to be still in mummy's belly.
points.zh: 他本来还应该还在妈妈肚子里的

points.en: So, I guess he... Well, I owed it to him to do a good performance.
points.zh: 所以我觉得...我得为他拿出好的表现

points.en: Yeah, since he wanted it to see it in person sooner than anticipated.
points.zh: 谁让他急着亲眼来看比赛呢，比预期都早

points.en: So there's that.
points.zh: 就是这样

points.en: For everyone curious, it's about two weeks before the actual scheduled term,
points.zh: 好奇的话告诉你们，他比预产期早大概两周出生

points.en: so it's nothing like crazy or so.
points.zh: 所以也不算太夸张了

points.en: As mentioned previously, he's in good health and etc., etc.
points.zh: 之前说过，他现在很健康、挺好的

points.en: But today, it's not about me it's about the whole team,
points.zh: 但今天不是属于我的，是属于我们整个团队的

points.en: and I'm extremely happy. It's really motivating as well, especially since,
points.zh: 我特别开心 这也让我特别鼓舞，特别是考虑到

points.en: I wouldn't say, I'm not at the best shape yet,
points.zh: 我身体还没有恢复到最好状态

points.en: my best shape was probably last year 24 hour race,
points.zh: 去年24小时赛可能才是我的巅峰

points.en: because we had a lot of things happening last few weeks and months.
points.zh: 毕竟最近几个月发生了太多的事了

points.en: I mean this, the baby, you saw I was quite ill in Portimao,
points.zh: 这个、孩子，我在波尔蒂芒病殃殃的

points.en: I really hope we can continue for the championship,
points.zh: 真心希望能继续争夺冠军

points.en: because, on average, there needs to be three cars per race in our class
points.zh: 因为我们组别每场需要至少三台车竞争

points.en: and then we can actually have a championship win and not just simply class wins and etc., etc.
points.zh: 这样我们才能真正赢得冠军，而不仅仅是组别胜利

points.en: So, that will be cool. Anyway, thank you everyone.
points.zh: 那就太棒了 总之，感谢大家

points.en: Don't mind the mess it's boy's room after a party.
points.zh: 有点乱，毕竟派对后男生更衣室

points.en: I'm off home, and tomorrow full day TF.
points.zh: 回家了，明天还有全天开放日

points.en: So thanks again, and see you. Bye!
points.zh: 再次感谢，下次见！

points.en: mated to something very lightweight Opel Speedster

points.en: or at least to be mated eventually.
points.zh: 至少最终是这样计划的

points.en: So yeah, it's going to be very exciting.
points.zh: 所以，这非常令人兴奋

points.en: But we have today a car that actually already has achieved that,
points.zh: 但今天这台车，已经把这个梦想实现了

points.en: because over here we have Dutch pride,
points.zh: 因为这是来了一台荷兰的骄傲

points.zh: 就是Donkervoort，GTO D8 或者说 D8 GTO

points.en: -Full name, GTO, Individual. -Individual, yes.
points.zh: -全称就是GTO Individual -专属定制款

points.en: -Because this is the last, last cars from this series. -Yes, yes.
points.zh: -因为这是系列最后一台车了 -没错，没错

points.en: So thank you very much to my friend Yevgeny who came by,
points.zh: 非常感谢我的好友Yevgeny远道而来

points.en: and let me drive this car, and also this car.
points.zh: 让我开这台，还有这台

points.en: In case you're going to be asking,
points.zh: 如果你要问的话

points.en: because people ask me why you're racing under a Dutch flag.
points.zh: 因为总有人问我为什么代表荷兰比赛

points.en: Omdat ik Nederlands ben. Omdat ik het leuk vind, ja. Yeah, anyway.
points.zh: 因为我就是荷兰人 因为我乐意，是啊

points.en: Having said that, we have here Audi DAZA engine,
points.zh: 话说回来，这台车装的是奥迪DAZA引擎

points.en: the five-cylinder from TT RS or RS3 or RSQ3, you name it,
points.zh: 就是TT RS、RS3还有RSQ3上的五缸机

points.en: on the front. Can we see it actually? Can we open the bonnet maybe?
points.zh: 在前舱 能看看吗？能不能打开机盖看看？

points.en: So we have quick releases.
points.zh: 这有快拆扣

points.en: Oh, that's very nice and easy and convenient.
points.zh: 这个设计很方便，不错

points.en: There we go, beautiful.
points.zh: 好了，漂亮

points.en: It's not stock,
points.zh: 不是原厂状态

points.en: or as in, it's not producing the same power
points.zh: 或者说，它输出的马力

points.en: that you would find on the TT, RS,
points.zh: 和TT、RS上的都不一样

points.en: because over here you have, I think 480?
points.zh: 因为这个应该有480匹吧？

points.en: 485 horsepower. And what's the weight of the total package?
points.zh: 485匹马力 那整车的重量是多少？

points.en: -675. -It's quite insane.
points.zh: -675公斤 -太离谱了

points.en: For the rest, the car right now is running Nankang AR1 semi-slicks.
points.zh: 其他部分，现在用的是南港AR1半热熔胎

points.en: It's a TAROX brake, so yeah, pads probably something similar.
points.zh: TAROX的刹车，刹车皮估计也差不多

points.en: But regardless, I mean, on 680 kilograms.
points.zh: 不管如何，680公斤的车身

points.en: You do not need much stopping power.
points.zh: 并不需要多强的制动力

points.en: Now, with great power comes great responsibility.
points.zh: 毕竟能力越大责任越大嘛

points.en: You've seen the semi-slicks, you've seen the brakes,
points.zh: 大家看到了半热熔，看到了刹车

points.en: but you have not seen yet actually is very genius aerodynamics.
points.zh: 但大家很难注意到它天才级的空气动力设计

points.en: The car is very well aerodynamically balanced.
points.zh: 车子的空力平衡做得非常棒

points.en: You have louvers here to reduce the lift that otherwise
points.zh: 这里的百叶窗，用来抵消轮拱产生的额外升力

points.en: would be created for the street legality of the over-fenders.
points.zh: 为了合法上路，加了外扩轮拱，但它会带来升力

points.en: You have here lots of aerodynamic elements for the cooling,
points.zh: 这里一堆气动部件 既增强了散热

points.en: but also additional downforce. Lots and lots of them,
points.zh: 又增加下压力 真的很多，很多

points.en: and even more you would find underneath the car and on the back.
points.zh: 车底和车尾还有更多的空气动力设计

points.en: So like the Speedster that I drove for the very first time
points.zh: 就像我第一次开Speedster那样

points.en: and I was blown away by the amount of downforce
points.zh: 我被它产生的下压力震撼到了

points.en: that the car generated, this does pretty much the same trick.
points.zh: 这台车也能达到类似的效果

points.en: It doesn't have the rear wing, but it's still extremely stable.
points.zh: 它没有尾翼，但依然还是稳得离谱

points.en: But other than that, it does not have traction control, or it has it,
points.zh: 但除此之外，没有牵引力控制，或者说是有的

points.en: but we had to switch it off because the car,
points.zh: 但我们不得不关掉，因为这车

points.en: yeah, it comes really alive with it. You can also,
points.zh: 不关掉车子就会死气沉沉的 另外

points.en: if you want to, switch off ABS because on the rear...
points.zh: 你还能把ABS也关了 后轮那儿...

points.en: Look how we need to open it.
points.zh: 看看这该怎么开

points.en: We need to unlock this, and then here we...
points.zh: 先解锁这个，然后这里...

points.en: Well, you can do it here, or you can do it also here on the outside.
points.zh: 可以在这里操作，或者外面这里也行

points.en: -It's not working. -Okay. Yeah.
points.zh: -它坏掉了 -好吧 嗯嗯

points.en: Yeah, too bad. Yeah, you could.
points.zh: 对啊，可惜了 对，可以

points.en: Otherwise, sometimes... Here you have also D8 GTO Individual Series,
points.zh: 不然嘛，有时候... 这里有D8 GTO Individual系列

points.en: hand-built for Yevgen Sokolovsky, Radio Sokol. Give him a subscribe.
points.zh: 为Yevgen Sokolovsky手工打造，就是Radio Sokol 记得给他点个关注

points.en: Yeah. On the inside, you have lots
points.zh: 嗯 里面也有很多

points.en: of cool stuff to change to like go full race car.
points.zh: 像赛车一样任你折腾的旋钮开关

points.en: You have lights, of course, sure.
points.zh: 各种灯光，当然啦

points.en: You have different traction control modes
points.zh: 还有几种牵引力控制模式

points.en: that you can change the dial over here.
points.zh: 用这个旋钮来切换

points.en: You have also a sport switch that I had not used,
points.zh: 还有一个运动开关，我压根没碰

points.en: so maybe I was running less horsepower than usually. I don't know.
points.zh: 所以可能马力比平时还小一点 谁知道呢

points.en: You can change your brake bias over here,
points.zh: 这里可以调节刹车平衡

points.en: and finally over there, you can change the ABS levels.
points.zh: 最后，那里还可以调整ABS强度

points.en: Completely switch them off.
points.zh: 直接关掉都行

points.en: Or have it in well, we had them in three position,
points.zh: 或者像我们一样用第三档

points.en: and it worked flawlessly and fantastic.
points.zh: 实际表现堪称完美

points.en: And then you have all the gauges like turbo pressure, oil pressure,
points.zh: 仪表能显示各种数据，比如涡轮压力、油压

points.en: and fuel, etc. The coolest and a very special feature about this car
points.zh: 油量等等的 这车最酷、也是最特别的一点

points.en: in particular is that it has a sequential gearbox,
points.zh: 就是它装了序列式变速箱

points.en: -and it is one of three. -One of three cars which built in total.
points.zh: -总共就三台 -总共就三台是这样的

points.en: Only one car with street legal.
points.zh: 只有一台车能合法上路

points.en: Yes, you have here compressor from gearbox.
points.zh: 你看，这是变速箱的压缩机

points.en: Oh, KMP, nice KMP compressor.
points.zh: KMP，KMP压缩机很不错

points.en: Yeah, so for the actuator for the gearbox, it's a pneumatic shifter.
points.zh: 是的，变速箱执行机构是气动的，属于气动换挡

points.en: So it is quite interesting because you still need to use the clutch.
points.zh: 挺有意思的，因为换挡还需要踩离合

points.en: It does not upshift by itself. You can not do flat-foot shifting.
points.zh: 它不会自动升挡 也不能全油门换挡

points.en: And by downshifting, it also does not rev match.
points.zh: 降挡时也不会自动补油

points.en: So you need to actually kind of heel-and-toe
points.zh: 所以你还是得做一点跟趾动作

points.en: without, yeah, having the traditional clutch,
points.zh: 但又不是传统离合的感觉

points.en: having traditional clutch, but it feels weird.
points.zh: 不是传统那种离合，感觉挺怪的

points.en: So I was doing just gentle clutch releases
points.zh: 我一开始只敢轻轻放离合

points.en: because I didn't realize I could actually rev match like
points.zh: 因为没意识到，其实可以像传统变速箱一样

points.en: with a traditional gearbox
points.zh: 自己跟趾动作补油

points.en: because it would be that's something I should have done.
points.zh: 那才是正确操作，我应该这么干的

points.en: And on the very first corner and the first braking zone,
points.zh: 就在第一个弯，在第一个刹车区

points.en: the wheels locked up because the car does downshift
points.zh: 车轮直接抱死了，因为车子降挡时

points.en: and does not rev match,
points.zh: 没有做转速匹配

points.en: and then it can be quite interesting experience.
points.zh: 所以那一下的体验就挺刺激的

points.en: But overall, I loved it. I loved it. I loved it.
points.zh: 但总体来说 我真的喜欢 太喜欢了

points.en: You will hear more about it at the end of the lap.
points.zh: 大家在这圈跑完也能听到我细聊

points.en: And yeah, for the rest, you have lots of tuning,
points.zh: 其他的话，这车有很多调校空间

points.en: fine tuning for the suspension and for everything. Full telemetry.
points.zh: 悬挂什么的都可以精调 还有全套遥测数据

points.en: Full telemetry. Yep, it's fantastic. I really loved it.
points.zh: 全套遥测 太棒了 我真心喜欢

points.en: -So thank you very much. -Thank you.
points.zh: -真的非常感谢 -谢谢

points.en: And yeah, give Radio Sokol a subscribe and also yeah,
points.zh: 别忘了给Radio Sokol点个关注

points.en: check out what we've done with the 296.
points.zh: 也去瞧瞧我们这期296的视频

points.en: And for the Russian audience, Russian speaking audience,
points.zh: 面向俄罗斯观众，说俄语的观众

points.en: we have also done the video together on this channel.
points.zh: 我们在他的频道也一起做了期视频

points.en: So yeah, you can hear me speak Russian for once a while.
points.zh: 难得有一次还能听我说俄语

points.en: You already heard me speaking Dutch, so for Russian you can go there.
points.zh: 已经听过我说荷兰语了，想听俄语可以去那边频道

points.en: Anyway, enjoy the lap.
points.zh: 好好享受这一圈吧

points.en: All right, let's see if we can reach it.
points.zh: 好了，看看我能不能够得着

points.en: So somewhere... How do I even open this door? I don't even know.
points.zh: 在哪里... 这车门到底怎么开？我不知道啊

points.en: Here we go.
points.zh: 好了

points.en: There we go.
points.zh: 搞定

points.en: All right.
points.zh: 好了

points.en: Okay, I don't know where to put it
points.zh: 好吧，不知该放哪儿

points.en: because my pockets are inaccessible.
points.zh: 我的口袋根本够不着

points.en: So let's try to put it underneath myself.
points.zh: 那就试着塞在屁股底下吧

points.en: Welcome to Donkervoort experience.
points.zh: 欢迎体验Donkervoort

points.en: Audi TTRS engine or five-cylinder DAZA engine, 400 horsepower,
points.zh: 搭载奥迪TTRS的五缸DAZA发动机，大概400马力

points.en: plus minus.
points.zh: 上下浮动

points.en: Very little weight.
points.zh: 车重非常轻

points.en: We have a sequential gearbox,
points.zh: 配备序列式变速箱

points.en: but I still need to use the clutch to shift.
points.zh: 但还是得踩离合换挡

points.en: Race ABS.
points.zh: 赛道ABS

points.en: And no traction control, as mentioned.
points.zh: 刚才提过，没有牵引力控制

points.en: On cold slicks. Okay, let's think of what we're doing.
points.zh: 用着冷的光头胎 好是得想想怎么开

points.en: This is sequential.
points.zh: 序列式变速箱

points.en: I don't know if there is like...
points.zh: 不知道有没有...

points.en: I don't even know if you can hear me. Let me just focus on driving.
points.zh: 我甚至不确定你们能不能听见 还是专心开车吧

points.en: Ah, it's so tight in here. I can not use my left elbow.
points.zh: 天呐，空间太挤了 左胳膊肘都施展不开

points.en: Come on.
points.zh: 冲啊

points.en: Need to really watch out with dropping the clutch.
points.zh: 松开离合时一定得万分小心

points.en: Thank you.
points.zh: 多谢

points.en: I don't know the speeds I'm doing.
points.zh: 不知道我现在速度多少

points.en: Yeah, so the car allows you to downshift even when you shouldn't.
points.zh: 嗯，这车还让你在不该降挡的时候乱降挡

points.en: Someone is smoking their brakes.
points.zh: 有人的刹车冒烟了

points.en: Man, those downshifts are so dangerous because the clutch point...
points.zh: 老天，那些降挡太危险了，因为结合点...

points.en: I'm super cautious with this car.
points.zh: 对这台车我特别小心

points.en: It offers quite good grip. It's very stable.
points.zh: 抓地力相当不错 车身特别稳

points.en: The downforce, the flat floor and the diffuser, they do their job.
points.zh: 下压力，平整底盘、扩散器，它们都在起作用

points.en: But you don't want to lose grip
points.zh: 但真的不能失去抓地力

points.en: and end up in a barrier with this car.
points.zh: 不然撞上护栏就完蛋了

points.en: I need to figure out how to operate the clutch properly.
points.zh: 我得搞清楚怎么正确操作离合

points.en: A split window classic Beetle!
points.zh: 一辆分窗的经典甲壳虫

points.en: 1948 license plate.
points.zh: 1948年的车牌

points.en: I wonder if it actually is from 1948.
points.zh: 我在想是不是真的产自1948

points.en: Insane, insane, insane, insane, insane. That's something special.
points.zh: 太绝了，太绝了，太绝了 它真的独一无二

points.en: I don't know if you can hear me.
points.zh: 不知道大家能不能听见

points.en: I'll just in case record a separate outro once I'm out of the car.
points.zh: 以防万一，我下车后再单独录个结尾

points.en: But... this is really something else.
points.zh: 但... 这车真的太不一样了

points.en: I tried to like have a normal conversation like I do
points.zh: 我试着像往常一样跑圈的时候

points.en: usually during my laps,
points.zh: 轻松聊天

points.en: but this was really not possible with everything going on,
points.zh: 但这次根本不可能，真的太疯狂了

points.en: with me having to really focus on the driving
points.zh: 我必须全神贯注驾驶

points.en: because the traction wants to snap every single time.
points.zh: 因为它每次都像要瞬间失去抓地、猛地甩出去

points.en: It does not have rev matching,
points.zh: 它没有自动补油

points.en: so when you downshift with pneumatic actuators,
points.zh: 所以当你用这套气动机构降挡时

points.en: you need to smoothly rev match the clutch or like the engine. So...
points.zh: 你需要柔和地匹配好离合与发动机的转速 所以...

points.en: but because it's automatic, I don't do like really
points.zh: 又因为是自动挡，我没法做完整的跟趾动作

points.en: heel-and-toe because it's not really natural.
points.zh: 因为这个操作不太自然

points.en: Therefore, I had to really easily release the clutch.
points.zh: 所以，我必须非常轻柔地松离合

points.en: So it was really something special, something interesting.
points.zh: 所以它真的很特别、很有趣

points.en: The car is insane.
points.zh: 这车太离谱了

points.en: You know, I definitely, definitely really like it.
points.zh: 所以我真的、真的非常喜欢

points.en: I really, really enjoyed it. At the beginning,
points.zh: 我真的很享受 刚开始的时候

points.en: I really had to get used to the whole overpowered,
points.zh: 我确实要适应那种，动力过强

points.en: little traction feeling and the fact
points.zh: 抓地力又不太够的感觉

points.en: And the fact that I couldn't use my elbow as much as I usually would.
points.zh: 还有就是，我的手肘完全被限制住了

points.en: But once the tires were warmed up, once everything started working,
points.zh: 等轮胎温度上来之后，等一切都就位之后

points.en: once I got this connection with the car,
points.zh: 等我和这车建立起连接之后

points.en: it all started to make sense.
points.zh: 一切就都对味了

points.en: And this is quite likely one of the best track cars I've ever driven
points.zh: 这很可能是我开过的最好的赛道用车之一了

points.en: because it's light,
points.zh: 因为它够轻

points.en: but you have enough power and you have...
points.zh: 又有足够的动力，而且还有...

points.en: You have ABS that you can actually program.
points.zh: 它的ABS是完全编程可调的

points.en: You can switch it off completely,
points.zh: 甚至可以彻底关掉

points.en: but that's not something you want to do.
points.zh: 但是一般也不会这么做

points.en: Right now we were driving on level three.
points.zh: 刚刚我们用的是第三档

points.en: But my god, this was really, really good.
points.zh: 我的天，这真的非常，非常棒

points.en: Really good.
points.zh: 非常棒

points.en: Apologies for lack of talking,
points.zh: 抱歉我没怎么说话

points.en: but I don't think it really matters with such a car.
points.zh: 对这样一台车来说，应该无所谓吧

points.en: Awesome! Awesome! Awesome! Awesome!
points.zh: 绝了！绝了！绝了！绝了！

points.en: Who said mid-engine cars cannot drift?
points.zh: 谁说中置引擎不能漂移来着？

points.en: Alright, the Viper is finally quiet.
points.zh: 这台“蝰蛇”总算静下来了

points.en: -The Viper. -The Viper.
points.zh: -“蝰蛇” -“蝰蛇”

points.en: The mini Viper.
points.zh: 迷你蝰蛇

points.en: Yes, it's a, yeah, it's an inside joke
points.zh: 这是我们之间的一个梗

points.en: because one day my wife, Megi, was walking the dogs
points.zh: 因为有一天我老婆Megi在遛狗的时候

points.en: and she saw Tom in the Corvette, obviously.
points.zh: 看到了Tom，明明开着科尔维特

points.en: And then she came back home and she said,
points.zh: 然后她回到家就说

points.en: "Oh, I saw Tom with the Viper."
points.zh: “我看到Tom开着那台蝰蛇了”

points.en: I'm like, "What is going on with the Viper?"
points.zh: 我就想，“什么蝰蛇，啥情况？”

points.en: I know Tom with the Corvette.
points.zh: 只知道Tom有台科尔维特

points.en: "Hey Tom, were you... Did you see Megi?" "Yeah."
points.zh: “Tom，是不是看到Megi了吗”，“对啊”

points.en: I'm like, "Oh, okay. You have a Viper now. Congratulations."
points.zh: 我说，“好吧，现在你有台蝰蛇了 恭喜啊”

points.en: An upgrade.
points.zh: 升级了

points.en: So, people who follow the channel for a while, they already know this car.
points.zh: 关注这个频道有段时间的朋友，应该已经认识这台车了

points.en: We've done, two years ago, the first lap.
points.zh: 我们两年前就跑了第一圈

points.en: Last year, also a couple of more laps because the car has changed,
points.zh: 去年也跑了好几圈，因为这台车有些改动

points.en: has certain mods.
points.zh: 做了一些改装

points.en: And now the latest mod is AP Racing 5000R braking system on the front,
points.zh: 最新的改装是前轮的AP Racing 5000R刹车系统

points.en: And for the rest, a quick reminder of everything else.
points.zh: 至于其他部分，快速带大家回顾一下

points.en: We've already talked about the front, so the rear are the AP rotors
points.zh: 说完了前轮，后轮用的是AP的刹车盘

points.en: with stock calipers and Endless brake pads all the way around.
points.zh: 配原厂卡钳，然后整套都是Endless刹车片

points.en: Nice, nice, nice, nice.
points.zh: 好，好，好，好

points.en: We are on PS4S because we actually had a discussion about it,
points.zh: 用的是PS4S轮胎，因为我们其实讨论过来着

points.en: like, hey, which tyres should we go for?
points.zh: 嘿，我们到底该用什么胎？

points.en: The temperature is 17 degrees, which is good,
points.zh: 现在的气温是17度，非常不错

points.en: but overnight it's freezing, it's like minus four.
points.zh: 但是夜里会结冰，大概零下四度

points.en: So, in the morning, actually yesterday,
points.zh: 所以早上，其实就昨天早上

points.en: there was ice in the morning on track still.
points.zh: 昨天早上赛道上还结着冰

points.en: Before you could never know, you could never predict
points.zh: 你根本没法提前知道，也预测不了

points.en: if the track would warm up.
points.zh: 赛道温度会不会升上来

points.en: But it actually did throughout the day.
points.zh: 今天白天的温度确实升上来了

points.en: So, anyway, better be safe than sorry.
points.zh: 不管怎么说，安全第一嘛

points.en: So we are limited by PS4s or 4Ss.
points.zh: 我们受限于这PS4S轮胎

points.en: Or... is it 4S? Yeah, 4S.
points.zh: 是4S吗？对，4S

points.en: But still good enough, good grippy, but of course, not as grippy
points.zh: 不过也够用了，挺抓地的 虽然肯定没有

points.en: as a full, semi-slick would be in this case.
points.zh: 正经的半热熔在这种情况抓地

points.en: So very, very nice.

points.en: And luckily the stars, or the blue skies have aligned,

points.en: or bucket seats, or cage, or what's underneath the bonnet.

points.en: Because... or even plastic windows. Wow.

points.en: When it was bone stock and decided to, yeah, modify it quite a bit

points.en: back in 2010. So, 15 years ago.

points.en: Okay.

points.en: So this whole shape, the whole, front has been redesigned, remodeled.

points.en: more modern, more crazy, but I think this is already
