points.zh: 住...哪儿呢？

points.en: You may vaguely remember this car from last year,
points.zh: 你们对这台车应该还有点印象吧

points.en: because we already done a lap with it, or at least
points.zh: 因为我们去年已经用它跑过圈了，

points.en: with its earlier development brother, you could say.
points.zh: 或者说用它的更早期的开发版本

points.en: Sigma WR, which stands for Weekend Racer,
points.zh: Sigma WR，全称是Weekend Racer

points.en: and as you can tell, it's actually quite, well, small maybe, and light.
points.zh: 如你所见，它真的挺小巧的，重量还轻

points.en: So, guess the weight—3, 2, 1—
points.zh: 来猜猜重量，三二一

points.en: from a 1.6 engine of a Peugeot turbocharged. Yes.
points.zh: 来自标致的1.6升涡轮增压引擎，没错

points.en: And that gives you an insane power-to-weight ratio,
points.zh: 这带来了惊人的推重比

points.en: and for the rest, of course, no electronics, no ABS, ESC, traction control,
points.zh: 其他配置嘛，没有电子辅助，ABS、ESC、牵引力控制

points.en: grocery control or you name it. Speaking of grocery control，
points.zh: 买菜模式什么的统统没有，说到买菜模式

points.en: you can optionally get—actually, what's it called?—the trunk if you would want to.
points.zh: 你也可以选装个后备箱，如果你需要的话

points.en: The base price of this car, which makes it also very light on your wallet，
points.zh: 这台车子的起售价对钱包也很友好

points.en: is starting from roughly 40,000 euros. So, for a track car，
points.zh: 大约四万欧元起，作为赛道玩具

points.en: this is fantastic, and it performs as a track car as well，
points.zh: 价格很棒，性能也完全符合赛道玩具定位

points.en: and then you can spec it up to like 60–70,000 euros with all the mods,
points.zh: 你还能选配各种配置，到六、七万欧元

points.en: which makes me very happy, because from what I remember last year，
points.zh: 这让我特别开心，因为我还记得去年的时候

points.en: the car was fantastic when it comes to acceleration and handling，
points.zh: 当时车子的加速和操控都非常出色

points.en: but in the corners, especially bumpy Nordschleife, I was missing some aero.
points.zh: 但在弯道里，尤其是颠簸的纽北，总觉得缺了点空力

points.en: And now, the car was really, really, really, really planted，
points.zh: 现在这台车真的非常，非常，非常稳定

points.en: definitely on the rear, no wheel spin whatsoever.
points.zh: 特别是后轮完全不打滑了

points.en: Also on the front, thanks to some of those wheel flaps—
points.zh: 前轮方面，多亏了这些轮拱翼片

points.en: It works. It's... and thanks to its weight, you can go insane corner speeds.
points.zh: 有效就好，再加上轻量化，过弯速度简直离谱

points.en: Flugplatz, I saw somewhere close to 200,
points.zh: 在飞机场，我看到时速接近200

points.en: and also thanks to its weight， you don't need to rev the car out.
points.zh: 同样得益于重量 你都不用拉高转速，

points.en: I remember I was by Brünnchen and I realized
points.zh: 记得在小水井时，我才意识到

points.en: I'm in fourth gear—maybe I should downshift to third—
points.zh: 我居然挂着四挡呢 或许该降三挡

points.en: and I realized I was actually doing everything in fifth.
points.zh: 结果发现全程用五挡都能搞定

points.en: So, it's actually really also helpful.
points.zh: 所以说这车真的非常友好

points.en: So, very easy car to drive, very nice car to drive，
points.zh: 车子开起来很轻松，很舒服

points.en: very fast car to drive, very reliable and affordable car to drive.
points.zh: 非常快，非常可靠，同时性价比还高

points.en: Not only from a purchase price, but because it's so light，
points.zh: 不仅是买车的价格，由于车重超轻

points.en: you can imagine that it doesn't eat any tyres or brakes.
points.zh: 你懂的，轮胎和刹车损耗都很低

points.en: We know it also already from the Speedster, but in this case，
points.zh: 我们的Speedster就是这样，它更进一步

points.en: that's additional 400 kilos less, or 300.
points.zh: 又轻了三、四百公斤

points.en: Brakes are Wilwood. Nankang AR1 tyres.
points.zh: 刹车是Wilwood的，轮胎是南港AR1

points.en: Of course, you can put any tyres on you want, including the brakes.
points.zh: 当然了，轮胎刹车都可以自己换

points.en: And yeah, HP suspension made in Czech Republic just like the car,
points.zh: 对的，HP悬挂，和车子一样都是捷克产的

points.en: a normal H-pattern gearbox.
points.zh: 普通的H型变速箱

points.en: So, since it has no windshield—and speaking windshield, this can be adjusted，
points.zh: 由于没有挡风玻璃，不过挡风玻璃高度可以定制

points.en: it can be custom-made to be a bit higher for taller people.
points.zh: 给高个子朋友可以做得稍高些

points.en: Since it has no windshield or anything else worth to put our GoPros，
points.zh: 既然没挡风玻璃也没合适位置装GoPro

points.en: I just stuck one on the cage facing forward.
points.zh: 我就直接在防滚架上朝前拍

points.en: I hope the image quality is good enough, including the audio. Otherwise, yeah.
points.zh: 希望画质和收音还过得去 也只能这样了

points.en: We have also brake bias adjustment over here,
points.zh: 这里还有刹车平衡调节

points.en: together with ECUMaster ECU, and the dash.
points.zh: ECUMaster的电脑和仪表盘，

points.en: So, all kinds of fancy fancy stuff.
points.zh: 总之各种高端的配置

points.en: Lapo comes to admire the wings.
points.zh: Lapo欣赏尾翼来了

points.en: How you love the wings? I love the wings, the wings are cool.
points.zh: 你有多爱这尾翼？我爱死这尾翼了，超酷的

points.en: The wings give downforce. Yeah, and I think that's kind of it.
points.zh: 尾翼提供下压力，对，大概就这些

points.en: I'm going to include two laps—one is with the test driver himself，
points.zh: 视频里会放两圈车载，一圈是试车手开的

points.en: development driver, also lots of open-wheel car driver, IndyCar, and etc., etc.
points.zh: 开发车手，开过很多开轮式赛车，IndyCar什么的

points.en: You can google his name and find out what he was all doing.
points.zh: 你去搜他名字就知道他多牛了

points.en: So, this is like a child's play for him.
points.zh: 开这车对他来说像过家家

points.en: It was interesting to see how smooth and easy it was to drive.
points.zh: 看车子起来丝滑又轻松 特别有意思

points.en: Afterwards, I hopped in.
points.zh: 后面是换我来开

points.en: I had a bit of trouble getting used to the pedal position myself.
points.zh: 我自己有点不适应踏板的位置

points.en: They were slightly adjusted for me, to move more out.
points.zh: 虽然稍微为我调整得更靠外了一些

points.en: But, since it's a very...
points.zh: 但毕竟这台车

points.en: Well it's car you need to get a bit more play time, seat time with.
points.zh: 还是需要很多的时间去磨合，去适应

points.en: It was still very nice; didn't need to shift a lot.
points.zh: 不过还是很顺手，不用频繁换挡

points.en: But my heel-and-toe tiny bit sucked, especially because
points.zh: 但我的跟趾动作有点儿拉垮，特别是因为

points.en: it was so kind of rev happy and properly nice.
points.zh: 这车转速响应太灵敏 表现很好

points.en: So, I needed one more lap to adjust to it, I would say.
points.zh: 所以我觉得还需要多跑一圈来适应的

points.en: But, I think it didn't suck at all. Most importantly, again, fantastic car.
points.zh: 车的整体表现绝对不差，再次强调，真的很棒

points.en: Very nice to drive; very happy to see the ongoing development.
points.zh: 开起来很爽，特别高兴能看到它持续研发

points.en: It actually has a cage as well, forgot to mention, which is in these cars quite nice.
points.zh: 对了忘记说，它还配有防滚架，在这种车上很贴心

points.en: And, I mentioned last year after my laps with Ariel Atom，
points.zh: 去年开完Ariel Atom后，我说过

points.en: I said like, I don't want to do open-wheel cars anymore, because I don't want to die.
points.zh: 我再也不想碰开轮式的车了，因为我怕死

points.en: Not that I didn't trust myself, but with all the recent oil leaks，
points.zh: 不是不信任自己，但最近纽北各种漏油

points.en: fluid leaks on the Nordschleife. Every second day we have something.
points.zh: 各种漏液的事故，隔三差五就有状况

points.en: When you lose control with this car, okay, that's one hit，
points.zh: 要是开这车失控撞了，就算一次事故

points.en: and then behind you another car loses control and goes into you, that's a bigger problem.
points.zh: 但如果后面再有车失控追尾，问题就大了

points.en: So, for the Green Hell... But I found this car much more stable
points.zh: 所以在绿色地狱里嘛...不过我发现这车比

points.en: than any open-wheel cars I've driven or experienced so far.
points.zh: 我之前开过的任何开轮式赛车都稳

points.en: So very good job on the aero and all the other components.
points.zh: 空气动力学和其他部件做得非常出色

points.en: It was actually much easier to drive than you would really expect from its base appearance，
points.zh: 实际开起来，还是远不如它外观看起来那么吓人的

points.en: because you might think like, does this look safe？
points.zh: 毕竟你可能会想，这玩意儿安全吗？

points.en: Well, I mean, nothing can be safe if you hit the wall hard enough，
points.zh: 当然了，撞墙够狠的话啥都不安全

points.en: but it's very easy to drive, so that's actually very, very important and very good.
points.zh: 但它真的很好开，这点非常好，也非常、非常重要

points.en: And yeah, I would say, would be looking forward to see what
points.zh: 总而言之，我很期待看到

points.en: the car will have next year, in terms of upgrades，
points.zh: 明年这车会有什么升级

points.en: because I know it's an ongoing development.
points.zh: 毕竟它还在持续开发中

points.en: By the way, Tillet seats. Shout out to them, because we also run them.
points.zh: 顺便提下Tillet座椅，必须致敬，我们也在用

points.en: Very extra lightweight. And that is kind of it.
points.zh: 超轻量化，大概就这样

points.en: So, good job guys.
points.zh: 伙计们干得漂亮

points.en: looking forward to seeing you next year with some more mods, I guess.
points.zh: 期待明年，你们带着更多升级再来

points.en: So, but... Awesome.
points.zh: 总之，太棒了

points.en: And you guys enjoyed the laps, and tell me which one you enjoyed the most.
points.zh: 喜欢你们能喜欢这两圈 也请告诉我你们更喜欢哪圈

points.en: I know which one I enjoyed, the first one
points.zh: 我知道我肯定喜欢第一圈

points.en: where I didn't have to fear for my life, actually.
points.zh: 因为不用担心自己的生命安全

points.en: For one of the few times, when I'm passenger and not scared.
points.zh: 很难得我作为乘客还不害怕

points.en: Now, to be honest, recently, I'm only going out with people that I trust.
points.zh: 说实话，最近我只和信得过的人出去跑

points.en: So, would you trust this man? Let me know in the comments.
points.zh: 你们会信任他吗？评论区告诉我吧

points.en: So, do you want me to drive with you? Or you drive alone？
points.zh: 所以想带上我，还是你自己开？

points.en: It doesn't matter.
points.zh: 无所谓啦

points.en: Without, it's less weight, huh？
points.zh: 不带的话，车更轻对吧

points.en: Yeah, that's how it's going.
points.zh: 对，就是这样

points.en: Okay.
points.zh: 好的

points.en: I don't know if you saw the front end flying.
points.zh: 不知道你们看到车头飞起来没

points.en: All right, I'm sure everyone else can Google the specs for us.
points.zh: 反正，我觉得参数大家可以自己去查

points.en: More importantly, I expect this video to do quite well
points.zh: 更重要的是，这期视频播放量应该不错

points.en: because this is probably one
points.zh: 因为这可能是

points.en: of the most requested cars and attainable cars.
points.zh: 最受期待且触手可及的车型之一

points.en: Very limited, but it was possible to get. And actually,
points.zh: 数量非常稀少，但还是有渠道能搞到的

points.en: as a matter of fact, we worked, I believe,
points.zh: 其实我们花了，差不多是

points.en: 18 months to make it happen, but we couldn't.
points.zh: 十八个月想把它弄来，都没如愿

points.en: It was like something coming in between.
points.zh: 总有一些别的事情插进来了

points.en: Anyway, Alfa Romeo Giulia GTA M.
points.zh: 这是阿尔法罗密欧Giulia GTA M

points.en: So before GTA 6.
points.zh: 比GTA 6早

points.en: All the bad jokes aside,
points.zh: 烂梗先放一边

points.en: very limited special edition, only 500 of them made.
points.zh: 这款限量特别版就造了500台

points.en: And to be precise, this one is number 10.
points.zh: 而且精确到这台是第10号车

points.en: So it's actually being said which number you have.
points.zh: 所以会明确告诉你买到的是第几台

points.en: Unlike some manufacturers say this is just like one of 500,
points.zh: 不像有些厂家只说“这是500台中的一台”

points.en: and which one it actually is, no one knows.
points.zh: 具体是第几号谁也说不清

points.en: While we're already on the inside,
points.zh: 既然我们已经在车里了

points.en: let me walk you through my favorite details.
points.zh: 来给大家讲讲我最喜欢的细节

points.en: So all the Alcantara, the back seat is out.
points.zh: 全是Alcantara，后排座椅没了

points.en: So the only seat that it has is actually cage
points.zh: 所以这车后排唯一的乘客

points.en: is having a seat on the back seat.
points.zh: 其实就是这个防滚架

points.en: Anyway, we have Sparco Italian fire extinguisher,
points.zh: 然后我们备了Sparco意大利灭火器

points.en: just in case because it's of course also Italian car.
points.zh: 以防万一，毕竟这也是意大利车

points.en: Can we make that joke? I don't know, maybe.
points.zh: 能开这个玩笑吗？谁知道呢

points.en: Lots and lots of beautiful carbon fiber, stitching,
points.zh: 好多好多漂亮的碳纤维、缝线

points.en: and all the other fancy beautiful details.
points.zh: 还有其他各种华丽的细节

points.en: I really, really love the seats.
points.zh: 这座椅我太喜欢了

points.en: They're also very comfortable and very track spec-ish.
points.zh: 它们特别舒服，还很有赛道范

points.en: And the front, we have massive, massive, massive brakes.
points.zh: 前面是超级，超级，超级大的刹车

points.en: The tires on the front are 265 and 285 on the rear.
points.zh: 轮胎是前轮265，后轮285

points.en: We have lots of details.
points.zh: 真的是细节满满

points.en: More importantly, compared to the stock Giulia,
points.zh: 更重要的是，和普通Giulia相比

points.en: We have this very beautiful wing.
points.zh: 还有这个漂亮的尾翼

points.en: We have this very beautiful wing.
points.zh: 有了这个漂亮的尾翼

points.en: It's beautiful.
points.zh: 很漂亮

points.en: It generates definitely downforce,
points.zh: 肯定能产生下压力

points.en: but also I think generates lots of drag because on high speeds,
points.zh: 但也会产生巨大的风阻，因为高速的时候

points.en: once you hit the 5th gear, the car just goes on the brake.
points.zh: 一旦挂到5挡，车子就像被刹住了一样

points.en: And it feels like with the high speed,
points.zh: 感觉在高速状态下

points.en: the drag becomes like quite marginal and that becomes an issue.
points.zh: 风阻的这个问题，就会变得更加明显

points.en: Just a quick look at the beautiful Akrapovič central pipe.
points.zh: 简单看一眼，漂亮的天蝎中置排气

points.en: The sound is fantastic. Everything is great.
points.zh: 这声浪太顶了 一切都很棒

points.en: Does it have trunk space?
points.zh: 有后备箱吗？

points.en: Actually quite nice.
points.zh: 实际上还不错

points.en: It's probably special electric charger.
points.zh: 可能是个特别的充电器吧

points.en: We have also some bracing in the back. It's actually good.
points.zh: 后面也有一些加强件 确实还不错

points.en: This feels also very very light.
points.zh: 这个开起来感觉也很轻

points.en: Maybe it's something, some composite, composite roof definitely.
points.zh: 可能是用了什么复合材料，车顶肯定是复合材料

points.en: The doors also feel very very light.
points.zh: 车门也非常轻量化

points.en: But the biggest downside of this car after doing two laps,
points.zh: 但这车跑完两圈后最大的缺点

points.en: we have ducktail, we have the wing,
points.zh: 我们有鸭尾，有尾翼

points.en: we have actually the whole system.
points.zh: 空力系统确实全配上了

points.en: On the front however, we have nothing.
points.zh: 但车头前面呢，什么都没有

points.en: We have, so it seems, some extension. We could extend something.
points.zh: 好像是能把它伸展出来一些 我们把它展开

points.en: Ah, it is already maximum extended.
points.zh: 哦，原来已经伸到最长了

points.en: Because otherwise you would go further back.
points.zh: 不然还能往后移一移

points.en: I guess, yeah, you would slide it back.
points.zh: 应该是，只能往后面滑了

points.en: So this on the maximum attack.
points.zh: 现在就是最战斗的姿态

points.en: But that unfortunately is just an extendable lip.
points.zh: 但可惜这只是一个可伸缩前唇

points.en: I'm trying to feel how far it goes.
points.zh: 我试试看它能伸多远

points.en: How far it goes.
points.zh: 能伸多远

points.en: So I mean I can give you my opinion, but the video don't lie.
points.zh: 虽然这只是我的看法，但视频不会说谎

points.en: Check out Pflanzgarten,
points.zh: 看看植物园那段

points.en: the section where the car usually jumps straight.
points.zh: 车子通常都会完全腾空的地方

points.en: In this case, the car almost made a wheelie.
points.zh: 但这台车几乎都要前轮离地了

points.en: And quite often with all the other sections,
points.zh: 还有其他很多路段也是

points.en: the front end was lifting by a lot.
points.zh: 车头都抬得特别高

points.en: So that was the only downside of the car being imbalanced.
points.zh: 所以，车身不平衡是车子唯一的不足

points.en: But would I take this as an imperfection? The only imperfection.
points.zh: 虑到其他方面的表现，这算得上是瑕疵吗？

points.en: Among everything else? Yeah, absolutely.
points.zh: 算得上是唯一的瑕疵吗？算是吧

points.en: The fixed paddle shifts,
points.zh: 固定式的拨片

points.en: that's my general complaint to every kind of car that has them.
points.zh: 我对所有的固定式拨片的车型都有意见

points.en: But for the rest, great emotion, great handling,
points.zh: 除此之外，感觉超棒、操控一流

points.en: minus the stock alignment and the front end grip.
points.zh: 除了原厂的定位参数和前轴抓地力

points.en: And everything else, great. Lots of carbon fiber.
points.zh: 其他都很好，碳纤维件也很多

points.en: Are you glued on?
points.zh: 这是粘住的？

points.en: Is this glue?
points.zh: 这是胶水吗？

points.en: I don't know.
points.zh: 我不确定

points.en: I'm gonna be very pedantic about it.
points.zh: 我就是要对这个吹毛求疵一下

points.en: Right, I guess you want to see the lap.
points.zh: 大家肯定想看跑圈的视频

points.en: Actually done two, so one warm up and then one more. So enjoy, enjoy.
points.zh: 其实跑了两圈，热身一圈以后又跑了一圈 慢慢欣赏

points.en: Quick shameless plug before the onboard.
points.zh: 看车载前，先厚着脸皮打个广告

points.en: We're doing autumn sale on my website nur-bcy.com
points.zh: 我的网站nur-bcy.com正在搞秋季促销

points.en: that has Nürburgring licensed products
points.zh: 那里有纽博格林正版周边

points.en: that I have helped to co-develop or design,
points.zh: 都是我参与开发或设计的

points.en: such as Nürburgring guides, posters, socks, you name it.
points.zh: 比如纽博格林指南、海报、袜子，应有尽有

points.en: Use code MISHA15 and get 15 % discount
points.zh: 使用优惠码MISHA15可以享受85折

points.en: on all the products that are not discounted already
points.zh: 那些还没打折的商品都能用

points.en: until the end of October. And now, let's go for a lap.
points.zh: 优惠持续到十月底 好啦，我们去跑一圈吧

points.en: All right, a lot of things I want to say to you guys.
points.zh: 好啦，有很多话想跟大家说

points.en: First of all, very special moment.
points.zh: 首先，这是个非常特别的时刻

points.en: It's been eight months
points.zh: 过去八个月

points.en: in development that I've been trying to drive this car,
points.zh: 期间我一直在尝试想开这辆车

points.en: trying to organize it together with the owner,
points.zh: 一直在跟车主协调安排

points.en: but always something came in between
points.zh: 但总有事情耽误

points.en: or the car was not ready or he couldn't do it.
points.zh: 要么车没弄好，要么车主没空

points.en: So we finally made it happen.
points.zh: 好在现在终于成行了

points.en: I have quite high expectations of this car and also of this video
points.zh: 我对这台车、还有这期视频期待都很高

points.en: because this is one of the most requested cars probably
points.zh: 因为这可能是大家最期待的车子之一

points.en: from the doable cars that we can get on the channel. So let's see.
points.zh: 也是我们频道能搞到的车里呼声最高的 走着瞧吧

points.en: This might be also...
points.zh: 这也可能会...

points.en: might be also quite a long video because...
points.zh: 可能是个比较长的视频，因为...

points.en: if I like it very well, very much,
points.zh: 如果我特别喜欢它

points.en: I might try to do a second lap
points.zh: 可能还会再跑一圈

points.en: after warming up the tires and everything.
points.zh: 等轮胎彻底热起来之后再跑一圈

points.en: Another disclaimer, the owner told me
points.zh: 还有一点要声明，车主说

points.en: that the car's geometry feels a bit off.
points.zh: 感觉这台车的几何设定有点问题

points.en: So maybe I will not do a second lap if I feel that.
points.zh: 如果我也有同感，就不跑第二圈了

points.en: The car setup is not ideal.
points.zh: 如果车子的调校还不到位

points.en: Yeah, we really need to warm up these Cup 2 tires
points.zh: 我们真的需要暖一下这些Cup 2

points.en: because they're really new, unused, and cold.
points.zh: 因为胎是全新的 没用过 还很冷

points.en: And I already put the car in race mode,
points.zh: 我已经把车切到赛道模式了

points.en: which means ESC is fully off, everything is off.
points.zh: 意味着ESC全关，所有辅助都关了

points.en: And according to what the owner told me,
points.zh: 然后车主跟我说起过

points.en: when these cars were introduced and they were doing like press drives
points.zh: 当年这车刚发布，搞媒体试驾的时候

points.en: with the cars, there was absolutely a big no-no to run these cars...
points.zh: 那时候有个绝对的禁令，就是不准开这台车的...

points.en: in race mode because apparently this is the most crashed car
points.zh: 的赛道模式，因为据说这是所有媒体试驾车里

points.en: of any press car because once they were putting it in race mode,
points.zh: 事故率最高的车 一旦有人开了赛道模式

points.en: it was just everyone went in the wall.
points.zh: 基本就是全员上墙

points.en: So hopefully I'll do a bit better than that.
points.zh: 希望我能比他们强点

points.en: One point of complaint immediately before we even warm up
points.zh: 在轮胎都没暖起来之前，就得先吐槽一点

points.en: and feel the driving characteristics, just general,
points.zh: 在感受到驾驶特性之前，先说说普遍性问题

points.en: not only this car, I freaking hate fixed paddle shifts.
points.zh: 不光是这台车，我特讨厌固定式换挡拨片

points.en: I really do not know why people do it.
points.zh: 真搞不懂为啥要这么设计

points.en: Someone commented once on my video saying like,
points.zh: 以前有人在我的视频底下评论说

points.en: in case you're counter-steering, you're in a drift,
points.zh: 要是你在反打方向、车身在漂移时

points.en: you always know what's the upshift and what the downshift paddle is.
points.zh: 总能知道哪个是升档拨片、哪个是降档拨片

points.en: Well, if I'm counter-steering, my also hands are also always kind
points.zh: 但反打的时候，我的手也基本保持在差不多

points.en: of more or less in the same position and I know what to do.
points.zh: 同样的位置，我很清楚该怎么操作

points.en: As a driver, I want to be able to upshift and downshift always
points.zh: 作为车手，我希望任何时候都能升降挡

points.en: in the best possible way, also in corners.
points.zh: 用最顺手的方式，哪怕在弯中

points.en: The bottom line is,
points.zh: 说到底

points.en: if fixed solution would have been better for whatever reason,
points.zh: 如果固定式方案真的更好的话

points.en: they would run fixed solution of paddle shifts in F1.
points.zh: 那F1赛车上早就用固定式拨片了

points.en: But they don't, and all the other racing either.
points.zh: 但他们都没有，其他赛事也一样

points.en: So I don't know where it comes from, what the idea is.
points.zh: 我也不懂为什么，这想法哪来的

points.en: Ferrari does it, Alfa does it, McLaren does it,
points.zh: 法拉利用、阿尔法用、迈凯伦用

points.en: and some manufacturers as well. I think Lamborghini.
points.zh: 有些厂家也用，兰博基尼吧

points.en: So all the Italians, it's a really Italian thing.
points.zh: 意大利品牌都这样，真是意大利传统了

points.en: Anyway, as we start driving, I'm starting to notice
points.zh: 反正，我们开起来了，我开始注意到

points.en: a lots of other things about the car.
points.zh: 这车好多其他的问题

points.en: So it doesn't have a lot of torque on the up,
points.zh: 高转速区间扭力还是不太够

points.en: on the higher rev range. Not that it's a problem.
points.zh: 高转速区差点意思 倒也问题不大

points.en: The car can use, compared to the wing,
points.zh: 考虑到后面的尾翼

points.en: it's really rear biased because the front end lifts a lot.
points.zh: 空力真的很偏向尾部，车头抬起很明显

points.en: You can actually probably see it.
points.zh: 大家可能都能看到

points.en: You can hear also front tires squealing.
points.zh: 还能听到前轮在响

points.en: There's not enough grip on low speed section on the front as well.
points.zh: 在低速路段，前轴的抓地力也不太够

points.en: The mechanical grip, trip, mechanical trip,
points.zh: 机械抓地力，抓地，机械抓地

points.en: that's the big word I need.
points.zh: 我就想说这个词

points.en: The mechanical grip of the front axle is also in general
points.zh: 前轴的，机械抓地力，总体来说

points.en: on low speed corners also not that great,
points.zh: 在低速弯里也不是很强

points.en: but this mostly has to do with the alignment.
points.zh: 但这主要跟四轮定位有关系

points.en: Because you can hear the car understeer.
points.zh: 因为你能听见车子在推头

points.en: But that, to be fair, I think has to do with the wing.
points.zh: 平心而论，我觉得这跟尾翼也有关

points.en: Or maybe that the tires are getting warm now. That probably as well.
points.zh: 也可能是轮胎现在变热了，这个也有可能

points.en: We'll try to do a second lap.
points.zh: 我们会尝试再做第二圈

points.en: But it doesn't feel like there's gonna be much more in it.
points.zh: 但感觉不会有什么大提升

points.en: Quite dirty here, so we need to watch out.
points.zh: 这段路面很脏，要多加小心

points.en: Definitely do not want to join the press club
points.zh: 我可不想加入开这车出事的

points.en: of people crashing this car.
points.zh: 媒体人之列

points.en: Can you even buy them still, probably second hand,
points.zh: 这车还能买到吗，可能二手有

points.en: but yeah, new would be impossible.
points.zh: 但买全新是不可能的

points.en: So yeah, the front end grip is really bad.
points.zh: 所以前轴抓地力真的不行

points.en: Could be that it has to do that the wing is aggressive,
points.zh: 可能是因为这尾翼太激进了

points.en: but it's in neutral position.
points.zh: 但它已经调到中位了

points.en: You can adjust it, but I think like most of the cars,
points.zh: 可以调整，但我觉得跟很多车一样

points.en: for all the reasons,
points.zh: 考虑到各种原因

points.en: the rear aero is just way more aggressive than the front is.
points.zh: 它后边的空力就是要比车头的激进得多

points.en: So I have to deal with that.
points.zh: 所以只能忍受着了

points.en: What I do want to say, what is phenomenal,
points.zh: 但我要说，它真正出色的点

points.en: what is really great, are the brakes.
points.zh: 就是它的刹车非常棒

points.en: There's fantastic brake pedal feel, it's super stiff.
points.zh: 刹车脚感绝了，特别硬实

points.en: The brake power is also amazing, because those are massive.
points.zh: 制动力也是惊人的，因为刹车盘巨大无比

points.en: I didn't read the brochure,
points.zh: 我没仔细看产品册

points.en: I have no idea how big or small they actually are.
points.zh: 具体大小其实不太清楚

points.en: It was quite impressive. I don't know. I'll lift right here
points.zh: 真的令人印象深刻 这里我松油了

points.en: because I don't feel comfortable to go flat out through there.
points.zh: 不太有信心在这里全油通过

points.en: The modularity of braking is also quite... really like a race car.
points.zh: 刹车的模块化设计也相当... 很有赛车的感觉

points.en: The brake pedal is really really stiff.
points.zh: 刹车踏板真的非常硬

points.en: You do have a brake booster of course
points.zh: 虽然肯定有刹车助力

points.en: because the road car at the end of the day.
points.zh: 因为毕竟是街车嘛

points.en: But there's a very thin line between triggering ABS
points.zh: 但区间非常窄，就是触发ABS和

points.en: and just providing the maximum stopping power.
points.zh: 达到最大制动力之间的界限非常微妙

points.en: So here you can see how much the front end is actually bouncing.
points.zh: 这里大家能看到车头弹跳得多厉害

points.en: And we are in race modes, so we could put the suspension in mid.
points.zh: 这是赛道模式，我们可以试着把悬挂调到中等

points.en: I guess this is like even like more softer.
points.zh: 这应该算... 更软的那一档

points.en: I've been told by the owner.
points.zh: 车主这么告诉我的

points.en: Yep. Nope.
points.zh: 嗯 不行

points.en: I don't know if you could see that it goes through the corner.
points.zh: 我不知道大家能不能看到刚才过弯

points.en: That was horrible. That was super dangerous.
points.zh: 真的太烂了 简直太危险了

points.en: The car was just like a bag of... salsiccia.
points.zh: 那车简直像一袋... 意式香肠

points.en: What else has a form or a shape of a salsiccia?
points.zh: 还有啥形状像意大利香肠的？

points.en: Honestly, I do not think it's gonna make sense
points.zh: 说真的，我没觉得有必要

points.en: for me to do a second lap because...
points.zh: 再跑第二圈，因为...

points.en: Oh, that was spicy.
points.zh: 哎呀 刺激了

points.en: Even though we have traffic, of course,
points.zh: 当然，现在路上有车

points.en: it's gonna get maybe even busier.
points.zh: 可能一会儿车更多

points.en: My biggest problem...
points.zh: 最大的问题是...

points.en: Understeer in the carousel. My God. Okay.
points.zh: 旋转木马推头，老天，好吧

points.en: I would like to do round two with this car or another car,
points.zh: 我倒是想用这台车或者换辆车再跑一圈

points.en: but we need to redo the setup
points.zh: 但我们得重新调校

points.en: because it's super understeery, super sketch.
points.zh: 因为这台车太推头了，太不稳了

points.en: I'm kind of sad and...
points.zh: 我有点难过...

points.en: But I don't think it's...
points.zh: 可我不觉得是...

points.en: I think you need to really like put the bigger splitter on the front.
points.zh: 我觉得还是得换上更大的前铲才行

points.en: Oh yeah. It's basically not a quick fix.
points.zh: 是啊 这基本上没法快速解决

points.en: All right, I'm gonna be quiet from now on.
points.zh: 好吧，从现在起我要少说话了

points.en: No Wipperman challenge picture unfortunately.
points.zh: 可惜弹跳者挑战没能拍到照片

points.en: Just gonna focus on the driving.
points.zh: 还是专心开车吧

points.en: The drop in revs is also quite...
points.zh: 转速掉得也...

points.en: Oh, I don't know if you saw the front end flying.
points.zh: 不知道大家看见车头飞起来没有

points.en: I think it's yeah, it's a big aero balance difference.
points.zh: 我觉得是空力平衡差距太大了

points.en: I wish we had a race track photographer through there.
points.zh: 真希望有赛道摄影师在那里拍照

points.en: Also here, the front end just like massively lifts.
points.zh: 还有这里，车头也是猛然翘起

points.en: So I think the back wing generates lots of downforce,
points.zh: 看来它的尾翼提供的下压力确实大

points.en: whereas the front is just zero, nothing.
points.zh: 而车头几乎没有，基本没有

points.en: Alright.
points.zh: 好吧

points.en: So... Conclusion.
points.zh: 总结一下

points.en: Well, in terms of handling, it was actually good.
points.zh: 嗯，操控上来讲，其实挺好的

points.en: I mean, aside from the front end,
points.zh: 我是说，除了车头的问题

points.en: that the back end is making too much downforce.
points.zh: 因为车尾下压力太足了

points.en: Because that was... through Pflanzgarten
points.zh: 因为刚才... 过植物园那段

points.en: and you could clearly see the front end just like really flies off.
points.zh: 你能明显看到车头真的要飞起来了

points.en: So that needs to be balanced. So this is imbalance.
points.zh: 这得平衡一下 现在属于失衡的状态

points.en: I don't know if the car or the setup. But knowing the components,
points.zh: 不知道是车还是设定的问题 但根据零件来看

points.en: usually splitters are not that extreme on production spec cars.
points.zh: 量产车的前铲通常没有那么夸张

points.en: We have three stripes of a fuel tank left.
points.zh: 油箱还剩下三格油

points.en: I didn't check the gas tank before going on, so...
points.zh: 出来前没检查油箱，所以...

points.en: Should we try to do one more lap? Will we be able to?
points.zh: 要不要再跑一圈？能跑吗？

points.en: Let's try to do one more lap, right?
points.zh: 再跑一圈吧，行吧

points.en: Because I mean, such a unique car.
points.zh: 毕竟这车这么独特

points.en: Just gonna quickly drop the tire pressures. Then we go again, right?
points.zh: 先把胎压降一降 然后再跑一圈吧

points.en: Let's see, let's see.
points.zh: 看看情况

points.en: Second lap.
points.zh: 第二圈

points.en: Put the car back in.
points.zh: 车子又回来了

points.en: The front tires at the end of the lap were 2. 6 bar.
points.zh: 跑完第一圈，前轮胎压到了2.6巴

points.en: I think 1. 9 towards 2 bar with the Cup 2s should be optimal,
points.zh: 我觉得用Cup 2的话，1.9到2巴应该是最好

points.en: so they were a bit hot, of course.
points.zh: 所以轮胎是有点过热了

points.en: More importantly, I checked the wing,
points.zh: 更重要的是，我检查了下尾翼

points.en: and from what the quick look that I had, out of four positions...
points.zh: 我目测了一下，在四个可调位置里...

points.en: Or out of five.
points.zh: 不对，是五挡

points.en: Basically, it was not... it was more on the lower spectrum,
points.zh: 总之不是在最激进那一档，处于偏低挡位

points.en: so not the most extreme one.
points.zh: 不是最极限那个

points.en: Okay, so let's try again.
points.zh: 我们再试一次

points.en: What I haven't spoken yet about, I really like the sound
points.zh: 还有一个没说到的点，我真的喜欢这个声浪

points.en: of the exhaust because it reminds me of a GT2 RS.
points.zh: 它排气的声浪让我想起了GT2 RS

points.en: This really turbo warble, especially the downshifts.
points.zh: 特别是降挡的时候，那种涡轮的颤音

points.en: The Akrapovič system is really amazing.
points.zh: 这套天蝎排气真的太绝了

points.en: Very controllable and what I believe the reason
points.zh: 非常的可控，我觉得之所以

points.en: for the high downforce wing is probably
points.zh: 把尾翼下压力做这么大

points.en: because how playful the car is.
points.zh: 因为车子实在太活跃了

points.en: Because at the end of the day, it's just rear-wheel drive,
points.zh: 说到底，毕竟它就是后轮驱动

points.en: unlike the G series BMW. It's not all-wheel drive,
points.zh: 不像G系列宝马那样是四驱

points.en: and you can use all that extra spicy Italian power on all the wheels.
points.zh: 没法把那股意大利猛劲用在全部的轮子上

points.en: So what happened now is the car went in oversteer.
points.zh: 所以刚才发生的情况是车子转向过度了

points.en: It snapped almost, but actually regained grip.
points.zh: 几乎要失控的时又重新抓住地了

points.en: So as I tried to countersteer,
points.zh: 我刚准备反打方向

points.en: it actually got grip and almost went the other way.
points.zh: 它就抓住地了，差点朝另一边甩

points.en: So... big wing works,
points.zh: 所以...大尾翼有用

points.en: but it doesn't have the front end to compensate for that.
points.zh: 但前面又没有相应的下压力来平衡

points.en: But while we are kind of stuck in traffic,
points.zh: 趁着现在被堵着

points.en: I want to talk to you about the car in general.
points.zh: 我想好好聊聊这车的大体情况

points.en: I haven't had too much of a detailed look,
points.zh: 我还没有特别仔细观察过

points.en: but when I look at the whole assembly...
points.zh: 但看它的整体装配...

points.en: What the hell is ahead of us? Look at this yellow thing.
points.zh: 我们前面什么鬼？看看那个黄色的家伙

points.en: Is this a Polski Fiat with 5 billion horsepower?
points.zh: 是台五十亿马力的波兰菲亚特吗？

points.en: Looks something very spicy.
points.zh: 很不好惹的样子

points.en: But what I want to say is all the details on the car are really nice.
points.zh: 不过我想说的是，车子的细节都很好

points.en: Like Alcantara, the fire extinguisher, roll cage.
points.zh: 像是Alcantara、灭火器、防滚架这些

points.en: It looks very, very good. So are we... Dude, brother!
points.zh: 看起来都很棒 我们这是... 老兄！

points.en: Like, I mean, fair play. We should not go three wide,
points.zh: 这有点，讲道理 我们确实不该三车并行

points.en: but with a bit of spatial awareness,
points.zh: 但有点空间意识行不行

points.en: don't move over to the left when there's a car next to you.
points.zh: 当你旁边有车的时候别往左边挤啊

points.en: At least he passed everyone else so far.
points.zh: 至少他现在超过其他人了

points.en: Understeer, understeer.
points.zh: 推头，推头

points.en: Okay, off we go. And that's the place where the GT3
points.zh: 好了，走起 这一段路

points.en: behind us is gonna get frustrated probably,
points.zh: 我们后面的GT3估计要抓狂了

points.en: because on this high-speed corner section,
points.zh: 因为这种高速弯道赛段

points.en: I'm not feeling comfortable enough to be pushing.
points.zh: 我实在不想冒险猛冲

points.en: But we have traffic ahead of us anyway.
points.zh: 不过前面也有慢车就是了

points.en: Rental cars, so always watch out.
points.zh: 租车行的车，一定要当心

points.en: This front end is something else...
points.zh: 这前轴真是一言难尽...

points.en: In a bad way.
points.zh: 不是夸它

points.en: So here, more grip on the front,
points.zh: 如果前轴抓地力再好点

points.en: you could take so many sections flat.
points.zh: 好多路段都能全油门过

points.en: Shout out to the license plate owner over there, "BELLOFS"
points.zh: 给前面车牌“BELLOFS”的车主点个赞

points.en: Fuel, we have two things, I don't know.
points.zh: 油量还剩两格吧，不太清楚

points.en: Two out of previously three, so with less fuel, but still not one.
points.zh: 从刚才的三格掉到了两格，但还没见底

points.en: So we should have enough.
points.zh: 那应该够了

points.en: No, what the hell, man?
points.zh: 不，搞什么鬼啊？

points.en: I don't know why the GoPros keep doing that.
points.zh: 真不懂GoPro怎么老这样

points.en: Sometimes just dies.
points.zh: 有时直接死机

points.en: Thank you.
points.zh: 谢谢

points.en: What's the Golf gonna do?
points.zh: 高尔夫要干嘛，

points.en: So no people in the van, less weight.

points.en: It's probably better in this case.

points.en: New fuel pump, fresh seals, went through the whole thing

points.en: just for more so reliability and not have that Subaru experience.

points.en: and keep the hot air from the headers away from the filter.

points.en: but... built for purpose, you've got vents.

points.en: people putting bigger scoops or bigger vents, it helps.

points.en: It's older cars, it's a big issue with having heat soak,

points.en: especially when you modify it. Even with today's cars,

points.en: if you do a chip tuning, it overheats instantly,

points.en: so let alone with the older car. Anyway, we can talk for a long time,

points.en: Now, Touristenfahrten  Nürburgring, public sessions Nürburgring. What is this?
points.zh: 纽博格林游客日、公众开放日，到底是什么？

points.en: It's basically your opportunity to drive the world's most exciting
points.zh: 这就是你去驾驶世界上 最激动人心

points.en: demanding, longest track in the world, the Nürburgring Nordschleife,
points.zh: 最具挑战性、最长的赛道—纽博格林北环的机会

points.en: for either 30 euros during the week between Monday till Thursday
points.zh: 要么是周一至周四，收费30欧元每圈

points.en: or Friday till Sunday for 35 euros,
points.zh: 周五到周日，35欧元

points.en: or, alternatively, if you live nearby or coming very often
points.zh: 如果住在附近或经常来，可以考虑年票

points.en: for 2,500 euros until 10th of January, I believe,
points.zh: 在1月10日前买好像是2500欧元

points.en: or for 3,000 euro afterwards,
points.zh: 之后是3000欧元，

points.en: you can have an unlimited season ticket where you drive non-stop.
points.zh: 在整个赛季可以不限次数，想开多久开多久

points.en: So that could be quite interesting. So the break-even point is around 100 laps.
points.zh: 这还挺有意思的 盈亏平衡点大概在100圈

points.en: Related to that, the opening times, usually Monday till Thursday,
points.zh: 说到这个，周一到周四的开放时间通常是

points.en: they are from 5:15 till 7:30
unless it's daylight savings, it's getting dark earlier,
points.zh: 除非是夏令时 天黑得比较早

points.en: or if there is, maybe, industry pool happening before that
points.zh: 或者如果之前有厂商测试时段

points.en: with the prototype testing sessions.
points.zh: 加上原型车测试时段

points.en: But on average, it's two hours.
points.zh: 平均来说开放两小时

points.en: from 8 in the morning till 7:30 in the evening
points.zh: 从早上8点  到晚上7:30，

points.en: unless, again,  the track is rented for an event or whatsoever.
points.zh: 除非是赛道被租用举办活动之类的

points.en: What I want to say, if you're coming from far away,
points.zh: 我想说的是 如果你从大老远来

points.en: unless your schedule does not allow you to,
points.zh: 除非你的日程不允许

points.en: do not aim to drive one evening session alone
points.zh: 不要只计划跑一个傍晚时段

points.en: because track might be closed due to weather condition, or due to an accident,
points.zh: 因为赛道可能因为天气、因为事故关闭了

points.en: and you might not be able to experience the track.
points.zh: 你可能就体验不到纽北了

points.en: So always schedule two days.
points.zh: 所以必须安排两天

points.en: And even for the weather reasons, if it's raining one day,
points.zh: 哪怕只考虑到天气因素 万一其中一天下雨

points.en: it usually does not rain two days in a row.
points.zh: 通常也不会连续下两天

points.en: I mean, it might, but the chances are usually not that great.
points.zh: 当然有可能，但概率一般不大

points.en: Anyway. That's something to take into consideration.
points.zh: 总之，这点一定要考虑到

points.en: Really try to get the most of it.
points.zh: 充分利用好机会

points.en: Now, important things to know about Nürburgring Nordschleife Touristenfahrten.
points.zh: 现在说说纽北游客驾驶的重要事项

points.en: Basically a public toll road.
points.zh: 基本上是一条收费公路

points.en: This means your car needs to be street legal.
points.zh: 这意味着你的车需要能合法上路

points.en: And certain things that might be street legal in your country,
points.zh: 一些在你们国家可以合法上路的配置

points.en: may not be okay on the Nordschleife during public sessions,
points.zh: 在纽北公众开放日可能就行不通

points.en: such as seats with ears are not allowed, because they limit your visibility.
points.zh: 比如带护耳的坐椅是禁止的，因为会遮挡视野

points.en: The use of HANS system is also not allowed,
points.zh: HANS系统也不允许使用

points.en: because, apparently, they restrict your visibility just as the seats with ears,
points.zh: 因为HANS和带护耳的赛椅一样会影响视野

points.en: which I very find contradictive,
points.zh: 我觉得挺矛盾的

points.en: because during racing in 24 hours or any kind of racing on the 'Ring,
points.zh: 明明在跑24小时和其他纽北比赛的时候

points.en: you have seats with ears with HANS system
points.zh: 护耳赛椅和HANS都是标配

points.en: and you need to be able to look in your rearview mirror
points.zh: 车手既要盯着后视镜观察后方

points.en: or even sometimes next to you when you're doing some dog fighting or maneuvers.
points.zh: 在进行缠斗或者机动的时候，还得观察两侧的情况

points.en: because we're humans and that's my point of complaint.
points.zh: 人之常情嘛，这就是我的想抱怨的点

points.en: Aside from that, wings could also be... questionable
points.zh: 除此之外，改装尾翼也可能踩雷

points.en: or any other parts that might be okay in your country,
points.zh: 有些在你们国家合法的改装件

points.en: but are not okay on the Nürburgring.
points.zh: 在纽博格林就不行

points.en: For example, also you need to run a front plate.
points.zh: 比如，必须挂前车牌这条

points.en: So if two years ago you could get away with having a car registered
points.zh: 两年前，如果你来自不用挂前车牌的地区

points.en: in certain states in US or any other countries in the world
points.zh: 美国的一些州或者其他的几个国家

points.en: where you do not have a front plate,
points.zh: 你还能蒙混过关

points.en: now they will require you even to write with
points.zh: 现在他们甚至会要求你

points.en: a piece of paper, a plate on the car.
points.zh: 用纸写一个车牌贴在前面

points.en: So it's just something to be aware of.
points.zh: 所以要留意一下这点

points.en: Important, you know, also, since the public road
points.zh: 重要的是，因为它是公共道路

points.en: and all the rules apply is that
points.zh: 所有法规都适用，所以

points.en: your car needs to be insured on the track.
points.zh: 你的车子在纽北必须上了保险

points.en: Majority of the insurers or countries in the world exclude the Nürburgring.
points.zh: 世界上大多数国家的保险公司都把纽博格林排除在外

points.en: What does this mean?
points.zh: 这意味着什么？

points.en: If you have an accident on the track,
points.zh: 如果你在赛道上发生事故

points.en: you will be liable to pay for the damages either to the track or the third party.
points.zh: 你将需要自己赔付对赛道或第三方造成的损失

points.en: Now before you're going to scream like,
points.zh: 大家先别急着高呼

points.en: Oh, the Nürburgring is only like it's earning
points.zh: “天啊，纽博格林就指望着”

points.en: its money with all these expensive barriers.
points.zh: “那些天价护栏赚钱呢”

points.en: Do not try.
points.zh: 别试

points.en: But if you're going to crash on any other track in the world,
points.zh: 其实在世界上任何一条赛道上撞了

points.en: you will have to pay for those barriers as well.
points.zh: 你也同样需要赔偿护栏的

points.en: If you're going to crash on a public road here somewhere
points.zh: 如果你在一条公共道路上撞车了

points.en: into a bus stop, or even also guardrail on the highway,
points.zh: 撞上了公交站台，或者高速的护栏

points.en: you will have to pay for this.
points.zh: 你也需要赔付

points.en: Now, you do have car insurance, so your insurance most likely going to take it over
points.zh: 这些情况你有了车险，大概率保险公司会理赔

points.en: unless you were driving drunk or reckless driving or etc., etc.
points.zh: 除非你酒驾，或者危险驾驶什么的

points.en: So your insurance is there to cover it.
points.zh: 所以你的保险是会赔付的

points.en: But the Nürburgring is quite often excluded unless
points.zh: 但是纽博格林经常被排除在外

points.en: it is included in some of the German insurers or even also foreign ones.
points.zh: 除非是一些德国和部分外国的保险公司

points.en: For example, the big crash with the M4 that I had last year,
points.zh: 比如我去年M4的那次大撞车

points.en: The Belarusian insurance paid 70% of the barriers.
points.zh: 白俄罗斯保险赔了70%的护栏费用

points.en: So there's that.
points.zh: 所以就是这样

points.en: So read through the fine print but be prepared that your car is not insured.
points.zh: 要仔细阅读细则 做好你的车子没有保险的准备

points.en: Therefore, it might be interesting for you to actually rent a car.
points.zh: 所以说，租车其实是一个不错的选择

points.zh: 纽北周边有非常非常多的租车公司

points.zh: Track-Speed、NürbLife、EVN Rentals和Rent4Ring

points.en: And a couple of others.

points.zh: 如果你还不知道 Apex已经不做租车业务了

points.en: for two years I think by now

points.en: Because a lot of them also do left-hand drive, right-hand drive cars etc., etc.

points.en: But insurance is important.
points.zh: 记住保险这项不能少

points.en: And also the fact that the car might be also prepared for the track.
points.zh: 还有就是，车子一定要为赛道做好了准备

points.en: So if you're traveling with just a car,
points.zh: 所以如果你只是开车来

points.en: or maybe you're flying in. And that's a very important feature.
points.zh: 或者坐飞机过来 这是非常重要的一个点

points.en: if you want to prepare your trip for the Nürburgring,
points.zh: 如果你想为纽博格林之旅做准备

points.zh: 最近的是杜塞尔多夫、科隆、法兰克福机场

points.en: and there are no public connections.
points.zh: 没有到纽博格林的公共交通

points.en: No public transport connections. So you cannot take the bus; You cannot take the train.
points.zh: 没有公共交通 意味着不能坐大巴车，也不能坐火车

points.en: You will have to rent an airport rental to get to the Nürburgring,

points.en: and do not take that one out on the track,

points.en: because if you have an incident, you're gonna be sued for oblivion.
points.zh: 因为如果一旦出事，你会被起诉到倾家荡产

points.en: but they will find you either through pictures on Racetracker or some of my videos.

points.en: "Because I am in your video driving this rental car,"

points.en: Like, well, should read terms and conditions.

points.zh: 因为去年真的有人跟某个频道联系

points.zh: 很多人以为纽北每天都开放，其实大错特错

points.zh: 现在是冬天，我在克罗地亚享受日落

points.en: There might be a race happening.  There might be lots of things happening.

points.en: So they're often, you can go on the GP,

points.zh: 正是因为这个原因 大多数租车公司

points.en: also check if there is an event happening.
points.zh: 也要看看有没有举办活动

points.en: There is another event calendar for the Nürburgring.
points.zh: 纽博格林还有一个活动日程表

points.en: Because you might want to visit the particular event,
points.zh: 因为你可能想去参加某个特定的活动

points.en: such as endurance racing, or Rock am Ring,
points.zh: 比如耐力赛，比如摇滚之环

points.en: or who knows, or maybe you actually want to avoid those.
points.zh: 谁知道呢，你可能会想避开这些活动

points.en: Because of those events. the hotel prices are going to be extremely high.
points.zh: 因为这些活动，酒店的价格会高得离谱

points.en: For 24 hours, I've seen prices where
points.zh: 24小时耐力赛的时候

points.en: they ask for 10,000 or 5,000 euro
points.zh: 见过要价1万或5千欧元

points.en: for like a full weekend for some crazy VIP suites or etc. etc.
points.zh: 当然是那种夸张的VIP套房一个周末啥的

points.en: But it's quite expensive.
points.zh: 但真的相当昂贵

points.en: Whereas a normal day, you can get like
points.zh: 相较之下，平常的时候

points.en: in local guest houses for 50 euros or maybe even less.
points.zh: 本地民宿也就50欧元 甚至更便宜

points.en: My advice to you, check booking.com
points.zh: 建议去查查booking.com

points.en: and just check what fits in your budget,
points.zh: 看看哪些符合你的预算

points.en: and in location wise, and, of course, check if there is an event happening,
points.zh: 把位置考虑清楚 还有查清楚有没有举办活动

points.en: because that might influence the price of the hotel
points.zh: 因为这可能会让酒店价格

points.en: insanely. Insanely high.
points.zh: 疯狂上涨 高得离谱

points.en: For all the good reasons, because supply and demand.
points.zh: 因为这就是直接了当的供需关系嘛

points.en: Final thing, that I want to tell you, is
points.zh: 最后我想告诉你们的是

points.en: Nürburgring is at Nürburg, not Nurnberg
points.zh: 纽博格林在“尼尔堡”，不在“纽伦堡”

points.en: because that's about 500 kilometers away from each other
points.zh: 它们中间还相距着500公里呢

points.en: or like 5 to 6 hour drive.
points.zh: 5到6小时的车程

points.en: And back when I was dealing with rental cars,
points.zh: 以前我处理租车事务的时候

points.en: at least one time a week, someone would call
points.zh: 每周至少有一次，有人会打电话：

points.en: like, "Hey, I'm here."
points.zh: “嘿，我到了”

points.en: "We're here"
points.zh: “我们到了”

points.en: "in Nurnberg."
points.zh: “在纽伦堡了”

points.en: Okay.
points.zh: 好吧

points.en: I guess you won't be driving today
points.zh: 那你们今天跑不成了

points.en: because the track will open in 15 minutes,
points.zh: 因为赛道在15分钟后开放

points.en: but also close in two hours, and you have six hour drive.
points.zh: 但两小时后就关闭了 你们还有6小时车程

points.en: So... I think I covered most of the important things.
points.zh: 我应该把大部分重要事项涵盖到了

points.en: If there is anything else you would like to ask me,
points.zh: 如果大家还有其他问题想问我

points.en: ask me in the comments. I will try to answer them.
points.zh: 在评论区问我吧，我会尽量回答

points.en: And I'm sure also many of the community will also help you out
points.zh: 我相信社区里的很多人 也会帮忙解答

points.en: and that's, I think, kind of it.
points.zh: 所以，差不多就这样了

points.en: So, looking forward seeing you next year and, yeah,
points.zh: 所以很期待明年见到大家

points.en: in tomorrow or the afternoon tomorrow, I will publish a track day guide
points.zh: 明天或明天下午，我会发布一个纽北赛道日指南

points.en: that I, hopefully, will film in time before the sun sets down.
points.zh: 希望我能在太阳下山前拍完

points.en: So, thanks for watching and looking forward seeing you upcoming year on the track.
points.zh: 感谢大家观看，也期待明年在赛道上见到大家

points.en: By the way, one more thing is that
points.zh: 顺便说一句，还有一件事

points.en: you've seen also this year I'm also okay being passenger
points.zh: 你们也看到今年我也愿意当乘客

points.en: with people that I, to an extent, trust.
points.zh: 和我信任的人一起

points.en: And if I don't trust, then it's okay.
points.zh: 如果我信不过，那也没关系

points.en: I'm getting a payback of scaring other people on track.
points.zh: 这也算是我在纽北吓唬别人的报应吧

points.en: So that's also okay. But if you are kind of experienced on the track,
points.zh: 也没问题，但如果你在纽北还算经验丰富

points.en: I might be willing to get in the car with you.
points.zh: 我可能会愿意坐你的车

points.en: So I don't need necessarily to drive your car
points.zh: 所以我不一定非要开你的车

points.en: or if I'm scared getting in with you, I'm just gonna put my cameras in there
points.zh: 如果我实在害怕上你的车，也可以把相机架你车上

points.en: you can have all the prime time on my channels without me.
points.zh: 你可以独占我频道的黄金时段，还没有我出镜
